# Meet the team: Beccy Ingram - Blog | Dune

[All posts](https://dune.com/blog)

Meettheteam:BeccyIngram
=======================

Discover what it’s like to lead People at Dune— from building a unique culture to creating meaningful connections every day.
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Team•July 4, 2024•3 min read

careers-at-dune

![@Beccy Ingram](https://dune.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fcdn.sanity.io%2Fimages%2Ffox336rh%2Fproduction%2Fba8d7310a464e0afaf3f1e6f00b833aa25b86fe6-400x400.jpg&w=96&q=75)

[Beccy Ingram](https://www.linkedin.com/in/rebecca-eve-ingram/)
People at Dune

![Meet the team: Beccy Ingram](https://dune.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fcdn.sanity.io%2Fimages%2Ffox336rh%2Fproduction%2F20882e467af222050abfa2656cdcd03118664481-1200x675.webp&w=3840&q=75)

Tell us about what you do at Dune / what a typical day looks like?
------------------------------------------------------------------

I am on the Dune People team! I suppose more accurately, I lead the people team. In reality I work in partnership with my wonderful teammate Tahnee who manages our people operations. We lead all the people processes including (but not limited to!) hiring the best talent into Dune and giving them a great experience here from day one, building an epic, high performing team, creating meaningful moments for team connectedness and nurturing a pretty unique culture here at Dune. Most days, Tahnee and I are designing and implementing people processes, initiatives and content from scratch which is interesting, exciting and challenging in equal measure.

How did you get into People?
----------------------------

It chose me! Whichever role I have had in the past, whether that was in operations or as Chief of Staff, I naturally focussed on the people element (the most important?!). I pushed against moving into People formally for a while, purely because of the stigma around “HR.” It's often viewed as a slow and bureaucratic area of business and I wanted to be more strategic, move fast and have impact. Thankfully that view has changed and I have had the pleasure of holding People roles where I have made a difference - whether that's in terms of scaling or creating important foundations for businesses to thrive.

What has been your most memorable Dune moment and why?
------------------------------------------------------

So many, but it has to be the first irl offsite i attended in Italy where i met the team in person for the first time. Walking up to the Tuscan villa we rented for the week and seeing the entire team sat in the sunshine, enjoying eachothers company, was a special moment. We had recently doubled in size, so there was this real sense of excitement as people eagerly got to know each other. After 4 days together, the trip cemented for me something I already knew, which was that Dune hires special people (smart but humble) who were incredibly passionate about our mission.

![ width=](https://dune.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fcdn.sanity.io%2Fimages%2Ffox336rh%2Fproduction%2F720875f2dfa8f1a6eaf021a78e0ecb2b19529f4d-1182x665.jpg&w=3840&q=75)

![ width=](https://dune.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fcdn.sanity.io%2Fimages%2Ffox336rh%2Fproduction%2F0ed72e10b75b4348ddbcb18c9990a5dc6ca9f67e-1600x1200.jpg&w=3840&q=75)

What do you love most about Dune?
---------------------------------

I love the understanding and acceptance that no one person knows the answer every time (especially when you are pushing boundaries and building something unique). Our mission is ambitious, and what we are building is complex. Most of us are embarking on new challenges every day where we need to work out what needs to be done for the first time. Hire smart, inquisitive people who have the confidence to say ‘i don't know the answer, but let me figure it out’ and it's amazing what people can achieve.

What does (Embrace the rollercoaster) mean to you in practice?
--------------------------------------------------------------

Change is inevitable, especially at a series B company. The highs can be exhilarating but managing the inevitable bumps, pivots, or sometimes even blocks to delivering our strategy can be disappointing and tiring. It’s certainly not for everyone so it's important to be clear on what it means. To me it means working on your resilience; on the ability to say when something isn't working, to learn and to move on. Oh and when the highs happen, celebrate HARD!

# How we think about paid products - Blog | Dune

[All posts](https://dune.com/blog)

Howwethinkaboutpaidproducts
===========================

Over the next few weeks we’re going to roll out several new paid plans to make Dune even more powerful for those that need it.
------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

News•November 11, 2022•4 min read

![@Fredrik Haga](https://dune.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fcdn.sanity.io%2Fimages%2Ffox336rh%2Fproduction%2F52880ee8ffdf5c96f23bc355690443daba96f1f2-664x664.jpg&w=96&q=75)

[Fredrik Haga](https://www.linkedin.com/in/fredrikhaga/)
Co-Founder & CEO at Dune

![How we think about paid products](https://dune.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fcdn.sanity.io%2Fimages%2Ffox336rh%2Fproduction%2F5c513a5c055f6ff014e385936c12e302b997429f-1200x675.jpg&w=3840&q=75)

Dear Dune community,

Over the next few weeks we’re going to roll out several new paid plans to make Dune even more powerful for those that need it. There is, and will continue to be, a powerful free tier. We’ll have several tiers so that you can find a plan that fits your needs and wallet. Before it all goes live I wanted to share with you some of the principles we use when it comes to these changes.

First, for the avoidance of doubt: **the core Dune product experience will remain free as it always has been.** Not only that, it will rapidly become better and better over time. Our mission is to make crypto data accessible and that means we want to keep having a very powerful free user experience. To achieve this for the long-term, we of course need a sustainable business model.

### Why?

Our focus at Dune is to turn crypto data access from a theoretical possibility to a practical reality. In our effort to do that we take on some serious infrastructure bills for the whole community. We are employing some of the world's very best engineers and investing deeply in creating the most powerful crypto data experience on the planet. Not to mention all of the educational resources and support we put out so anyone can become a wizard. All of this costs a lot of money and naturally means we also need to make some money in the long term.

### Why now?

We have always had a paid component of Dune, but for the vast majority of our time so far we have not focused on it. We have instead focused on scaling through crazy growth and building out several important pieces of infrastructure to create a better experience for the community. It’s always been the plan to build out a new paid offering to meet our power users needs when we had the right technical foundation in place.

So when we are now launching new paid products it’s not because of the market, our investors pushing us or because we are running out of cash. In fact, we have always stayed very lean and still have the vast majority of funds raised in the bank. Dune is not going anywhere.

We are launching new paid plans now because our community continues to need more from the data, and we now have the right technical foundation to meet these needs. You want more from your Dune experience, and we are excited to be able to offer this.

### The principles we use for monetizing

#### Free

When you build in public, Dune is free to use. That’s because by building in public you’re helping to make crypto data accessible. Others can build on your queries and learn from them. You’re helping to educate the world. You can query and visualize a ton of blockchain data as much as you want. You can work with the cleanest datasets in the game. You can collaborate with the community, easily share your work, get clout and awesome opportunities.

#### Paid

If you don’t want to contribute to the community knowledge you can keep your work to yourself and then we charge you. Also if you want to do something that is more costly from an infrastructure standpoint, we will charge you. In practice that means we’re charging for:

*   Take your content private which doesn't benefit the community
*   Export data and create value for yourself outside of the community. For instance if you use data export for trading, proprietary research or to build a business.
*   Run on heavier infrastructure to have queries execute faster

These are the main ways in which we monetize and we think it’s a fair approach: you can use powerful tools for free if you also contribute to the public collective understanding of blockchain data,, or you will pay a bit for the service you use.

Over the next few weeks, we’ll be launching new paid plans according to the above principles. Power users that want more from Dune can look forward to more performance, better team collaboration in private or public, the highly anticipated API access and more! This is the first time in years that we’ve made changes to the Dune paid products and we’re excited for you to check it out. Over the next few months, we will also be adding a lot more functionality to _both_ free and paid tiers.

We’re excited about the new paid plans but are also aware that one rarely gets everything right out of the gate so if you have any questions or feedback please reach out in our discord or email [\[email protected\]](https://dune.com/cdn-cgi/l/email-protection#cdbeaca1a8be8da9b8a3a8e3aea2a0)
. We’ll keep doing our very best to make something useful and valuable for you.

Thank you for being part of the Dune community.

The data must flow!

/Fredrik

Dune CEO & Co-Founder

# Investigate Addresses with Labels - Now Live on V2! - Blog | Dune

[All posts](https://dune.com/blog)

InvestigateAddresseswithLabels\-NowLiveonV2!
============================================

Wallet addresses are about to get a whole lot more interesting!
---------------------------------------------------------------

Research•October 19, 2022•2 min read

![@Alsie L.](https://dune.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fcdn.sanity.io%2Fimages%2Ffox336rh%2Fproduction%2F2d4297f3e37d59932719698a65a11cfb77fe3194-673x673.jpg&w=96&q=75)

[Alsie L.](https://www.linkedin.com/in/alsieliu/)
Content Marketing Manager at Dune

![Investigate Addresses with Labels - Now Live on V2!](https://dune.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fcdn.sanity.io%2Fimages%2Ffox336rh%2Fproduction%2F52264c0fdee01c3e758cc32124893f0528c39051-1200x675.jpg&w=3840&q=75)

Address Labels are Live on V2
-----------------------------

‍

Have you ever looked at a list of addresses on Dune, and thought - so what?

‍

Who is behind these random hexadecimal encoded strings? What’s their story? Are they noobs or pros? _Why should I care?_

‍

![ width=](https://dune.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fcdn.sanity.io%2Fimages%2Ffox336rh%2Fproduction%2Fa49aa2631e206fac37e2fb0aaf170d4086fcd779-675x378.png&w=3840&q=75)

‍

If so, we have some _great news_ for you……

‍

### We’ve added Labels and ENS support in Dune v2!

‍

Those 0x strings are about to take on a new meaning as Wizards unlock the secrets behind them, analyzing on-chain behavior on a much deeper level.

So, what’s the deal?

‍

Traditionally when you query, any field referring to an on-chain actor will return their raw address. This is good and all, but it leaves the identity _behind_ that address a mystery.

‍

Who are they? Are they part of a DAO? Which airdrops did they receive? Are they a hacker? A Miner? A top NFT trader?

‍

That was then though. _Now,_ you can use the **get\_labels()** function on any address to learn about its history in far greater detail.

‍

Currently, we have 18 label categories live:

‍

*   _safe_
*   _mev_
*   _airdrop_
*   _ofac\_sanction_
*   _multisig_
*   _arbitrage\_traders_
*   _cex_
*   _bridge_
*   _validators_
*   _hackers_
*   _flashbots_
*   _contracts_
*   _ENS_
*   _funds_
*   _Rollup_
*   _nft_
*   _tornado\_cash_
*   _A top 1% NFT trader by $ volume_
*   _A user of Looksrare, Foundation, Superrare, Opensea_
*   _Their ENS name_
*   _An $OP airdrop recipient_
*   Complementing your dashboards with extra context about addresses (by calling get\_ens or get\_labels on raw address columns)
*   Joining your raw address columns to the label dataset of their interest, adding more depth to their analysis and answering completely new questions
*   Contributing to our rapidly growing set of labels with your own original research

‍

This was a real community effort.

‍

We built the structure for a new [set of spells](https://github.com/duneanalytics/spellbook/tree/main/models/labels)
 for assigning labels to addresses based on the history of that address. We created a couple of examples, before our amazing community took over and contributed over a dozen new label sets in under a week. Yes, they’re that good.

‍

When you use any of our label datasets, you’ll probably be relying on the work of one of our contributors – you can check who built it in the contributor column and raise a glass to them!

‍

Interested in contributing your own set of labels? you can head over to [our github repo](https://github.com/duneanalytics/spellbook/)
 and work on getting your own merged. You can read more about labels, and spells in general, in our [spellbook docs.](https://spellbook-docs.dune.com/#!/model/model.spellbook.labels_all)

‍

We believe that the most powerful aspect of Dune is our amazing community and the datasets that we’ve built together. This is another great example of this partnership.

‍

Labels will open up a whole new dimension for Wizards and the crypto community to slice and dice data, solve problems, and get answers to important questions. They also provide another avenue for gigabrains in our community to contribute to the most powerful blockchain analytics toolkit in the world, and the crypto industry as a whole.

‍

As always, we can’t wait to see what you build…….

‍

# Introducing Spellbook - Blog | Dune

[All posts](https://dune.com/blog)

IntroducingSpellbook
====================

New level unlocked! Today, we’re excited to announce Spellbook, a new shared foundation for crypto analytics.
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

News•July 21, 2022•2 min read

![@Alsie L.](https://dune.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fcdn.sanity.io%2Fimages%2Ffox336rh%2Fproduction%2F2d4297f3e37d59932719698a65a11cfb77fe3194-673x673.jpg&w=96&q=75)

[Alsie L.](https://www.linkedin.com/in/alsieliu/)
Content Marketing Manager at Dune

![Introducing Spellbook](https://dune.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fcdn.sanity.io%2Fimages%2Ffox336rh%2Fproduction%2Fcdb6dbaa9c6ea49b3975252924587eb726b9c3df-1200x675.jpg&w=3840&q=75)

**New level unlocked!** Today, we’re excited to announce Spellbook, a new shared foundation for crypto analytics.

Spellbook brings all the best practices of analytics engineering from the web2 world, for the public-by-default data of web3. Read on to learn more and discover how to contribute today.

A Brief History of Abstractions
-------------------------------

On January 31, 2020, we launched the abstractions Github repo.

We wanted to build a place for wizards to create reusable views and tables, rather than copy & paste them between queries (ouch!).

Since then, we’ve had over three hundred contributors and nearly 1k commits.

![ width=](https://dune.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fcdn.sanity.io%2Fimages%2Ffox336rh%2Fproduction%2Fc5b354c9187c41c6ba0ab0de4112b4fe1ed42946-1600x169.png&w=3840&q=75)

Abstractions are some of the most queried tables on Dune. That makes creating them one of the highest leverage things a wizard can do, and we wanted to make that experience better.

Spellbook
---------

Spellbook is a retooling of our existing [abstractions](https://github.com/duneanalytics/abstractions)
 repo, with a first-in-class open-source analytics engineering tool called **dbt,** or data build tool.

[dbt-core](https://docs.getdbt.com/docs/introduction)
 is an open-source framework that injects more classical software engineering practices into writing SQL, using the Jinja template language. Why we’re hyped on dbt:

![ width=](https://dune.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fcdn.sanity.io%2Fimages%2Ffox336rh%2Fproduction%2F8ab5b4a3a672ff376641bc45bfedc24228540240-1472x352.png&w=3840&q=75)

Here’s how it works…

Abstractions, henceforth **models** in dbt-speak or **spells** in dune-speak, can be materialized into views and tables - with refinements like incrementally-loaded tables, date-partitioned tables.

These can all be compiled into SQL and run on dune.com. No more contributing code that you can’t test without our help.

You can write **data integrity tests** to spot and prevent any issues in our abstractions. These can check for unique primary keys, non-null values, accepted values, and relational integrity, all with a single line in a YAML file.

Finally, using dbt we can automatically track the **dependencies** between all models, rather than deploying them manually. This guarantees that all models are deployed in the correct order.

All in all, this will enable us to reliably scale Spellbook to thousands of spells, without bottlenecks or data quality issues.

Why this Matters
----------------

Nowadays, developers have many opportunities to contribute to open source projects. This shared foundation of re-usable libraries has collectively saved us millions (billions?) of hours.

But the same isn’t true for analytics or data science. Until recently, “open source data analytics” hasn’t really been a thing, because all the interesting data is locked up in corporations.

We believe you shouldn’t need to “FAANG it” to access the world’s data, or be on the same “Okta group” to collaborate on it.

With Spellbook, we’re bringing the collaborative model of open source software, to data science and analytics, made possible by the public-by-default data in web3.

If you’re an analyst or data scientist tired of the same old Titanic or digit recognition datasets or Kaggle competitions - come help us build the future!

Get Started Today
-----------------

We hope you are as excited as we are about this new tool! Spellbook is now live and we welcome new contributors.

You can learn how to [cast a spell](https://docs.dune.com/dune-engine-v2-beta/abstractions-in-dunev2/how-to-contribute-a-spell)
, browse our auto-generated [spellbook documentation](https://spellbook-docs.dune.com/#!/overview/spellbook)
 or join the conversation on [#spellbook](https://discord.com/channels/757637422384283659/999683200563564655)
.

The data must flow!

Stablecoin Intelligence

Comprehensive stablecoin insights

# Dune Launches New Blockchain Data Sharing Solution for Enterprises on Snowflake Marketplace - Blog | Dune

[All posts](https://dune.com/blog)

DuneLaunchesNewBlockchainDataSharingSolutionforEnterprisesonSnowflakeMarketplace
================================================================================

Access Dune's entire curated data directly into your own environment.
---------------------------------------------------------------------

News•February 27, 2024•2 min read

![@Fredrik Haga](https://dune.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fcdn.sanity.io%2Fimages%2Ffox336rh%2Fproduction%2F52880ee8ffdf5c96f23bc355690443daba96f1f2-664x664.jpg&w=96&q=75)

[Fredrik Haga](https://www.linkedin.com/in/fredrikhaga/)
Co-Founder & CEO at Dune

![@Mats Olsen](https://dune.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fcdn.sanity.io%2Fimages%2Ffox336rh%2Fproduction%2Ff6fc3d29e0b012fb86082c9258f2420dba6974c1-800x800.jpg&w=96&q=75)

[Mats Olsen](https://www.linkedin.com/in/mewwts/)
 Co-founder & CTO at Dune

![Dune Launches New Blockchain Data Sharing Solution for Enterprises on Snowflake Marketplace](https://dune.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fcdn.sanity.io%2Fimages%2Ffox336rh%2Fproduction%2F09cb36c0ea4f85ecf628f261a462ff79546e0570-1200x675.webp&w=3840&q=75)

[Dune](https://dune.com/home)
 is the leading crypto data platform trusted by tens of thousands of leading companies and projects. Today we announced the launch of **Dune Datashare** to provide seamless access to Dune’s entire curated crypto data directly on [Snowflake Marketplace](https://app.snowflake.com/marketplace/providers/GZSVZMYSCO/Dune)
.

Since our inception 6 years ago, Dune has been dedicated to democratizing access to crypto data. Our datasets, renowned as the gold standard within the industry, are trusted by data analysts worldwide. Over time, Dune has grown into a platform empowering world-leading data teams, Fortune 500 companies, and government organizations. With the launch of Dune Datashare, Dune and Snowflake are working together to simplify access to unparalleled blockchain data, delivering it straight to our joint customers’ doorstep.

**An ocean of public blockchain data exists, but it’s practically inaccessible**

The irony lies in that while blockchain data is publicly available, accessing and interpreting it proves to be a challenging endeavor. The journey to reliable, cross-chain crypto data is long, complex, and expensive, particularly compounded by the expanding multitude of chains. Dune solves this major issue by offering effortless access to meticulously curated data seamlessly integrated into an organization's infrastructure via Snowflake Marketplace.

> “
> 
> “_Our commitment to excellence in providing top-tier crypto data has earned Dune the trust of the entire industry. As the leading blockchain data platform, we're thrilled to introduce our latest product, Dune Datashare, which empowers enterprises to access any data table seamlessly. With just one click, they can integrate this invaluable resource into their own data warehouse and workflow._ ” said **Fredrik Haga**, Co-Founder & CEO of [Dune](https://dune.com/home)
> .

> “
> 
> **Kieran Kennedy**, Head of [Snowflake Marketplace](https://app.snowflake.com/marketplace)
> , stated, "_We're thrilled to collaborate with Dune to empower joint customers with seamless access to trusted crypto data through Secure Data Sharing in Snowflake Marketplace. This partnership amplifies our commitment to mobilize the world's data and drive innovation, by giving enterprises the power to unlock new capabilities all within the Data Cloud._ "

**Access the most trusted crypto data directly in your environment**

You can now access over 1.5 million datasets directly on Snowflake Marketplace, including raw blockchain data, human-readable smart contract data, protocol, and cross-chain data from Arbitrum, Avalanche, Base, Binance, Bitcoin, Ethereum, Fantom, Optimism, Polygon, Scroll, Solana, Zora, zkSync, and many other EVM or non-EVM chains.

Venture capital firms, institutional investors, media companies, regulatory agencies, gaming projects, blockchain foundations, and virtually any organization utilizing crypto data rely on Dune to drive their businesses, applications, or research endeavors.

![ width=](https://dune.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fcdn.sanity.io%2Fimages%2Ffox336rh%2Fproduction%2F5b75f94fe47d5cd7551c213910899055aefdc793-1424x1268.webp&w=3840&q=75)

**Dune Datashare is available today**

If you want to learn more about Dune Datashare or talk directly to our blockchain data team, please visit [dune.com/enterprise](https://dune.com/enterprise)
.

_The Data Must Flow_

[Explore Datashare](https://dune.com/datashare)

\
Explore Datashare](https://dune.com/datashare)

# 2023 - A Challenging Vintage - Blog | Dune

[All posts](https://dune.com/blog)

2023\-AChallengingVintage
=========================

Dune Co-Founder and CEO reflects on navigating hardships and making pivotal decisions in a year marked by introspection and adaptation.
---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

News•December 22, 2023•3 min read

![@Fredrik Haga](https://dune.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fcdn.sanity.io%2Fimages%2Ffox336rh%2Fproduction%2F52880ee8ffdf5c96f23bc355690443daba96f1f2-664x664.jpg&w=96&q=75)

[Fredrik Haga](https://www.linkedin.com/in/fredrikhaga/)
Co-Founder & CEO at Dune

![2023 - A Challenging Vintage](https://dune.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fcdn.sanity.io%2Fimages%2Ffox336rh%2Fproduction%2Ff60288816f2adf21c83e554913b0183c2ade8663-1200x675.webp&w=3840&q=75)

**Reflections on the past year**

This year, we are recovering from the FTX scandal, navigating persistent macro headwinds, and coming down from the massive hype of 2021. Simultaneously, the cryptocurrency industry is still searching for its killer use cases. To borrow lingo from the world of wine: 2023 has been a challenging vintage. In fact, we founded Dune over 5 years ago, and 2023 has been the hardest year to date - for the industry, for me as a founder, and for Dune as a company.

After the 2017 ICO mania, we started Dune in 2018, when crypto was mostly disregarded and uninteresting. In many ways the sentiment was similar to these days, but with some major differences.

Working in crypto in 2018 and 2023 is similar because, during both periods, it was “not cool”. While some risk-hungry ICO gamblers lost some money post-2017, working in crypto in 2018 felt like working on an under-hyped movement with a lot of potential and little money. 2021 took the scale of capital, hype, promises, and reach of crypto to crazy heights. Coming crashing down from that at the end of 2022 with the poster child of the industry revealed as a massive fraud was undoubtedly more painful. In many ways, it felt like our industry over-promised the world. In 2018 we were playing pure offense, in 2023, we were playing catch up to the expectations.

I’m not gonna lie (as opposed to SBF). Personally, this is the year I’ve had to dig the deepest to find motivation to keep going. The amount of noise, short-term thinking, and bad actors in crypto has been really discouraging. Especially since these are the folks and events that dominate headlines and engagement - so one is over-exposed to all the bad apples, and for your mind, as Daniel Kahneman has pointed out: what you see is all there is.

The pain notwithstanding, I'm a big believer in tough times serving as a useful forcing function to make difficult decisions. At Dune, we’ve made several painful but important transitions this year.

While we fortunately haven’t had to do any big layoff, we've gone from 60 to 45 people throughout the year. These types of changes are never easy or fun. We changed our pricing plans from seats and product-based to usage-based with unlimited collaboration and flexible access to all our products. We’ve migrated to our very own query engine DuneSQL - an absurdly ambitious undertaking including a complex migration of 10s of thousands of queries. All in pursuit of giving you the world's best crypto data querying experience.

While the year has been a rollercoaster on many fronts, one of our company [values](https://www.notion.so/Values-7efdcec2298a4913aaef8067b25820df)
 is: Embrace The Rollercoaster. I’m proud that our team has done just that. We’ve kept shipping at a high pace and have made countless improvements across the product, including faster querying, team functionality, new blockchains, data uploads, materialized views, private query views, query scheduling, DuneAI, and folders. Just this week, we wrapped up the year with unwrapping slack/email/webhook alerts, up to 25x cheaper data exports, and more.

2023 has been a challenging vintage, but some pruning is healthy for the ecosystem. These days I feel an incredible momentum, in the industry, inside Dune, and within the Dune community broadly. I can’t wait to keep making crypto data accessible together with you all in 2024.

Happy holidays to the whole Dune community, it’s a privilege to be working with you all!

_Fredrik_

_Dune Co-Founder and CEO_

# Dune Digest 015 - Blog | Dune

[All posts](https://dune.com/blog)

DuneDigest015
=============

Research•June 20, 2025•3 min read

![@Filippo Armani](https://dune.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fcdn.sanity.io%2Fimages%2Ffox336rh%2Fproduction%2Ff9dd54cabfaa63ae0dda792b5072e44d5b9b9971-800x800.jpg&w=96&q=75)

[Filippo Armani](https://www.linkedin.com/in/filarm/)
Data Content Creator at Dune

![Dune Digest 015](https://dune.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fcdn.sanity.io%2Fimages%2Ffox336rh%2Fproduction%2Fbf8ec089ae95be4bbc5ac09de394c919f5cb0353-1200x675.png&w=3840&q=75)

[Fluid Surges with $55B Volume](https://djfc5c04.eu1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/RL+113/djFC5c04/VWq5np7ZYMDVN3Y7mDfTb03jW7qxXbD5y3H_qN6klYX03qn9gW7Y8-PT6lZ3pVW8lJB8f3Jj2CHN5Hr469tz4SrW6zRf5B83WRptW4nF5yN3VHWWNW2fhhmB8bm_mQW80bKqF6WSKkVW7TP-Xs3W9lwQW4dT1Dq4vfP-3W8Zxz_T201HncW1vC6Tc3nM7SfW33HdR88KjJs6VqJqfP8jf9FWW52PLS95WP1-lW4qXskc3JqmCRW6sRy581YGycRW1Sgcqv4kh9VjW2dgMcR6dB7x7Vclqh31TtH_VW4h6FSK5SJ_PHW3HV15z47YGFgN4cfwMM6P6QyW7tCM3j9fkNQHW56HHx25tkLllW9jCRVG7vsW4FW4d3mTm8xQkVKN237Gl8D43lpf4vkQcP04)

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

According to a new dashboard by Entropy Advisors, Fluid has surged in 2025, also following the launch of DEX v2 on April 25, **surpassing $55B in cumulative volume**, with **$15.88M** in fees and **$729M in active liquidity**. Most volume comes from Ethereum, while _Arbitrum leads in capital efficiency_, driving ~20% of trades with far less liquidity. Base and Polygon are smaller but gaining traction. **Over 70% of volume involves stablecoins**, ~20% is ETH-based, and CoW Protocol is now one of the top interfaces routing trades to Fluid.

![Fluid DEX Volume by Blockchain](https://dune.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fcdn.sanity.io%2Fimages%2Ffox336rh%2Fproduction%2F7b21b2b078d9f71ea1e2fe16a859b843b9eed8cd-1120x605.jpg&w=3840&q=75)

[Death.Fun, Abstract, and the Rise of GambleFi](https://djfc5c04.eu1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/RL+113/djFC5c04/VWq5np7ZYMDVN3Y7mDfTb03jW7qxXbD5y3H_qN6klYX03qn9gW7Y8-PT6lZ3kYW8mPCBL6Gh3ntW1gdm0P2WfgsRW1BqjtK8K4j9JVY-R3c8_nDRnW8Md5YS6Q2gPcW87g3YP1B_76qW1GRnBm8kjX_1W1WZ4_L6dkR9wVTjQkP76Hr4YW13NpBk96dWj5W4mCRKS4_t7dWW5hjftl5Mx1bLW2zPtzx1JZ4FvW58c2K78zJZ9SW7tDQqj3ZP7dPW8qW8lz3SYhh3W67-K-B2R7_CgV78nkL4SSGyqW5S0JTY1_31C9W8p6mKq2MBQ-qN3JV6hCdZZxFW9jFsht8J1zJDW7Y1YLC4s1rQ1VhPh5g44QV5jW7frsQL41PKSFVJz90J7dMdnmf2DLPW004)

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Launched on May 28, Death.Fun has quickly become the leading app on Abstract, topping charts for both transactions and fees. The gameplay is simple but addictive: place a bet, pick tiles to dodge hidden death traps, and either cash out safely or risk it all for greater rewards. Even losses earn Death Points, keeping users engaged round after round. Since launch, **over 8,500 users** have placed more than **10,000 ETH in cumulative bets**. Death.Fun’s explosive growth, alongside other sticky GambleFi hits like Gacha, reinforces _Abstract’s emerging role as a launchpad for viral, high-retention consumer apps in crypto_.

![Bet Amount ($ETH)](https://dune.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fcdn.sanity.io%2Fimages%2Ffox336rh%2Fproduction%2F43697c072d3f3c5950134eaaefaf3fe2cbc2c32a-1120x695.png&w=3840&q=75)

[1inch Crosses 187M Swaps, BNB Volume Explodes](https://djfc5c04.eu1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/RL+113/djFC5c04/VWq5np7ZYMDVN3Y7mDfTb03jW7qxXbD5y3H_qN6klYWK3qn9gW7lCdLW6lZ3pzW67h7xk4M74fGN4gNzXD7XLhXW1Bw1354XTrqxW1KLD4f8Y9k8LW6Mr_fF3-D2rtW2z976s3ykWf3N6myJMzBp7XSW1Rhjvz38g199W5WkrrX420TxyW4SbkgV8R58bsW1vSfQB7NXcKMW71l26K6HR16bW5QsDqS4JyrdTW2Cvs8K3_4m6GW8PDKQq5L777MW1r84bw4-JMQrN87DGqvgDQwpW2jTYNc1-BNZgN3p0RXVvK1tSW9gPRpW2h4xgfW93LFP6986486VhT_6y9k5-9MW9d_DKQ4vtDb0N1mnWN-J1fPHf1x7Cw604)

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

1inch has seen a sharp surge in activity over the past two months, with **$54B in volume**, **1.1M users**, and **30M swaps** in just the past 30 days. That’s double the monthly volume and 4x the swap count compared to earlier this year. May and June each recorded over $30B+ in volume and 20M+ swaps, up from a ~$15B and ~5M monthly baseline. Historically, **1inch has routed over $692B in total volume across 187M swaps and 24M users**. Ethereum leads with $477B in volume, followed by BNB Chain with $105B. However, BNB flipped Ethereum in the past 30 days, generating $46B in volume, a 456% increase month-over-month. With _recent expansions to Solana and Sonic_, and the rollout of a new [Pathfinder algorithm](https://djfc5c04.eu1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/RL+113/djFC5c04/VWq5np7ZYMDVN3Y7mDfTb03jW7qxXbD5y3H_qN6klYXj3qn9gW8wLKSR6lZ3pmW8HrQbR1_klpkW3x5wsk7b4r7vW6ldD7z2WGxkqW5mHQJn3TJPK-N4R4_5HYKfTlVkFCR38z71-zW8t4DP317R8x1W615n-W7MnYStW27yw3r29JTJhV52XLN7q9yqkW5m61TT6Hpkp6W2Q4GNC3__KPWW6YYbmH8vSxZfW35Ns0458ptgJW6NFxxP7QXg_2W3NZY8y6Tb4jbW8Gtq8y6C11MXV_KsBj1-KWGxW8FN6bJ38RCy2N7cn9hH9DzKXN5T8hxjd0LmZW7jKqMD5N4cwgN4jvWFT-TJdlW4Pyzc16bZkxRV7B2102k-nN9W5pHTcL4xZ1rsW3rtPGV7rCYXXW35-gpt4jwGgJdPgLNT04)
 delivering better swap routes, 1inch continues to grow as one of the most critical routing layers across both L1s and L2s.

![💰 Volume_ newbies_returned](https://dune.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fcdn.sanity.io%2Fimages%2Ffox336rh%2Fproduction%2F78c353ad9a72e0ddf760d6629af13602ff90f086-1120x587.jpg&w=3840&q=75)

[Ink Activity Surges Ahead of Token Launch](https://djfc5c04.eu1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/RL+113/djFC5c04/VWq5np7ZYMDVN3Y7mDfTb03jW7qxXbD5y3H_qN6klYX03qn9gW7Y8-PT6lZ3q6W7XZ5jq5Sb4WzVsbSbf5-JdHqN7RWjWQXkVf6N98fgF8dZ5FWW8SyWzZ4Vg-8wW77FGvk32Yrk2N4Bw9YbmgqWwVknSxv4gnxC3Ck6_3sgDkW1PbFnh12bwvKW2Lq_-41NMR7fW98CNf_6LPN64W2wSDG_5RMckVW2QsrQy2N8Gy5Vh5qdg20Vk9TW2s1lN75S8YX4W6cl8-n27kj84W8lLWmR84qMt-W5Kzs8w4qbby9W3310Fg25-mYcW4bGLmW5JqhvVW56kHxV4c3fRsW3L10YD5gX7-rN5myvhcL9L2hW43GQL_3Gl7s1W749bv38x9lr_f3F9Sc204)

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

On June 17, the Ink Foundation announced the upcoming launch of $INK, a fixed-supply token designed to coordinate users, protocols, and builders across the ecosystem. Its first use case will be a native Aave-powered liquidity protocol with airdrop incentives. While governance of the L2 remains with the Optimism Superchain, $INK will serve as the incentive layer for Ink’s growing DeFi stack. The token launch comes amid a sharp rise in activity, with **daily transactions surpassing 500K**, and **active contracts more than doubling since May** to a peak of 6,500 on June 18. Ink is a DeFi-native Layer 2 for capital coordination at scale.

![Chart (9)-1](https://dune.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fcdn.sanity.io%2Fimages%2Ffox336rh%2Fproduction%2Fcc634598dba9288f3594b4e26320e4dc842723b0-1120x718.jpg&w=3840&q=75)

[Viction Gains Momentum with 3x Users and $2M TVL](https://djfc5c04.eu1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/RL+113/djFC5c04/VWq5np7ZYMDVN3Y7mDfTb03jW7qxXbD5y3H_qN6klYX03qn9gW7Y8-PT6lZ3mKW2jG_Hk8DM7x8W3STpF98Z0QKGN4R_Yt1gYRD7W1SVHdK1CVMSMW7FrfGV7pJwFYW1tt7wc6ZHG95N3RLpyFPsnVdW1wdY_-5c3XCqW18KWcF40XLmNW7BzbCF8rQTk8W5v2LKR6GJnr9W423FRD6yNM__W9g5LmD2nnYhbW2xq_C57TMxQvMZqyyPQfFQkW3gvBmq277yWKW4X5Ld33LZgD_W18qWD346HLj1W4rFHrX60Zv_DW2QD2B_9cdZjpW6Q_kJb4bj0fmVQP_T76xndWPW8cHfPt7fFS3xVLtZCN3dlLrnVbgJQT70tYpwW7Cwkr74gS21Vf3WysZ604)

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Viction is a people-centric, EVM-compatible Layer-1 offering zero-gas transactions, enhanced security, and modular app chains via its World Wide Chain architecture. Onchain activity has surged in recent months, with **daily active addresses rising from ~10K in March to over 30K**, transactions increasing from 450K to 550K, and **TVL jumping from $400K in January to over $2M by May**. This growth follows key developments, including SafePal’s native wallet support and the passage of VIP #4, which upgraded validator incentives and cross-chain functionality. As the World Wide Chain expands, Viction becomes a launchpad for community-driven innovation, where usability, interoperability, and modular design converge to unlock the next wave of decentralized applications.

![Chart (11)-1](https://dune.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fcdn.sanity.io%2Fimages%2Ffox336rh%2Fproduction%2Faf3b4c4d0d420921a045165a856ac0ebc652e8a4-1120x728.jpg&w=3840&q=75)

‍

# Introducing "Mint Moment" – Capture and Collect Data Insights as NFTs - Blog | Dune

[All posts](https://dune.com/blog)

Introducing"MintMoment"–CaptureandCollectDataInsightsasNFTs
===========================================================

Mint Moment is a new feature that allows you to mint data visualizations as NFTs
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

News•August 19, 2024•4 min read

data

![@Arnaud Simeray](https://dune.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fcdn.sanity.io%2Fimages%2Ffox336rh%2Fproduction%2Ffa348f19b468070d0ee164af44149700e27e9d50-800x800.webp&w=96&q=75)

[Arnaud Simeray](https://x.com/Arnno39)
 Go-To-Market Lead at Dune

![@Alsie L.](https://dune.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fcdn.sanity.io%2Fimages%2Ffox336rh%2Fproduction%2F2d4297f3e37d59932719698a65a11cfb77fe3194-673x673.jpg&w=96&q=75)

[Alsie L.](https://www.linkedin.com/in/alsieliu/)
Content Marketing Manager at Dune

![Introducing "Mint Moment" – Capture and Collect Data Insights as NFTs](https://dune.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fcdn.sanity.io%2Fimages%2Ffox336rh%2Fproduction%2F0bc07ba79adeacc3b08318422ba375a85b53b3ef-1200x699.png&w=3840&q=75)

What is the “Mint Moment” Initiative?
-------------------------------------

We’re excited to announce the launch of the "Mint Moment" initiative at Dune, a new feature that allows you to mint data visualizations as NFTs, capturing significant moments in onchain data. This initiative, in collaboration with [Base](https://www.base.org/)
 and [Zora](https://zora.co/)
, is designed to reward onchain creators and analysts, providing them with new revenue streams while enabling you to own and trade pieces of crypto history.

‍

Whether you’re a data enthusiast or just looking to support your favorite creators, Mint Moment offers a unique way to engage with the onchain world.

> “
> 
> “Onchain data is living, breathing, and always updating, but certain moments in time represent something special. With Dune's new Mint Moment functionality, anyone can forever capture and collect the data of the moment while also paying their gratitude to the creators behind the insight.” Fredrik Haga, CEO and Cofounder of Dune.  

![__wf_reserved_inherit](https://dune.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fcdn.sanity.io%2Fimages%2Ffox336rh%2Fproduction%2Fba354a1ad2bac64c95c2f6fd9520fffde46271bb-1200x608.webp&w=3840&q=75)

> “
> 
> "We are thrilled to partner with Dune on the Mint Moment initiative. This project not only empowers onchain creators by offering them new revenue streams but also brings the excitement of [Onchain Summer](https://www.base.org/onchainsummer)
>  to a broader audience. It's an innovative way to celebrate and monetize the valuable insights that drive our industry forward." – Jesse Pollak, Creator of [Base](https://www.base.org/)
> .

For Creators: How to Get Involved
---------------------------------

![__wf_reserved_inherit](https://dune.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fcdn.sanity.io%2Fimages%2Ffox336rh%2Fproduction%2F94833ce7910c7c9a3e360d83a2ba51706a72e74c-1200x608.webp&w=3840&q=75)

### Adding Your Wallet

To participate in Mint Moment, creators need to have a wallet connected to their Dune account. Your wallet address is the key to receiving rewards from the NFTs minted from your charts. If you’re working in a team, the team can add a shared wallet as well, ensuring everyone involved gets rewarded.

*   **What happens if you don’t connect your wallet?**  
    If your wallet isn’t connected, your charts won’t be eligible for minting. It’s essential to ensure your wallet is linked so we know who to payout. We’ve also now added wallet support for teams.  
    
*   **Already connected?**  
    If you’ve already connected your wallet, all proceeds from mints will automatically transfer into the Zora Rewards contract where you can claim them at any time.
*   **Don’t want to participate?**  
    If you’ve connected a wallet but prefer not to join the reward program, you have the option to opt-out.

### Earnings from Mints

For each mint of your chart, you’ll receive 0.000333ETH. The more mints your chart receives, the more you earn. This direct support from the community not only rewards your hard work but also encourages the continued creation and sharing/distribution of valuable insights.

For Minters: Why You Should Mint
--------------------------------

### Support Your Favorite Creator

By minting charts as NFTs, you’re directly supporting the creators behind the data. There’s no limit to how many single/total charts you can mint, so feel free to collect as many as you like. Each mint contributes to the creator’s earnings, rewarding them for their contribution to the community.

### Own a Piece of History

When you mint a chart, you’re capturing an important moment in onchain history. Whether it’s a significant milestone like Base hitting 500M in transaction volume or a unique visualization that resonates with you, these NFTs can be treasured as part of your digital collection or traded on various platforms.

How to Mint a Chart as an NFT
-----------------------------

Minting a chart on Dune is a simple and rewarding process. Here’s how you can get started:

**1\. Explore Charts**: Browse through the various charts and data visualizations available on Dune. Once you find a chart you want to mint, click on it to view the details.

![__wf_reserved_inherit](https://dune.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fcdn.sanity.io%2Fimages%2Ffox336rh%2Fproduction%2F01a59938ef19fed710d2dc8f856004ed82327e30-1200x608.webp&w=3840&q=75)

**2\. Connect Your Wallet**: Ensure that your wallet is connected to Dune. This wallet will be used to store your newly minted NFT. If you don’t have a wallet connected, you’ll be prompted to do so before proceeding.

![__wf_reserved_inherit](https://dune.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fcdn.sanity.io%2Fimages%2Ffox336rh%2Fproduction%2Ffe0d5a36720116930a8c8c3b6bd270297ad2a5c9-1200x608.webp&w=3840&q=75)

**3\. Mint the Chart**: Once your wallet is connected, you’ll see the option to mint the chart as an NFT. Click on the "Mint" button and confirm the transaction in your wallet. The process will require a small gas fee on top of the Zora mint fee (.000777ETH), so make sure you have enough ETH to cover it.

**4\. View Your NFT**: After the transaction is confirmed, your newly minted NFT will appear in your wallet. You can view it, trade it on Zora or other NFT marketplaces, or simply hold onto it as part of your digital collection.

![__wf_reserved_inherit](https://dune.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fcdn.sanity.io%2Fimages%2Ffox336rh%2Fproduction%2Fda21abbb5b6f7a4a117a209d4f292f8bfbecf26d-1200x608.webp&w=3840&q=75)

More information about Mint Dashboard, please visit our [Docs](https://docs.dune.com/web-app/dashboard-minting)
.

Onchain Summer Exclusive NFT
----------------------------

To celebrate the launch of Mint Moment, we’re dropping [a special NFT edition](https://zora.co/collect/base:0xdc6b3687d5d9ada19faad9e782e3ece41e1da7ba/1)
 that is only available during Onchain Summer 2024. It’s a one-time opportunity to kick off your minting journey with Dune, and this NFT is only available until August 26th.

> “
> 
> "We are excited to partner with Dune on the Mint Moment initiative. This integration further expands the definition of a Zora creator and empowers developers, analysts, and Dune Wizards to capture value from their insights while building onchain brands. We look forward to the milestones and memories that Dune's community brings onchain through Mint Moment." – Dee Goens, CoFounder of Zora.

Happy Minting!

# A Primer on L2 (ft. MSilb7) | Dune Arcana #4 - Blog | Dune

[All posts](https://dune.com/blog)

APrimeronL2(ft.MSilb7)|DuneArcana#4
===================================

"L2s (Arbitrum & Optimism) account for 30-40% of all transactions on Ethereum, but consume only 2% of the total gas..." That is one of the trends mentioned by Tomasz Tungas in his talk at DuneCon regarding The State of Web3 in 2022. This week we explain what Layer 2 is with on-chain data.
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Guide•November 17, 2022•1 min read

![@Alsie L.](https://dune.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fcdn.sanity.io%2Fimages%2Ffox336rh%2Fproduction%2F2d4297f3e37d59932719698a65a11cfb77fe3194-673x673.jpg&w=96&q=75)

# Brand Hub | Dune

Updated Dec 2025

Brand Hub
=========

Access all brand assets for Dune including logos, fonts, and social headers.

Logo
----

This primary logo is used for most applications. It should be place on white backgrounds only.

[Download logos](https://drive.google.com/uc?export=download&id=1ES-FaHSXNIOejJAg8UbsUb8O57iBE-S1)

Icon
----

Available for use in square, bevelled and circular profile spaces. Example uses include a favicon or social profile image. The white border ensures the icon is legible in both dark and light UI modes.

[Download icon](https://drive.google.com/uc?export=download&id=1WL6VkGHYKuzkiLOQOPDkZg6GDewBdTvz)

Color
-----

Dune relies on orange and yellow for accents, with grey and white anchoring typography and backgrounds; Sim mirrors that structure using blue and green primaries for its brand.

Off-Black

#0F0F15

Dune Orange

#F4603E

Dune Yellow

#F9DC5C

White

#FFFFFF

Sim Blue

#446BCE

Sim Green

#109C6B

Typography
----------

Primary Font

Our primary brand font family is Geist. Use regular, medium and Bold weights for emphasis.

[Access fonts](https://fonts.google.com/specimen/Geist)

Messaging
---------

Our Mission

Make crypto data accessible.

Slogan

Our primary slogan is "The data must flow." is used as a sign-off for our marketing. Always use this capitalisation and include the full stop for emphasis.

Brand values

Empathy

Integrity

Magic

 and related marketing materials.

# Dune Wand and Debug, new LLM powered tools - Blog | Dune

[All posts](https://dune.com/blog)

DuneWandandDebug,newLLMpoweredtools
===================================

Create, edit, and debug your queries faster
-------------------------------------------

Guide•August 3, 2023•3 min read

ai

llm

![@Alsie L.](https://dune.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fcdn.sanity.io%2Fimages%2Ffox336rh%2Fproduction%2F2d4297f3e37d59932719698a65a11cfb77fe3194-673x673.jpg&w=96&q=75)

[Alsie L.](https://www.linkedin.com/in/alsieliu/)
Content Marketing Manager at Dune

![Dune Wand and Debug, new LLM powered tools](https://dune.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fcdn.sanity.io%2Fimages%2Ffox336rh%2Fproduction%2F6d089bec50e6e07f062247aa69eb090665e67c60-1200x675.png&w=3840&q=75)

AI-written movie scripts? Never. AI-written queries? Yes, please.

The joy and beauty of a good movie script comes from the unique insights and experiences of the writer, not from the writer’s prowess at the keyboard. Data-driven decisions don’t come from knowing SQL minutia but from incisive questions from curious people. We understand that data analysts often face challenges when writing queries, hindering their ability to focus on what really drives value and we want to change that.

At Dune, we are committed to unleashing the full power of Language Model-based Learning (LLM) to make crypto data accessible to all. Our goal is to empower our users to delve into what matters most, abstracting away the tedious aspects of their work. To achieve this vision, we are thrilled to announce the launch of three LLM-powered products: **Create Wand, Edit Wand, and Debug**.

![ width=](https://dune.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fcdn.sanity.io%2Fimages%2Ffox336rh%2Fproduction%2Fdf9865bc347e04d117d5db3bab8af0424dba4372-1386x776.png&w=3840&q=75)

### 1\. Create Wand: Unleash the Potential of Natural Language Queries

Like Aphrodite being born of sea foam, your SQL query will emerge fully formed and ready to deliver insights. Just kidding.

‍

This is our most ambitious LLM product: generating an entire query from a natural language prompt. You will be happy (or sad) to know that you are not being completely replaced by robots. This product is most useful for creating queries and getting over the hump of a blank query editor.

With the Create Wand, we aim to streamline the query writing process, by simplifying the initial stages of query development, analysts can swiftly get to the heart of their questions and accelerate the exploration of valuable insights.

For each natural language question, we’ll search for the most semantically similar examples from our library of Dune-specific [few shots](https://www.promptingguide.ai/techniques/fewshot)
, include all table schemas for prompted tables, and auto-debug any incorrect syntax generated by the LLM. This is a product that we intend to continuously improve as we learn more about how wizards write prompts and build the most accessible blockchain natural language querying engine.

Here is an example of the Create Wand in action:

![ width=](https://dune.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fcdn.sanity.io%2Fimages%2Ffox336rh%2Fproduction%2F143f152e0b684fe74700f98acd9de3280d94b463-708x378.gif&w=3840&q=75)

### 2\. Edit Wand: Refine Your Queries with Natural Language Precision

Did you know there is a hidden painting under the [Mona Lisa](https://www.bbc.com/news/entertainment-arts-35031997)
? Just like [France’s most famous painting](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=0D3NN6M_DYk)
, even your most bespoke queries might need some editing.

The Edit Wand allows you to take an existing query (bootstrapped or bespoke) and write an edit prompt to modify it. For a lot of data work, the difficulty is finding the right tables and fields to filter on. After that, defining the summary statistics, window functions, or reformatting with CTEs is not a particularly rewarding process. Why not focus on getting the core logic of the data you want to analyze and let an LLM define the CROSS JOIN conditions for you?

See our [docs](https://dune.com/docs/app/wand-llm/#wand-edit)
 for some inspiration on how to use the feature.

![ width=](https://dune.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fcdn.sanity.io%2Fimages%2Ffox336rh%2Fproduction%2Fad2ac258999bd86f2508d7c6c3fdcd1a30aa6ab8-1280x720.gif&w=3840&q=75)

### 3\. Debug: Syntax Error Resolution

**‍**

AI-written jokes? Not even once.

![ width=](https://dune.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fcdn.sanity.io%2Fimages%2Ffox336rh%2Fproduction%2Fb305af9318009093b908c31eeda55965ad80b165-1424x554.png&w=3840&q=75)

‍

Syntax errors are the worst, especially when you are learning a new dialect. That’s why we’ve launched a feature that automatically debugs your query. We soft-launched this feature a few weeks ago, and we’re consistently fixing ~90% of syntax errors submitted. Never again stare at your screen again searching for a missing comma.

Here's Debug in action:

![ width=](https://dune.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fcdn.sanity.io%2Fimages%2Ffox336rh%2Fproduction%2Fe9c97415ccfdb0faffa55cb2d2d8f8b367c2ab2d-664x404.gif&w=3840&q=75)

### In Beta

We're excited to be making progress towards our [LLM roadmap that we announced back in March](https://dune.com/blog/llm-roadmap)
. As an experimental phase, we are excited to offer these three LLM features— Wand Create, Wand Edit, and Debug to our community. Your input is valuable to us. We invite you to provide us with your [feedback, suggestions, and any issues](https://feedback.dune.com/wand-feedback)
 you encounter. Your insights will help us fine-tune and optimize the tools.

LFG to making crypto data accessible.

‍

# Levelling Frameworks - Blog | Dune

[All posts](https://dune.com/blog)

LevellingFrameworks
===================

How we develop talent and support career growth at Dune
-------------------------------------------------------

Team•February 7, 2023•3 min read

![@Beccy Ingram](https://dune.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fcdn.sanity.io%2Fimages%2Ffox336rh%2Fproduction%2Fba8d7310a464e0afaf3f1e6f00b833aa25b86fe6-400x400.jpg&w=96&q=75)

[Beccy Ingram](https://www.linkedin.com/in/rebecca-eve-ingram/)
People at Dune

![Levelling Frameworks](https://dune.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fcdn.sanity.io%2Fimages%2Ffox336rh%2Fproduction%2F40fe762bd04f53809d40a5ea36d1e17af7a20c06-1200x675.webp&w=3840&q=75)

At the point I joined [Dune](https://www.dune.com/)
, we were 20 people. Less than a year later and we are now ~60 people, across 20+ countries. Some meaningful growth, that stirred up some meaningful challenges!

Something we wanted (needed) pretty quickly, was data. We launched Dune’s engagement survey to understand how people were feeling. Delving into the comments, some clear themes became apparent. The team were asking:

*   _What is expected of me day to day?_
*   _What progression is there for me at Dune?_
*   _Why am I paid what I’m paid?_
*   **Give clarity and set expectations for us all:** A career framework defines the required competencies and behaviours for each level. This helps provide clarity on what is expected of us all in our current roles.
*   **Provide the foundations for meaningful career progression**: Enabling career progression is key to engage and retain our team. A framework by level can demonstrate career paths by defining what is required at the _next_ level as well as showing what strong performance looks like in the current role.
*   **Enable fair evaluation of performance and promotion:** Defined levels mean we can assess people fairly and promote people based on the same criteria. It’s critical for removing subjectivity and bias — key for D&I and to our value of [integrity](https://www.notion.so/Values-and-working-at-Dune-7efdcec2298a4913aaef8067b25820df)
    .
*   **Allow more transparency around pay** and helps answer “why am I paid this”? Role + level + [Dune’s compensation philosophy](https://duneanalytics.notion.site/Careers-at-Dune-Doing-the-best-work-of-your-life-f25e0b5e1f624d2aaf3ef2c81558ea96)
     = your pay.
*   **Speed, yes you shouldn’t rush it:**Speed, yes you shouldn’t rush it:_Speed, yes you shouldn’t rush it: We rushed a little as we had promised the team a pay review (and felt it was important to follow through with what we promised). The consequence was excess pressure on the leaders (the content writers) and not enough time given to the team to review the framework before they were levelled. This was a mistake._
*   **Start with a company wide view.** Start with a company wide view. _Start with a company wide view. We dived right into functional career frameworks; which means we have good definitions and expectations set by function, but we have no overarching framework sharing a common set of competencies companywide. E.g. We don’t have a shared view on how people are expected to communicate across the business for example. Important in a fully remote org._
*   **Language matters.** Language matters. _Language matters. We got the most feedback in this area. It is hard defining ‘entry’ or ‘junior’ roles without inadvertently describing them as less important than the other levels (which of course isn’t correct). We changed the language we used but I’m sure we still haven’t got it right._

### 6\. Levelling the team

The controversial bit. We approached this by asking both the manager and function leader (i.e. our CTO for engineering & product) to separately level each individual, based on the framework. When there was a disagreement, we got together to align.

To calibrate against teams we shared the initial company-wide levelling with each manager and gave them the chance to challenge each other. There were a handful of cases where we made adjustments based on these challenges — an essential step for equity across teams.

Frameworks create clarity, and force meaningful discussion around expectations. They can unearth potential unspoken misalignment between manager and individual. If the framework is written effectively then it should _force_ these difficult conversations. I would say this was probably the hardest part of the process - we are talking about people’s careers after all!

Sharing the framework in advance, asking for feedback and explaining it was the first version seemed to help.

We combined the levelling conversations with pay discussions, with the aim that each person would have both clarity on their level, the associated expectation and what that means in terms of their compensation by the end of the process.

_📎 Dune’s Career Frameworks (imperfect and still being iterated on but I hope helpful for some of you) : 👉_[Engineering](https://duneanalytics.notion.site/Engineering-Career-Framework-V1-4dc34a7a6310431280f249ad7e1d3f15)
 _👉_[Product](https://duneanalytics.notion.site/PM-Career-Framework-V1-cc5e9a5475bc48d3a6c78b304495e444)
 _👉_[Community](https://duneanalytics.notion.site/Community-Career-path-V1-643e186c964941ff9339e690618cfcc5)
 _👉_[People](https://duneanalytics.notion.site/People-Career-Framework-b9a649a3e9ca46798c769d80a23816a4)

We haven’t finished and have a way to go. We have the V1 frameworks on Notion, the team are levelled and now have pay reflective of that level. However, we are far from done. We need to embed the frameworks into our performance and recruitment processes, we need to create more alignment across functions and we need leadership frameworks - some good projects for 2023!

💭 Thoughts and feedback really _very_ welcome. Please share [here](https://forms.gle/Qz3W8ghMe7zwrfEH9)

# Solana data is now LIVE on Dune! - Blog | Dune

[All posts](https://dune.com/blog)

SolanadataisnowLIVEonDune!
==========================

We’ve been working hard on this with the Solana team for months. The insane speed and throughput of the Solana chain presented some challenging problems to solve - but it was all worth it.
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

News•February 16, 2022•2 min read

[Solanasolana](https://dune.com/blockchains/solana)

![@Alsie L.](https://dune.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fcdn.sanity.io%2Fimages%2Ffox336rh%2Fproduction%2F2d4297f3e37d59932719698a65a11cfb77fe3194-673x673.jpg&w=96&q=75)

[Alsie L.](https://www.linkedin.com/in/alsieliu/)
Content Marketing Manager at Dune

![Solana data is now LIVE on Dune!](https://dune.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fcdn.sanity.io%2Fimages%2Ffox336rh%2Fproduction%2Fafece76c566bd5b9efbcfedbf1d458dff2358485-1400x787.webp&w=3840&q=75)

Solana has exploded onto the crypto scene since launching in early 2020. The high-speed, high-throughput, proof of stake chain is known for its lightning fast transactions, scalability & low fees.

The Solana DeFi, NFT & Metaverse ecosystem has been growing rapidly since launch - attracting both users and developers in droves!

Here at Dune, we believe that the future is multi-chain. We also believe that a multi-chain future needs powerful multi-chain analytics to thrive. It’s our mission to make crypto data accessible and transparent, and to empower anybody to become a skilled on-chain analyst.

That’s why we’re incredibly excited to announce……. **that Solana data is now LIVE (beta) on Dune!**

We’ve been working hard on this with the Solana team for months. The insane speed and throughput of the Solana chain presented some challenging problems to solve - but it was all worth it……..

Mats, Dune’s co-founder and CTO had this to say about the project:

> “
> 
> _“The Solana ecosystem is growing extremely fast. Being a user of many Solana programs myself, the lack of insight into onchain activity has been frustrating. We’ve been working hard to fix this and are thrilled to announce the beta release of Solana on dune.xyz to enable developers, users and stakeholders the ability to analyze any and all activity on Solana”_

Ben Sparango, head of business development at Solana Labs, is bullish on Dune Wizards:

> “
> 
> _"We're very excited that Dune Analytics has joined the suite of data visualization tools available on Solana. Dune has done a fantastic job of cultivating a robust community of data scientists and we look forward to the learnings everyone can glean from having them dig into the Solana blockchain."_

Solana data is currently in beta, so you can expect some changes, improvements and new tables to roll out in the coming weeks!

Currently we’ve released the following tables:

*   **Solana.blocks** - the full block history for the Solana ecosystem ([example query](https://dune.xyz/queries/389979)
    )
*   **Solana.transactions** - the data for transactions including programs called and account activity ([example query](https://dune.xyz/queries/390045)
    )
*   **Solana.rewards** - rewards paid out on Solana! ([example query](https://dune.xyz/queries/390040/743733)
    )
*   [Solana Metrics by @kroeger0x](https://dune.xyz/kroeger0x/Solana-Metrics)
     has some great data on transaction, program and dApp activity
*   [Solana Transactions by @sealaunch](https://dune.xyz/sealaunch/Solana-Transactions)
     breaks down and compares metrics on DeFi & NFT activity
*   [Solana Ecosystem by @dataviking](https://dune.xyz/dataviking/Solana-Ecosystem)
     highlights blockchain growth and rewards
*   [Drift Protocol by @bigz](https://dune.xyz/bigz/drift-(solana))
     dives into the stats for a futures DEX on Solana

If you want to dive deeper - you can check out the full documentation and schemas [here.](https://docs.dune.xyz/data-tables/data-tables/raw-data/solana-data)
 We also encourage and welcome any feedback, which you can [submit here.](https://dune.canny.io/solana-beta-feedback)

This is just the beginning. As we add more tables, and more wizards start exploring Solana - we’ll see a raft of amazing dashboards covering all components of the ecosystem!

# Dune Digest 031 - Blog | Dune

[All posts](https://dune.com/blog)

DuneDigest031
=============

$2B for Polymarket, Plume × Dinero, MetaMask Perps, Variational on Arbitrum, Four.meme Surpasses Pump.fun
---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

News•October 11, 2025•3 min read

![@Filippo Armani](https://dune.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fcdn.sanity.io%2Fimages%2Ffox336rh%2Fproduction%2Ff9dd54cabfaa63ae0dda792b5072e44d5b9b9971-800x800.jpg&w=96&q=75)

[Filippo Armani](https://www.linkedin.com/in/filarm/)
Data Content Creator at Dune

![Dune Digest 031](https://dune.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fcdn.sanity.io%2Fimages%2Ffox336rh%2Fproduction%2F4b419d555131f7f29b2da61e113f0de9350c1e3f-1200x675.webp&w=3840&q=75)

[Polymarket Heads to Wall Street with $2B ICE Backing](https://djfc5c04.eu1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/RL+113/djFC5c04/VVwLZh335VmJW74cnWf76F-8JVQq1455DwLNLN1c6srn3qn9qW8wLKSR6lZ3mQW8Vlj_r1WF2lQW1jNgpf1Y7c9FN3QNWqmcb3R0Vs6FqD8ppw4dW3MkzVX7yY8QVVHMSXX7X8VmcW6zBNjz22sdCHVY9Z7X6Q19q3VKSvq35d1dLBW38w8Gj5YjXyNW7_f0l166B0p2W22J3-P8HGSyzW7YpP1Z5x8XTBW49jZ0n3Yl2hfW5KJyh11vyrB3W7XQ_GY3TKvttW2V128n5WgQNtW1pLQKX1BM8lpW40TpmW1fqfSdW8bkz-K7Qq29xW3_t-gg7p733lW4-CQCf1wDCQ6TDJn26D_1v_W4KKNyj6B1kjXW6Qh-nf2TrRKLW14Zzq34CxgQrW751slM3q4VM-W93b5zW9gRBpCdTZHyP04)

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Polymarket had a breakout week: on Oct 7, **Intercontinental Exchange (NYSE’s parent) announced up to $2B at a ~$9B post-money valuation**, while September’s Stocktwits partnership launched Earnings Markets to 10M+ finance users. Together, ICE’s backing and the earnings push reframe Polymarket’s model: odds on corporate results are a higher-value, more monetizable signal than media/news predictions, **positioning the platform less as a niche betting site and more as a data-and-liquidity layer that TradFi can plug into**. Activity stays strong (**\>$300M weekly volume, >4M trades, >$180M OI**) across politics, sports, crypto and now equities. Polymarket is on track to become a potential pillar of the financial stack while the sector heats up as rival Kalshi raises $300M at a $5B valuation, claims >60% global market share, and expands to 140+ countries, underscoring prediction markets’ move into the financial mainstream and the acceleration of blockchain-rail adoption.

![Open Interest ($)](https://dune.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fcdn.sanity.io%2Fimages%2Ffox336rh%2Fproduction%2F6c78fe61d8915b7bc1047a06867572ef4dd188a6-1120x647.jpg&w=3840&q=75)

[Plume Brings Liquid Staking Into RWAfi with Dinero](https://djfc5c04.eu1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/RL+113/djFC5c04/VVwLZh335VmJW74cnWf76F-8JVQq1455DwLNLN1c6sqP3qn9qW7lCdLW6lZ3kSW8gNhlL3HPKj_W6hlqDn198nZqW64H3fq2V5b-6W8BtzVY4FtzMPW43l9t01tnFQ4W1DHlxn2Kt2YgW49wWp48SQpPpW70rCKN6gVqM2W9jmt456gbDT5W93dv_33cC9-wW16Gcz560J8twN6WD2L4yxpW_W3Fv9L82DtZJxVRl8YV8sH4vGW5j4qf245QkDHW4jk9Sp4VYg5jW2L1tdg2PV2nyW9fcqpQ8M8SZFW73H6jh7wN7NdW5RN6h98zvv6-W7KJttW4lwFXYW50_V_j5d8-qnN8CrP2X6qcRHVSRxx96Dn_nXf3KLQgs04)

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

On Oct 8, Plume announced the acquisition of Dinero, creator of one of Ethereum’s fastest-growing **institutional liquid staking protocols**. Dinero’s products include **pxETH** (a liquid staked ETH token for DeFi use), **apxETH** (an auto-compounding vault boosting pxETH yields, currently at 5.5% APY with a 1.6× multiplier), and **ipxETH**, the institutional version optimized for custody and compliance. **The protocol now secures 8,832 ETH staked across 276 validators**, representing 0.0267% of total ETH staked, with 12,100 pxETH and 6,950 apxETH in circulation. By integrating Dinero’s ETH, BTC, and SOL staking suite (also behind pxBTC and pxSOL), **Plume strengthens its RWAfi ecosystem, bridging liquid staking and real-world assets into a unified institutional yield layer for onchain finance.**

![Daily Deposit (pxETH)](https://dune.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fcdn.sanity.io%2Fimages%2Ffox336rh%2Fproduction%2Fdbb61a447e3199587fa3ac899e2f8195be1a3af3-1120x748.jpg&w=3840&q=75)

[MetaMask Adds Perps, Powered by Hyperliquid](https://djfc5c04.eu1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/RL+113/djFC5c04/VVwLZh335VmJW74cnWf76F-8JVQq1455DwLNLN1c6sr43qn9qW7Y8-PT6lZ3nMW9hdnj41f1WBtW4Nfh5_6st7jTW3cG-Df5C4P7nW8J687r4yK8q0W3fHG6D1c908tW1mldch8lPhXxW8bBv4V6GMYPPW46l97p264tYwW6tR0k-59LqWrN6HXZTNjBKb_W7ThV5N4zZJ6PW5t8NFv6yGV0RW4sqMbW6F_xz3W7QfdsT7NZRqLW8y8JPH4ksbN2W4HQkll56WCYKW8lb39_3JmLtnW2F85dD8JkwdfW4t4g2Y94psqLW17PdMw8SdqMmW2TPr3M6-LJblW91JgKc7SQFNhW7Hjkst2N-KM4V9qJVM78_xYMW8xQ8nV4TR0tRW3vxT_n641wdSf4nZkCn04)

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

On Oct 8, 2025, MetaMask introduced in-wallet perpetual futures trading powered by Hyperliquid, letting users trade 150+ tokens with up to 40× leverage directly from the mobile app. The move pulls high-volume derivatives into self-custody, boosting decentralized trading and advancing the “wallet-as-super-app” trend where trading, staking, and even social live in one UX. Early traction is strong: **$53M cumulative MetaMask-perps volume** (with $37M on Oct 9 alone), **$26.8K in fees** ($19K on Oct 9), **and ~1,800 users so far**. Contextually, perp DEX activity has soared, and Hyperliquid’s distribution is compounding via several wallet integrations: Phantom (July), Rabby (early Sept), Rainbow (early Oct), and now MetaMask, positioning Hyperliquid as the de facto backend for onchain perps across consumer wallets and pushing self-custodial derivatives toward the mainstream.

![Volume (1)](https://dune.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fcdn.sanity.io%2Fimages%2Ffox336rh%2Fproduction%2F249b0c9e611fbcfd93dc2dcec4a68e3a45231bf3-1120x759.jpg&w=3840&q=75)

[Variational, A New Perps Infra Layer on Arbitrum](https://djfc5c04.eu1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/RL+113/djFC5c04/VVwLZh335VmJW74cnWf76F-8JVQq1455DwLNLN1c6srn3qn9qW8wLKSR6lZ3p3W4SlrSR2bwnflN6zT9bTqrf90V_rJV14LRHklW8GlKSB8Hlx7rN448LpQFfsB_MyM1jZ23tygW14mGmD5GBLfJW8pq3Mn3RWZDKW3XqBym4p4686W80GP419cvxnjW8LtsQ195t0PxVl7bSP6WptfxW4qv_WR8w4N6HW84JFmb8rQRhZW5P6YvK7K4SvzW3cc--45B9jvhW2-g8zM7GXGk9V3Gnn17mxKQkW7tKzq17W_PZ9W95VlSl2pH6b1W1H1S8623yQS1W6BRkjl8tNlWYW6M3PWh7b_-WmVMCjQW4lKtm9W2Kd9dj2J1YbVW8cG4pb5LBZJsN1VJ7Hw-GW4mW25h0Yw6YFmfpf219xRC04)

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Variational, a **derivatives protocol on Arbitrum**, is emerging as a key perps player by introducing a **peer-to-peer clearing/settlement model behind Omni**, a zero-fee perps app with no gas fees and $0.10 deposit/withdrawals, plus RFQ and spread-discount mechanics that keep more value with users via its OLP counterparty. Per Entropy's dashboard, **Variational reached $18M TVL with $6M 7-day net inflow**; 12K addresses created, 6K activated, and 3.3K live; and a Loss Refund system that has returned $453K to traders to date across 1,310 recipients and 5,817 refund transactions. **This architecture rethinks onchain derivatives** by enabling bilateral trading of perps/options/exotics while reducing leakage to external market makers; for Arbitrum, it **adds a differentiated derivatives stack alongside established venues like GMX and Hyperliquid**, potentially pulling more institutional-style flow (via the Pro app’s customizable OTC) and reinforcing the chain’s role as a scalable base for high-volume DeFi as RWAs and derivatives converge.

![TVL (3)-1](https://dune.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fcdn.sanity.io%2Fimages%2Ffox336rh%2Fproduction%2F7e03ea079371801f98924576e89f355967dc987b-1120x716.jpg&w=3840&q=75)

[BNB’s Four.meme Overtakes Pump.fun](https://djfc5c04.eu1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/RL+113/djFC5c04/VVwLZh335VmJW74cnWf76F-8JVQq1455DwLNLN1c6sr43qn9qW7Y8-PT6lZ3mBW53dZ094t3JX2W1Xy5BW4389_4W35b66h4Bx12NN8cc2w1dnTcLW8vv68v75n10_W61VXh423Ksy0N749_jGTZt8kW4XrW_K69YtVKW83pgyk7NJ_wgW94QqxS6ZVgc7W95YgmZ3CdQ2NW7TG-P751kTPHN1YF9YC1ZgQzW6Ty81S8cn0WLN3VM218hNMzwVs9pNY1JSDnsW3LxDxn9289HTW1CpP6_7HfJsqW3xWCk789xYVrW36jnqn1cHMCtN7-0KM2VkBT0W1s5jBK5fcnxpN63jRs-QvmtdW9bDlYw2Q8G7WVM8l3K6XWpb2W3gKT3K3sRxPWf2mCYjM04)

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Four.meme, the **memecoin launchpad** launched in 2024 on BNB Chain, democratizes token creation with no-code tools, bonding curves for distribution, and instant PancakeSwap listings, mirroring Pump.fun’s UX. By October 2025, Four.meme saw **522K tokens created**, **7K graduated**, and **$32M in cumulative fees**. Activity is broad-based on both the trader and builder sides: **4.3M trader addresses** across volume tiers (from ≤$1K to >$100M), and multiple top deployers each launching 1,000+ tokens. October saw a clear step-change: On Oct 8, **47K+ tokens created, ~$3B volume**, **and ~$4M fees**, with Four.meme capturing **83% market share of tokens created vs Pump.fun**, 92% of tokens graduated, and 87% of fees/revenue, underscoring how BNB’s launch rails are concentrating meme issuance and trading on BNB. In parallel, the ascent of Aster in perpetual futures, which surpassed Hyperliquid, strikingly underscores BNB Chain’s burgeoning momentum in 2025.

![Daily Token Created](https://dune.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fcdn.sanity.io%2Fimages%2Ffox336rh%2Fproduction%2F967504deedf930aff8cd0cd1282a2d523ae63e76-1120x731.png&w=3840&q=75)

Nothing in this newsletter constitutes financial advice.

**Always do your own research.**

Dune Digest is all about cutting through the noise and surfacing the most relevant onchain trends. If you have insights, dashboards, or data-driven stories that belong in the Digest, **drop your suggestions** [here](https://djfc5c04.eu1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/RL+113/djFC5c04/VVwLZh335VmJW74cnWf76F-8JVQq1455DwLNLN1c6spW5nXHCW5BWr2F6lZ3lsW3m3zMS17FKg0W59DGhY7My1MvW3HYQXc8rJ34YW18_sw665F0LcW94Z6wY3Xl2T0W8Zrc5b28JyL6W6zQSyM55g7CzV9rT7P5f0Hz3W5dTrQb922hm4W9b6B0m7xH39cW7w4qJT2csPQRVMxJ2L6Q5bq6W3hz6917hW0XXW4-TG8J29SS2fW1NgMnL6dK0NnW7wwXb11JfsgNVQxPrj2CdBcSN1qVdzqfyrsbW22KmjN6tV5bkW9bwx4c8FVQBWW5HMcqL8Kjt-SW7-ZFKh2jr_CPW3TB5-Z3ndzN4F7jCpnGDRf3W1z-2zg7jTgZFW67sv4g7d__GmVRRPvG3-y6SsW8Z9Zql52P81MW2tRxRT1k6ZTgN7vw54sw6vy6W4Djmp17D8w63N3r0y8gGlQ3tN3bKNQBWjXWxVCHbj31JF3kvf3xJwKs04)
.

_The data must flow._
