# Dune Digest 024 - Blog | Dune

[All posts](https://dune.com/blog)

DuneDigest024
=============

Heaven, Jokerace, Football.Fun, BENJI & Kiln DeFi
-------------------------------------------------

News•August 25, 2025•4 min read

![@Filippo Armani](https://dune.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fcdn.sanity.io%2Fimages%2Ffox336rh%2Fproduction%2Ff9dd54cabfaa63ae0dda792b5072e44d5b9b9971-800x800.jpg&w=96&q=75)

[Filippo Armani](https://www.linkedin.com/in/filarm/)
Data Content Creator at Dune

![Dune Digest 024](https://dune.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fcdn.sanity.io%2Fimages%2Ffox336rh%2Fproduction%2Fe8e4c587f3f2f8c10e1012495953e84fc0dc7872-1200x675.webp&w=3840&q=75)

[Let There Be $LIGHT](https://djfc5c04.eu1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/RL+113/djFC5c04/VWkKq14QxbdfVvFWT78X511YW4gSXWJ5BzK__N8Zqh8l3qn9qW7Y8-PT6lZ3mcW5QthcF9dgygRW8CdM8X6W39GZVhHJdx7q7w56W9fW_jh9hFfT3W94Y2yQ4DRfMXN6-6MW_ZxnhZW6d8NbG1d-wF9W79L9ck2Hk-y8W4zzBZ65S8qlJW2_n6mD7sbf3ZW51NF2q2kPKdjW6HvJ-F2wjkCfW48nVSp2GqY5GN1C3TFlg0jJ5VyW-MB8dwg5KW6bX_J49jmV4NW63sG3z7WX2tsN5SxHnjq69-SW3ytD7Z5_M3y0W96jDSj3Kb6GmW8sT3yr78QpkNW69h2FX2q9wg1VxtDxj2ctp49W36GFVH8tbQclVKkm7w2FrgJlVSgldw6hCHdGf4939sn04)

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

[Heaven](https://djfc5c04.eu1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/RL+113/djFC5c04/VWkKq14QxbdfVvFWT78X511YW4gSXWJ5BzK__N8Zqh823qn9qW7lCdLW6lZ3kyW7zq1zg5tLQcSW3XZwyz6914f9W8jbldz18qlknW5Nydbj1nD-_zW1d8FQk8wSLY6W3mn8cf6_S83lW8SDS_G47LVY6W26vjv76g-X3wW2bXmFL2cF4K7N7r46wWg1PV9W1Vrk29266Cq8W8FvPLD6tJMKQW8Y-VHG74xZCDW7YXl18495GFXW1_LnYV1WVD9QW4r5tvQ98GHR_W3zQkVv4CmS1dW30qYF96V3kLYW85BqHm1_0518W2Br7tL7NN3T6W7RXvT-9lrQKVVq7-Wh7_6tH4N8nt1j2yS4BVW907DrK5WvKhtf5KxfVF04)
 has quickly emerged as one of the most talked-about platforms on Solana, **blending an AMM and launchpad into a single hub** for meme tokens and new projects. Its key innovations include a **“no bonding curve” design** that uses **virtual SOL to provide instant liquidity** without migration, a **permissioned fee structure** that protects legitimate creators while blocking scams, and “the god flywheel,” where **100% of protocol revenue is used to buy back and burn $LIGHT**. This creates a strong _deflationary loop_ that has already driven **$3.6M in buybacks** and **burned 3.5% of supply**. The platform shows significant traction, with **308M lifetime volume**, 35K tokens launched, 108K wallets onboarded, and over 26K daily active users generating $34M in daily volume and ~$370K in fees. With $LIGHT now at ~13K holders and a $147M market cap, Heaven represents a new wave of community-driven, high-velocity DeFi models, where exchange activity, speculation, and token value creation are tightly fused, potentially setting a template for the next generation of retail-driven crypto platforms.

![Chart (2)-4](https://dune.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fcdn.sanity.io%2Fimages%2Ffox336rh%2Fproduction%2F6106590e9b012fd1868805b7411cd59cdb7f8e07-1120x645.jpg&w=3840&q=75)

[JokeRace Breaks Out with Persuasion Markets](https://djfc5c04.eu1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/RL+113/djFC5c04/VWkKq14QxbdfVvFWT78X511YW4gSXWJ5BzK__N8Zqh8l3qn9qW7Y8-PT6lZ3pQVkDcC09cj9snW586r7c4cdDn1W42Z4pS1XvwTkW5SfRW24PXTRtW4tFjcv2ND5_lN6_8hR5T9qHQW5RvZ6t4h_yCyW4dzMdF1gsnjhW1PJcKW2GN_LNW4ztPv_3Dpf_vW5XDt0l6fXvr7W6Q2DWP76pP0HW6QyW_N4PsdxfN4cdlSC3HSzFW5dzRS55cNT8DW8Msgvj18mpkYW8rbF_X7bQ-KhW7lZZfz6GjTw_W4kS4n21Gn3jdW1y0PHb61NylSW8Y33Qg4mzxcVW3n9PKj3LWvbYW7XGkvS82Q4BcW6Yjp1T6c51_qW2W3Tl73_-G4bW3DfgpV3Q9VqVf4P24Qg04)

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

[JokeRace](https://djfc5c04.eu1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/RL+113/djFC5c04/VWkKq14QxbdfVvFWT78X511YW4gSXWJ5BzK__N8Zqh823qn9qW7lCdLW6lZ3mzW13KxKW7zYQB9W3H6pqh8CSpN0W1Glb1y84lgC_W100svh1gGGxrW6Cd8_q8g8-4GW3kssv55V4brgW8J6yNW9cBTtVW8B6VQ211jTslW1-TLN617yMB-W37VpLM6h4QRLW41K_fw2gLm65N4nSgtfqZ7N2W3mFmV24CBbzbW4vWcbh4wBSJdW9jvTC-2PBXhRW6Md-Z53lgDM1W3LMSbF3tBnk3W1V3m9D4BLbXwW5jy6Gw5YglV0W29SsHM1WBlZfN8jJZJg__h8QW4CWB9C3KFMFBTC8tX6m_hbVW16Y8B75kpDCJf806tYC04)
 has undergone one of the most interesting product evolutions in crypto, shifting from DAO hackathon tooling into what it now calls “persuasion markets.” Starting in 2022 with crowdsourced voting experiments, the app reframed in 2023 as a contest platform for tokenized communities, adding monetization and token-gated voting. By 2024, it leaned into being a social product with customizable reward mechanics and multi-chain expansion. This year, it introduced **vote-to-earn v2** with **exponential price curves**: early voters pay less, earn more, and can persuade others to follow, creating both higher upside and a more engaging game dynamic. The model **flips voting into a prediction + persuasion market**, where users are rewarded not just for being right, but for being early and convincing. The data reflects traction: **46K voters**, 12K entries, 7.8K paid submitters, **55K paid votes**, and **$1.86M total spent**. Crucially, most of this has come in just the past two months: $77K spent in July, **$1.6M in August**, with **protocol revenue hitting $165K in August alone**. The emergence of persuasion markets signals a broader trend, social consensus itself becoming a financialized game, where communities don’t just decide outcomes but actively speculate on them.

![JokeRace Total Spent](https://dune.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fcdn.sanity.io%2Fimages%2Ffox336rh%2Fproduction%2F0876c6f6bf6a0e65c0f2d13b014f0e2a8c3cce1a-1120x653.jpg&w=3840&q=75)

[Football.Fun Reboots Fantasy Football on Base](https://djfc5c04.eu1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/RL+113/djFC5c04/VWkKq14QxbdfVvFWT78X511YW4gSXWJ5BzK__N8Zqh8l3qn9qW7Y8-PT6lZ3nJW6JCSd04RskS7W3f4r_h6BZZ9BW7msgwg434MynW4LG6Ph5DqJgYW7BBMHl1VK68YW3xvq_n2HtWSLW1CX9XN7FzyK2VDB_cH5XWMjxW4RjcZ5994rWhW51nXgs40K1DDN8KLXh57bBHQW3H1LGs5L4S72W1JpMGZ3kRs8cW1TybMy7YWKJ2W3HFScL1Mlhc-W8WdWp31Ll7v3W4P3zKz1mb4L9W3g_Y0j3R62KZVJ1R8l3bZBtWW39Gkd65grzH7W2hTR9k6Pn5xPW4x1qHD571RQpN381ZHzf4DpqVX33y48F1cvhW8hwqZz1NtYqCW45hzJH4h0sn-f5SYH2H04)

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

[Football.Fun](https://djfc5c04.eu1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/RL+113/djFC5c04/VWkKq14QxbdfVvFWT78X511YW4gSXWJ5BzK__N8Zqh8l3qn9qW7Y8-PT6lZ3nnW911tXW5VYLtQW8K2-wd6910Q9W1xtRbG7NVvWZW47Rk9R5mMN-tW7ljtMG2kY6JqV96PgK8Yr9jPW1lR9lx7qzvJ1W18JwXw6LQ2XMW5fHp--1Gm2QpN3JCBCdkjm_TVYC_nJ4NqTthW4XCcb57wdvwCW90Kk3m3S0gHGW4p_J-f2Pq70gW49LDTc74xyrJN2KvrgTD29l1N85Z0GpqVSQvW7nwdpS5644FCN79g2cB1RYjFW1kLdFM5gFzNlW7pHwc799sqFQN1x0S69Z5kvVW7LFKdk8wN0hDV8jtRG961PSvW7RGwvF2HqRhHW6hD0g51vrVL3dZR7Vb04)
 is a fantasy sports prediction app built on Base, blending fantasy sports with onchain trading. Like Sorare, it lets users collect digital representations of top European players, build squads, trade them in a marketplace, and earn rewards tied to real match performances. But its design introduces key differences: instead of seasonal NFT cards, **players are represented by fractional token shares with fixed supply**, ensuring no resets and a **more liquid real-time market**. Progression comes through pack openings and skill-based leaderboards, creating both familiarity and fresh mechanics for fans. The **launch of its Pro version** has supercharged adoption: **1,985 unique depositors** and **$3.5M deposited** to date, driving **$5.9M in trading volume**. Beyond the numbers, Football.Fun reflects a bigger shift, the fusion of fandom, speculation, and gaming into onchain-native experiences, and shows how Base is emerging not just as a DeFi hub, but as fertile ground for viral consumer crypto apps.

![Cumulative Volume](https://dune.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fcdn.sanity.io%2Fimages%2Ffox336rh%2Fproduction%2Fdbfe6430c5085a2b9677c90b0e41ee0bdbfd9bc5-1120x649.jpg&w=3840&q=75)

[Tracking BENJI, Franklin Templeton’s Flagship RWA](https://djfc5c04.eu1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/RL+113/djFC5c04/VWkKq14QxbdfVvFWT78X511YW4gSXWJ5BzK__N8Zqh6T5nXHCW50kH_H6lZ3nHW6nh_5q3HRhfGW4msCtB4-DwGJW24RYNj2CdvhGW2ctrMC2dNBtjW60K9Mf9gm9ZLW4XBHsl8kpDmwW3F_T2t2-2SNJW7RhvdR8BHplFW2b6D0t27QnvRW3fm5D553SCYzW2t4XyC3vWbLXW1NV6P62wHp2VW7_rHXp6QP5l7VHnr5J5Mqk0XW5lPGPM22sZjlV4q3hF2S3T5WW8gSrqK8Vb0tgN6Nwb2cFNl47W5Z--bL57MLcJW3-9XX95yy8fzW1Rnb--7tyHQlW4yltbw4mbj4MW8Ljjdj4nYK81W5Q596J99x0b3W6Dc4rD6666M1W1BBPZJ7j4LN6W8y0nxl8NqGK8W7n4yqt3RnNtjVFY81k1K2H0wW5kczxC35_FwcW15G_b33zvGL5W2pZdXY6kddZdf5sDl2n04)

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

[Franklin Templeton’s](https://djfc5c04.eu1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/RL+113/djFC5c04/VWkKq14QxbdfVvFWT78X511YW4gSXWJ5BzK__N8Zqh823qn9qW7lCdLW6lZ3p6W69HRgQ6cBQc_W2kGTXY9bQ3bZN8dSB5RcHkkBW3kvP5c5R3XyKN2XMsQdKrHmpW4GMPd12ygfvLW3JQ2Rt76wMvMW2dL91D6LgYtBW8Rc6471fKdP2W8bJpJV6gRsMdW7fPxwc16pHbhW3H4WtF5VjSQQW7WLCNY2LvmXwW17v1g91qGJSGW2S69TN71yCxQW5Q3rvh6JFLpYW1Vdgkj9kdRjPW7jL69-8wv4ykW6XBMnS1FDkrtW1hN2Pk6tmybKVhdYZp3kgndFW95l55c4pMJ21W86N7r955BNFSW7xypX_55mgPPf742_1604)
 BENJI tokenized U.S. Treasury fund has become a flagship example of RWAs moving onchain, now managing **$686M AUM** across **850 investors**. While **Stellar hosts ~65% of assets**, recent expansions to Arbitrum, Base, Ethereum, Avalanche, and Polygon signal growing **multichain adoption**. The fund has already paid out more than **$50M in dividends**, maintains a steady **~4.1% yield**, and has processed over $87M in P2P transfers, showing how investors are actively using it beyond simple holding. Entropy’s dashboard captures BENJI’s scale, cross-chain flows, and investor behavior, offering a clear window into how one of TradFi’s largest institutions is driving tokenized money markets into the crypto economy.

![AUM Breakdown](https://dune.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fcdn.sanity.io%2Fimages%2Ffox336rh%2Fproduction%2Fbf0384bfefa7643e657755bb3917b3b55ce3215e-1120x687.jpg&w=3840&q=75)

[Kiln DeFi Product Growth Fueled by Wallet Integrations](https://djfc5c04.eu1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/RL+113/djFC5c04/VWkKq14QxbdfVvFWT78X511YW4gSXWJ5BzK__N8Zqh823qn9qW7lCdLW6lZ3pzW6hK84v1b3G0TW8cTzMP6gYsnSW3cxxnH1JrLG8W86m6_t4Fhk2GW5Zlgb118qQN-W3nwVRg9hqDYCW2RjlRs9j1CmVW8bxFx74NLrjfW34XvZX8s8gH9W1Ytxqq2v3g-DW7xH-LK4dT8rjW76ZB-S1KwjHxW38-mHX4l4yNbN73rQkKWG86MW28h4z-3LT38jW3y0Ggr3RhHxZN6mj68wp49MKW2WSkQ92m51HtW4mlVql1Cjl5GVHgNBH6ykX8NW5qXJL35Pnxy8W76nPHg6xBfn9Vfp3w_7bJysVN1sQh54Hv7ncf4Kg5lj04)

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

[Kiln](https://djfc5c04.eu1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/RL+113/djFC5c04/VWkKq14QxbdfVvFWT78X511YW4gSXWJ5BzK__N8Zqh823qn9qW7lCdLW6lZ3nrW8BmHJb946PN_VZYnz77jp5VcW8d8Dy65V2vZRVNXP9s5KsVHCW58sfL51-zRWHN2WjgSJzvTXcW7k6SD699jBDnW6Ztl114S5_c-W403xfx5tKntSV9f4TQ1xk1lqV_Lgj58KKyKrW95-4y922DnqLW2k92Xt45Jt-SW98wkmr2MW9fHM6fcJbfX5P-W7tDPjS2Hqf7NW22J0575GJv-ZW3N8nTX7QBryyW99FXKr3YBS90VW8w5M1989fPVTD3WJ1cwjdGN2knwjnPGjvSW2K6CKf9chzfKW7K6vrk2nBb2kf32RPK-04)
 DeFi has become one of the fastest-growing yield products of 2025, with **TVL climbing from <$1M a year ago** to $18M in April, then accelerating to $178M in July and reaching **$395M by August 22**. Growth is driven by **wallet integrations that embed stablecoin yields** directly into user flows: **Ledger Live (63% of TVL**, $250M+), **Trust Wallet (26%**, $100M+), **Safe (6%**, $24M), and most recently Bitpanda’s DeFi Wallet for 7M users. Deposits in USDC, USDT, DAI, and EURC are funneled into protocols like Aave, Compound, Morpho, Spark, and Sky, offering up to 9.9% APY in a non-custodial, SOC2-compliant setup. Kiln’s trajectory highlights how DeFi is shifting from protocol-level UX to embedded yield as a feature, with wallets and apps emerging as the primary distribution layer.

![TVL over time](https://dune.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fcdn.sanity.io%2Fimages%2Ffox336rh%2Fproduction%2Fa4c6b26014e4e914c80b051af0cbd3c1c23ee0d3-1120x673.png&w=3840&q=75)

Nothing in this newsletter constitutes financial advice.

**Always do your own research.**

Dune Digest is all about cutting through the noise and surfacing the most relevant onchain trends. If you have insights, dashboards, or data-driven stories that belong in the Digest, **drop your suggestions** [here](https://djfc5c04.eu1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/RL+113/djFC5c04/VWkKq14QxbdfVvFWT78X511YW4gSXWJ5BzK__N8Zqh785nXHCW5BWr2F6lZ3m5W32g-yd2yfWXnW4qKjrW4nkswjW4vvKHy5W4pBXW3pxnTm5HwHYgW5_TL_f3387NXW4w7PVx1--s04W8LF1Lt8KrPRWW4MWWSq2MBVz3W4WX56725mP90W8HBH6C8L84R3N1pQ2lSmpyNTW6QCCqW49fXBGW2lZwgW54GzjZW8SPKSk7XG9-1W2kx5tx73WLCsW8VY03f2d6SJRW91SrqS779XQDW4mgFMV4ZPf58N2DHMxC9trqyW7m1Pm11T6m2YW4VnlR_2VXvK2W8Pgh7Z6cQLGyW5KT1y57JR_NVW8fbG165r2gjBW4891FP5-5qBLW16rXfb1FL6p9W7wsFH_7nVmqWW7v4NZT34NZxTW113l-61kCsMPW5Mrs8M2yGGtTN1x6_3WjKcZ_W4vLWvd6MlwKgW7Ml4nK8bTQ70W3V58X981H641f1PwRFx04)
.

# How you spend credits on Dune is changing - Blog | Dune

[All posts](https://dune.com/blog)

HowyouspendcreditsonDuneischanging
==================================

We're improving how Dune credit usage works to ensure our platform is fair and enables exciting new capabilities and features.
------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

News•October 20, 2025•2 min read

![@Alsie L.](https://dune.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fcdn.sanity.io%2Fimages%2Ffox336rh%2Fproduction%2F2d4297f3e37d59932719698a65a11cfb77fe3194-673x673.jpg&w=96&q=75)

[Alsie L.](https://www.linkedin.com/in/alsieliu/)
Content Marketing Manager at Dune

![How you spend credits on Dune is changing](https://dune.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fcdn.sanity.io%2Fimages%2Ffox336rh%2Fproduction%2F13f72d10ba1dcdf4d5ecc5878055e896b4a02bd6-1200x675.webp&w=3840&q=75)

### What’s changing and why?

Historically, our query engine charged a fixed number of credits per execution, a simple approach for analysts but ultimately **unfair and limiting**: simpler queries were overcharged, complex queries undercharged, and query timeouts restricted capabilities.

As Dune adoption grows—spanning over **100 chains, complex tables, and new ways to consume data through APIs and dbt-style connectors ( to be announced) —both we and our customers need pricing that scales with real usage**.

This new engine brings that flexibility. **Your credit system remains the same, but now when you run a query, credits are spent in proportion to the consumed resources.** This means that small, simple queries will become cheaper and larger queries can run longer (better timeouts).

**Key benefits:**

*   **Usage-based** – Pay in proportion to actual consumption.
*   **Efficiency** – Incentives to write cleaner, optimized queries.
*   **Scalability** – Sustainable future support for larger workloads with longer timeouts and advanced integrations like **dbt**, **Trino REST API**, **SQL Mesh**, AI-driven workflows, and expanded connector options to come in the near future.
*   **Monthly plans**: New pricing of $75/month, up from $49/month, takes effect at your first billing cycle after October 21st.
*   **Annual plans**: New pricing of $65/month ($780/year), up from $45/month, takes effect at your first annual renewal after October 21st.
*   **Review your usage.** Check your query volume and costs to understand where you stand before the change takes place.
*   **Optimize your queries.** Efficient queries save credits and run faster. See [here](https://docs.dune.com/query-engine/writing-efficient-queries)
     for tips.
*   **Pick the plan that fits.** If you anticipate heavy usage or notice overages, please contact our sales team at [dune.com/enterprise](http://dune.com/enterprise)
     to discuss the best plan for your needs. Enterprise clients receive **favorable per-credit pricing and customized support**.
*   **Cap your query costs.** Use our [new feature](https://app.arcade.software/share/C60r4u7ESOp5RXRuzbSN)
     to cap the amount of credits you’re willing to spend on a query.
*   **Set overage limits.** Configure your overage spending limits to control costs. Learn how to set this up [here.](https://app.arcade.software/share/so8QGM4H4MU0OWRWhNe9)
    

**Questions?**

Explore the documentation page [here](https://docs.dune.com/learning/how-tos/credit-system)
 for more information and FAQ.

Have questions or need additional support?  
  
Contact us: [\[email protected\]](https://dune.com/cdn-cgi/l/email-protection)

# Dune Digest 026 - Blog | Dune

[All posts](https://dune.com/blog)

DuneDigest026
=============

Arbitrum DRIP, Ondo GM + GLXY, Limitless, $WLFI, and Pokémon RWAs
-----------------------------------------------------------------

News•September 6, 2025•4 min read

![@Filippo Armani](https://dune.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fcdn.sanity.io%2Fimages%2Ffox336rh%2Fproduction%2Ff9dd54cabfaa63ae0dda792b5072e44d5b9b9971-800x800.jpg&w=96&q=75)

[Filippo Armani](https://www.linkedin.com/in/filarm/)
Data Content Creator at Dune

![Dune Digest 026](https://dune.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fcdn.sanity.io%2Fimages%2Ffox336rh%2Fproduction%2Fe8e4c587f3f2f8c10e1012495953e84fc0dc7872-1200x675.webp&w=3840&q=75)

[Arbitrum Launches DRIP for Targeted DeFi Incentives](https://djfc5c04.eu1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/RL+113/djFC5c04/MX1rCpYDnFpVRv_976TcgDZVyCbyQ5C6L46N8tN9Dx3qn9qW95jsWP6lZ3mGW6wVfwv1lwFVSW2GDTp82L2wR1W1bG1cT1q-GMNW1yFHhZ9bqQLmW8pfchR7XzMN9W7wzvrn7cvxjmW4Fwf978PgtN8W5c4L5p6yNNg7W6nQGb55-BB5tW51k04f5L7JL6W62Lfkp2wnjN3W4FC8hf5SHZwbW2GTMMP4HsFK8W3Kd1LD5lRHmmW21XnKR8nVbmfW1g6srN5DhDtmW6wtntK3Q9W4QW7QVkbW6Ssz04W7V5nPD51NH9rW3QWZzF34DNjwW2-xBGY9hMwngW1Cz1Rn3b6LRcW8kPVmq6TSvlmW7Z7RXD28zp5mW4-VHRz8TdqJKW7FQMJ77NPgm6W85SfvR4G3wvPW5-_h_K8flHxHW34LfVL5NbQC8W4qD8Dv6FmnBgf54VSrb04)

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Arbitrum’s DRIP (DeFi Renaissance Incentive Program), launched Sept 3rd, is a four-season, ~$40M (80M ARB), protocol-agnostic, asset-focused incentive scheme that **rewards measurable actions rather than raw TVL**. **Season One targets leverage looping across lending markets**: users earn ARB based on time-weighted average borrows of eligible assets over 10 bi-weekly epochs. Unlike “spray-and-pray” protocol grants, **DRIP is designed for deeper liquidity, stronger composability, and stickier TVL**. Early data shows positive momentum: **total market size** across participating protocols (Aave, Morpho, Fluid, Euler, Dolomite, Silo) edged up **from $2.57B pre-program to $2.73B**, with growth driven largely by USD pools showing strong cost effectiveness. Beyond market caps and volumes, _DRIP is already connecting the dots between asset types, protocols, and liquidity_. The campaign has also catalyzed **new token launches on Arbitrum**: **syrupUSDC** (Maple’s loans-backed stable), **RLP** (Resolv’s leveraged, delta-neutral first-loss token), and **thBILL** (Theo’s low-risk RWA bill token), quickly reaching $9M, $5M and $4.3M market cap respectively. Meanwhile, **sUSDS** has seen the fastest breakout, climbing from $4M to $19M market cap. Designed by Entropy Advisors and powered by Merkl, **DRIP also provides full transparency via Entropy’s Dune dashboards**, letting anyone track allocations, efficiency, and outcomes in real time.

![DRIP Season 1 _ Protocols Arbitrum Total Market Size](https://dune.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fcdn.sanity.io%2Fimages%2Ffox336rh%2Fproduction%2F1286e792088dbfadd126d105ae54d1ac6c3f0683-1120x701.jpg&w=3840&q=75)

[Ondo GM and GLXY Push Tokenized Stocks Forward](https://djfc5c04.eu1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/RL+113/djFC5c04/MX1rCpYDnFpVRv_976TcgDZVyCbyQ5C6L46N8tN9CY3qn9qW7Y8-PT6lZ3nqVg_DZY1M93cKW4CfHCT7f4LgCMNpB_SH2LzlW2Fgbfq4kSnzbN4HzQSNP4ldwVRxq2R35z-d4W7_BRHX3rBGPvW1MT0dR9g82k1W8vl3St4ffgRrW8mjwxF9l_wGRW9hvgbD3DR6Y5N72dKC5NrjP8N65c7T0CkVPrW7pz51d6tsDL9N983qjXVW37CW6z3BRy2NPCrNM8RHlDV0lTRN5t5X-YgjWpJW6pV94h54nv4QW1QqsXp5dV-5rW3yfDq37NVXJ9W3Cf-pY8plm_2W2d_1hC7v4HRCW7CBbZ375NTXrW1jwp8x50ywcHW5kl86H4MzYVyf3C2_PC04)

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

The tokenization of stocks is accelerating the fusion of traditional finance and blockchain, offering 24/7 trading, fractional ownership, and DeFi composability while navigating regulatory guardrails. On Sept 3, 2025, **Ondo launched** [Global Markets](https://djfc5c04.eu1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/RL+113/djFC5c04/MX1rCpYDnFpVRv_976TcgDZVyCbyQ5C6L46N8tN9Dd3qn9qW8wLKSR6lZ3pzW18KR-k28lYdFW1JjSJC8KvKVWW49hyq57lCF_hW4fjlvS1dZDNMW6Cx-Xf4Hy_xrW6vBF-J5ZkkqZW8ykynq1fMv7HW5dT50_4W8ScRW4fttqp4SVnbYW4gvhjB8fT5B7W2h-F2_93WrgFW5rM1Ld5VcsFHW6FSc-98zRpWLW4t0XLQ81V85jW7ZqT0Z4ZpsKWW81j0Rq3x1nQfW8Fw_h56xlswxW1X2r5X7n7xHYMG2p8CzD_6xW2zGGLk3x368nW8wjFnn8387k3W642yHg3gss0sW5L_c4m3x3VKgVT4wcq2wntPtW36zSHy7sDf3GN8X4L3m9hs9DN8h3KGdflX3hN6vfFkt4RpLtf2DlHRM04)
 (GM), using “Directive Tokenization” (transfer-restricted tokens as instructions to a regulated broker-dealer) to bring 100+ U.S. stocks and ETFs onchain with direct exchange liquidity, no wrappers or SPVs. The following day, **Galaxy Digital**, in partnership with **Superstate**, [directly tokenized](https://djfc5c04.eu1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/RL+113/djFC5c04/MX1rCpYDnFpVRv_976TcgDZVyCbyQ5C6L46N8tN9Dd3qn9qW8wLKSR6lZ3pJW4-H8Gl3rTHyPV32npH6ZLv3gVljfP-3pFMFxW2Qw8qF6sFCqBW7bjYts7PsrRvW7pl8GY4QB-hgW2Sd7nR1sS0tCN6d7NnRJwLm8W13VXjb3tV_mVW5JltlZ8rTKPrN2s7Z-cF4tJJW2Jz_TZ1XJvZrW28z9sn4DTQDGW85kZNZ7--fMRW1SNCqw5wg-_-W4tfYRN9h-M2rW4Ff3LW6_l5c-W3Fk-xD1TqphpW6pPWhL6k6HF2W5tYtCV7rMjh3W6FsGHt17bnrdW9fzht57Lk74tMy920--ysF2VxPG9D3Brl4XW7ngtv7336C5QVSXvQw8zfBRNW3yx-4c66p_1DW5hCXJv5GkFskf87C9mb04)
 its own Nasdaq-listed Class A common stock (GLXY) on Solana, delivering SEC-registered shares with full legal and economic rights, self-custody, and bilateral transfers among allowlisted holders, distinct from synthetic or wrapped assets /SPVs by ensuring direct ownership and compliance. **Ondo GM’s TVL has already surpassed $63M**, with **ETFs like SPY and IVV leading at ~56%**. Viewed through the risk–yield curve, these launches mark the next step after treasuries and private credit, shifting from low-volatility yield instruments to higher-risk and higher-yield assets and from synthetic exposure to regulated, direct ownership.

![TVL (2)-2](https://dune.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fcdn.sanity.io%2Fimages%2Ffox336rh%2Fproduction%2F1e3c5ec69264a6346f66f0c08dd6e0072c7d7a5e-1120x645.jpg&w=3840&q=75)

[Onchain Forecasting Heats Up with Limitless](https://djfc5c04.eu1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/RL+113/djFC5c04/MX1rCpYDnFpVRv_976TcgDZVyCbyQ5C6L46N8tN9CY3qn9qW7Y8-PT6lZ3n9VJ7LV63h3nv2W4vNyR-9czGWFW400hYx5ZBvgMW44RgXn4WRJ-XW3d2Gk23DGZPhW93CW75185J99VG8rH0428-X4W17nBwB8FltTNW1mSX3b59yr-vW8dpb_M4B0815W5jXg955TMLJqVp51pT6y-sf5W2Fl8nS6WRBccW6kNTYs8YSwzLW2QXCDx1wNr6wW8mkCG17fG7xZW7L-QZ-61dFYsW30Rkv_2MhnpwW15Kx-88_8TgTW3lHBg71Z6nF0W6f5MqH9f1_GPW2bfn6C61w_xMW4pQsly3hTP5mW7m6qYd5wWst0V3xyPr1Y1hZrW3yghWx3ZKKj3f3zVLnH04)

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Limitless, a decentralized prediction market on Base, has reached **$297.7M in lifetime volume**, with **~97% coming from its v1 AMM** ($289.9M) and $7.73M from its v2 central limit order book (CLOB). **August was its strongest month** yet with **2,172 monthly active traders** and **99,216 trades**, while **cumulative fees total $104.5K**. Notably, the v2 CLOB is accelerating, monthly volume climbed from $0.46M (Feb) to $2.47M (Aug), with $0.48M so far in September, on the back of an order-book UX, real-time expiries, and permissionless, user-created markets spanning crypto, stocks, and events. The surge follows a $4M round (Coinbase Ventures; Arthur Hayes advising) and lands just as **Polymarket secured U.S. clearance**, setting up sharper competition and strong mainstream tailwinds for onchain forecasting.

![Limitless v2 monthly volume](https://dune.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fcdn.sanity.io%2Fimages%2Ffox336rh%2Fproduction%2F0fe6d8b2ac0a3e40fe4d995cebe45517355b7c3a-1120x686.jpg&w=3840&q=75)

[Trump Moves Beyond Meme Tokens](https://djfc5c04.eu1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/RL+113/djFC5c04/MX1rCpYDnFpVRv_976TcgDZVyCbyQ5C6L46N8tN9CF3qn9qW7lCdLW6lZ3mNW3hZ9Vb1yymklW5gS2mH2xJ-LJW2_pvRR251GXvW7xHk3x7MSbrcW6x4rBQ4RvxxHW76XCqM7mS08jW7CKXxs2QHpVkW5HpgBD7n5vRCW4sPp426QtF8BW6LX6Tn2XW6w9W5zzP1c1kzfKtN2_Qkf5pZzlmW1ljZm71nqJg2W61kLgm1lR-F7W60gW0V4bVtjgW5gtyWL3pjSgXW7rqwlD781grDW7ZKMT46tFq30VFQK9p53z7QrW3VdLNb2Bpz6qW7cHGMj6ThfJjW7rvxL31h7fShV6GSBx7DzjMhW3SbbVQ1Zn_3gf6Vys8804)

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

World Liberty Financial (WLFI) officially debuted for public trading on September 1, surpassing **$260M in DEX volume on its first day**. While trading has since slowed to around $330M cumulative volume, the trend is one of accumulation, as most trades skew toward “buy” rather than “sell.” WLFI now shows a $19.5B FDV, nearly 100B WLFI circulating, and 76K+ holders in its first week. **Distribution**, however, **remains highly concentrated**, with the top five addresses holding more than 70% of supply. More than 85K addresses received the initial USD1 airdrop (~$4M distributed), and WLFI also burned 47M tokens in early operations. Its lockbox holds 20.9B WLFI, with a planned 4.18B unlock this month. WLFI governs the ecosystem and its flagship **USD1 stablecoin, whose supply has climbed from $2.1B to $2.6B in August**, following expansions to Solana and Tron. That growth has made USD1 the sixth-largest stablecoin by supply, backed by fiat reserves and Treasuries for payments, lending, and cross-chain DeFi. Taken together, WLFI and USD1 signal that Trump’s involvement in crypto is moving beyond meme tokens toward more structured, institutional-style products.

![png (5)-2](https://dune.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fcdn.sanity.io%2Fimages%2Ffox336rh%2Fproduction%2Fb6d75d4d69fbd8cd89b34aed101ce57982267fb2-1120x700.jpg&w=3840&q=75)

[Pokémon RWAs on Solana](https://djfc5c04.eu1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/RL+113/djFC5c04/MX1rCpYDnFpVRv_976TcgDZVyCbyQ5C6L46N8tN9CY3qn9qW7Y8-PT6lZ3nSW4Gflrt59G2ftW3jz4pC4-YpBjW7p4WPT5R_1mbW7YNmDl70f4j7W4w5mKR8RJy8yW8tx8N15zQCPLW3vq2BR7YdXKDW3sqkH_8Gt_NxW8c1bLS5X2hs2W5ySD5l4M1yP9W8j8sF65H8qK8W1YBR8n3_6ZZtW1TXqSJ3bLSYzW5-2LK15jh69fW4WqT5j4xPsghVQsnVQ6_CtdmW3Gn-X16nFJq3W1klxs32hCmfgW8snzRn1GlnwhW8bpN069bBXJ7V9fTdm6kRwDbW7WFjH677qBt9W8pmBz51v5-QRW8bqcd490zpHKW1v11Kh4jPBPyV2FDTW25wXcJf2qpyBb04)

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

On Solana, Pokémon TCG RWAs turn physical cards into redeemable, tradable assets with 24/7 markets, instant resells, vaulting, and DeFi hooks. As of early September, the niche **totals about $165M in volume across three platforms**: **Collector Crypt**Collector Crypt_Collector Crypt_ ($153.1M volume; $9.97M gross revenue; $81.1M gacha; 4,358 gacha users), **Phygitals**Phygitals_Phygitals_ ($11.39M; $1.56M gross revenue; 8,328 gacha users), and **Emporium** Emporium _Emporium_ ($0.81M; $78K gross revenue). For comparison, **Polygon-based Courtyard,** Courtyard, _Courtyard,_ a category pioneer, shows **larger, longer-run scale with $419M total volume**, **$53M gross revenue**, **$243M spent on gacha**, and **269K unique gacha users**. Beyond classic RWAs like treasuries and private credit, tokenization is pulling more exotic culture assets on-chain because it boosts accessibility (fractional, global), efficiency (instant settlement, 24/7 liquidity), and composability (lending). Real revenue, community buzz, and “Polymarket-moment” expectations make tokenized cards a retail-friendly gateway in Solana’s growing RWA stack. Wen PSA-10 Charizard on Aave?

![TCG Weekly Volume (1)](https://dune.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fcdn.sanity.io%2Fimages%2Ffox336rh%2Fproduction%2F05ccb38c40e832e89f461d9382ecebfe2992b285-1120x691.jpg&w=3840&q=75)

# Dune Digest 027 - Blog | Dune

[All posts](https://dune.com/blog)

DuneDigest027
=============

USDH Race, Ethena, Aave on Linea, LINEA Airdrop, Morpho
-------------------------------------------------------

News•September 13, 2025•4 min read

![@Filippo Armani](https://dune.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fcdn.sanity.io%2Fimages%2Ffox336rh%2Fproduction%2Ff9dd54cabfaa63ae0dda792b5072e44d5b9b9971-800x800.jpg&w=96&q=75)

[Filippo Armani](https://www.linkedin.com/in/filarm/)
Data Content Creator at Dune

![Dune Digest 027](https://dune.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fcdn.sanity.io%2Fimages%2Ffox336rh%2Fproduction%2F835fd15a7637743a4bfdc4ed9580ba9e3855ec2a-1200x675.webp&w=3840&q=75)

[The Great USDH Race](https://djfc5c04.eu1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/RL+113/djFC5c04/VVyMG26nJdSyW1GTSXB22-7YNW3Bmyl95CpL71N1vWRsz3qn9qW7Y8-PT6lZ3psW6qJDRd6FXxLBW97QF-L84dhjZW4-PdDf8hbLY9W3krlbC23h0nLW8v35Sp8LKGztW1gX4Zg53pgsKW7LM-q31LHfvRN1Xqg-jYfYFZW5dHXjD913CJlN2Nm728K8ztWVnp6B839t3BcW6QtsnY7nnLTNV96g6N1qZCz8VWLLtV3-Z4YpW3LByR46jCDtbW5rkBkh25SxPmW7mPlhb3Klc35W4FBMy_5CZTv2W2NMJ_Q9lNMjCW4cKjWn3LwgpYW2Js4sb3C-CZmW4b5XBm6pDjpJVGhbBc1W0-rCW3BFbdc3N12z6W8K6fWs4WxhpWW60RSDT5bSz85f5Dvlvx04)

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

USDH is Hyperliquid’s proposed native stablecoin, aiming to capture its **$6B+ stablecoin market**, 95% of which is held in **USDC (~$5.7B)**, and shift liquidity toward a protocol-owned, decentralized alternative. Fully GENIUS Act and MiCA compliant, it **redirects 95–100% of reserve yields back to the community** via HYPE buybacks, making validator votes less about issuer revenue and more about long-term ecosystem strategic alignment. Proposals closed Sept 10, validator declarations Sept 11, and the on-chain vote runs on Sept 14, with a two-thirds supermajority required and the Foundation abstaining. Bids came from **Native Markets** (compliance, yield sharing, ecosystem integrations), **Paxos** (95% yield sharing, dual-chain deployment), the **Agora/AUSD consortium** (100% yield, State Street custody, LayerZero interoperability), **Frax** (frxUSD-backed DeFi model), **Stripe/Bridge** (fiat rails, but criticized for conflicts), and **Ethena**, which withdrew Sept 12 after concerns about “nativeness.” As of Sept 12, **Native Markets** leads with ~70% validator support, followed by Paxos (~17%). Beyond Hyperliquid, the outcome could set a precedent for protocol-aligned, yield-bearing stablecoins that **challenge centralized issuers like USDC** and mark a shift in who captures stablecoin yields.

![TVL_ USDC](https://dune.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fcdn.sanity.io%2Fimages%2Ffox336rh%2Fproduction%2Fd9c54391db638c172b578e215b94e5580669ca0d-1120x701.jpg&w=3840&q=75)

[Ethena Powers Ahead](https://djfc5c04.eu1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/RL+113/djFC5c04/VVyMG26nJdSyW1GTSXB22-7YNW3Bmyl95CpL71N1vWRsz3qn9qW7Y8-PT6lZ3ktW8c0Xsq8StTY3W5wHWcG7YfytCMGY-c6mx20zW81whKQ8nhh2cW1t_KPb5wBqBMW3W2WBy59YJLqVtWDWk16VpNfW1WNsN45j4V0SN7YVhHtrVXtKW57C7sL7CY7r2W7GrKJX81HcyHW4XrPGz4c33-9W231_Qt4PSGXcN7ZFG9Ncww8HW25gC-32M4sZGW3cVWNg3bZth_VHxHQP547NySW5QHTGr8MLrlYW3-N2cq43T0LLW5YbvSW5zTyslW3VVLH45Y7DQ-W5rHZqx75gbHPW6YgVRj8gjgGsW2CWXMq21MC3hW8HTRzb55wDxLW4zmsV-7Lm1NXf70-6ss04)

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Ethena Labs strengthened its position as a DeFi powerhouse this week through a series of moves underscoring its multi-layered value accrual strategy. The highlight was **Binance’s listing of USDe on Sept 9**, which pushed **supply above $13B** and **paved the way for** **Ethena’s long-awaited fee switch**, potentially unlocking up to $500M in ENA buybacks from protocol revenues and reinforcing its hedged-yield flywheel. Momentum continued as **StablecoinX raised another $530M**, bringing total PIPE financing to $895M and targeting over 3B ENA. The raise funds a **$310M buyback over 6–8 weeks**, which, together with the first PIPE, brings nearly 20% of supply under StablecoinX’s treasury strategy, tightening alignment while expanding institutional access. Meanwhile, **Mega Matrix filed a $2B shelf registration to purchase ENA**, and Ethena deepened its reach with **MegaETH’s launch of USDm**, a native stablecoin built on Ethena’s stack and backed initially by BlackRock’s BUIDL tokenized Treasuries via Securitize. Finally, **Ethena joined and then withdrew from the Hyperliquid USDH race**, keeping focus on its core primitives. Collectively, these moves elevate Ethena to the third-largest dollar issuer in crypto and showcase how protocol-aligned stablecoins can shift yield back to communities, deepen institutional integration, and challenge centralized models.

![Chart (4)-3](https://dune.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fcdn.sanity.io%2Fimages%2Ffox336rh%2Fproduction%2Fbfeecefe591801c36a8cf65307f83d11d08cf4c7-1120x591.jpg&w=3840&q=75)

[Aave on Linea Grows 73x in 6 Weeks](https://djfc5c04.eu1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/RL+113/djFC5c04/VVyMG26nJdSyW1GTSXB22-7YNW3Bmyl95CpL71N1vWRsT3qn9qW8wLKSR6lZ3l8W6plnM89cnQ9yVj-y_y5tTZ_NW9c36DX5g3DZ0W3PFFRb70QB6PW5NWZ_68HC2nwN504kMPDNw6lW5pFWj3286MJ8W1YvpdM98dGYFW5MX7_87h1SktVTy8hR7YBmVBN2BhVsRfBzP6W12ymHl2FNZkfW7FN7v49kRjBNW47vr_j1c30WCW3T3NRy3B-84ZW6nhX0H19XTk6W6gg9fz7x8YCLW9d71dX7tPfZzW6BTM7S4Bg7HJW41hjWf2VVgCvVF4fVb3BwGTLW4T8zgW8shWGJW7bw2vs2c8vskN1G9qCWsvszmW2kn4y_7mfqtnW2YX-DR41htJxW8HY3-y5HZphHW5DdpnB3YW9dxf1z9XkT04)

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Aave’s deployment on Linea has seen explosive traction, **surging from $26M TVL in early August** to **$739M by Sept 1**, and further **to $1.91B by Sept 11** —a **73x increase** fueled by the new Linea Ignition program. Launched publicly on Sept 2 after a private beta, this 10-week initiative distributes 1B LINEA tokens from the ecosystem fund to drive DeFi adoption, with rewards funneled to major protocols like Aave, Euler, and Etherex. For Aave specifically, incentives target all WETH, USDC, and USDT lending pools on Aave V3. Rewards factor in **time-weighted TVL shares** and add **adaptive boosts to under-utilized pools**, ensuring steady inflows and balanced liquidity. This rapid uptake highlights Linea’s growing importance in Aave’s multi-chain strategy. With the program pushing Aave’s Linea deployment past the billion-dollar mark, it has also helped propel **Aave’s total market size to nearly $70B**, almost doubling in the past three months.

![Aave _ Total Market Size by Blockchain](https://dune.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fcdn.sanity.io%2Fimages%2Ffox336rh%2Fproduction%2Fb845b411a8496e1bd0cd88c2c7de72fada34cf84-1120x701.jpg&w=3840&q=75)

[LINEA $200M+ Airdrop Goes Live](https://djfc5c04.eu1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/RL+113/djFC5c04/VVyMG26nJdSyW1GTSXB22-7YNW3Bmyl95CpL71N1vWRsz3qn9qW7Y8-PT6lZ3l7W6HKX7x8kKzv7W53hy6q4n4YWZW5TJwD165J3gnW3KTK671zLZXdMWfm50KLxZqW7wTWVR7vRYNlW73q0by4hF2d6N7WFWyH9hqkDF551LgL1qxGW8wPrjs86gf6CW8kxDB56SRqrdN1k_tVLyWBL2W7YFNvr1hzVMlW1m_nv16hVVjcW6N3t7W2lFGKdW2sQRDl20WVH0W2rSs3h4v5PY9N9fYqqN31JxBW8kzZd-3d8Fq8W3LbtcW7g2k62W38gY1R4ddQWQW4CVQTG906dPQW8Ck5hM3kvnvmW2wl31n6q_KVtW4sc9NF95vskgW4P6yhD6c6_jRf8PdYdW04)

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Staying on Linea, the highly anticipated **LINEA token generation event and** [airdrop](https://djfc5c04.eu1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/RL+113/djFC5c04/VVyMG26nJdSyW1GTSXB22-7YNW3Bmyl95CpL71N1vWRsz3qn9qW7Y8-PT6lZ3lBW80T1Kf8G4RN7W3QM0L38-9rzkW1zC8GX202BZxW18g47n2vb_20W75lVXt4hZMcNW4Qgvxy1v6PbjW6Wy52m8J5BV3W3HRCD56FVVKrW9577bF4_TjPcW3Nltq32VBfMlN7PyrwSLVrqCV4g6f03kL119W1tc3cT1nWNc2W8ctxlc7KyxRxVdKGBP27T8mCW90hllc86b-4PW7BGzc58dp3pQN4_nZYWgbvnHW2DLZXj4wM8XWW49GDDl7Dhp9LW5clqKX7WdY25N64Nqnj81FkvW2D0Wp51Tr5X1W6pxjMh3jGMn5W8lKWN82bqVWGN7DyNv1r4HNXds1xcK04)
 went live on September 10, distributing **9.36 billion tokens to 749,663 eligible wallets based on LXP** (onchain activity) and LXP-L (liquidity participation). By September 12, **more than 520,000 wallets had claimed over 82%** of the airdrop supply—around 7.7 billion LINEA—**representing roughly $180 million claimed out of a total $218 million** at current prices. **Distribution has been broad and concentrated in the middle tiers**, with half of the supply now held by roughly 59,000 wallets, while the top 100 addresses account for just under 11%. The claim window remains open until December 9, after which unclaimed tokens will return to the Linea Consortium’s Ecosystem Fund. Beyond immediate price action, the launch of LINEA stands as one of the most significant L2 token events since OP and ARB, with Linea positioning the token as “silver to ETH’s gold” and a critical instrument to scale Ethereum into its second decade.

![Chart (3)-Sep-12-2025-12-34-48-9914-PM](https://dune.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fcdn.sanity.io%2Fimages%2Ffox336rh%2Fproduction%2F920f7496393c6d0fad5194c6f50e88d86f7ac0d9-1120x653.jpg&w=3840&q=75)

[Morpho Hits $12B Deposits, World Chain Drives Users Growth](https://djfc5c04.eu1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/RL+113/djFC5c04/VVyMG26nJdSyW1GTSXB22-7YNW3Bmyl95CpL71N1vWRsz3qn9qW7Y8-PT6lZ3mSVbxf9y6c4cKHW3fqgXx5wRJPQW1MCFSJ9gKhYwW875PRG2qlnzcW3HPdXn7X7YGPW5LlfRc1mt8RjW2sGZTv9k7QDkW30RyRf6P5LXyW44gDJR7Nmg7RN9hLyZnVJpHMW7FVS8v1dp5j7W2WK6n823qfD1W1tHWvM7fKnpWW6CNKMf2MB70xW227myL3kQRYFW1gK3Fs53VJh7N5l4C63fF16hW8sQl-w76b9cYW4wNXHX3rXsvlW4jmzCT3d1ZLxW32NcZz1mykdZN2yRvf2VsPlNW4clTBp3Yhs2SMtp6XhZQ4pYN29hfWtBLb4bN8_Lr8slL7xnf6c3gFH04)

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Morpho crossed a new milestone this week, **surpassing $12B in deposits** with top three chains being Ethereum (62% ), Base (22%), and HyperEVM (5% ), and a rapidly growing share on **Arbitrum**, where **deposits surged 3,000% in the past 30 days** thanks to the Drip campaign. **User adoption has been explosive on World Chain**, where Morpho launched its Mini App in April: **the chain now counts 419K users**, making up the **majority of Morpho’s 739K total users**, with 125K weekly actives compared to 13K on Base, the second-largest. Meanwhile, **curation fees hit an all-time high of $370K in the first week of September,** underscoring the growing role of vault curation in balancing borrower demand, depositor yields, and risk management. Morpho’s integration as a Mini App in the World ecosystem has made it seamlessly accessible to a growing base of verified humans and high-quality users, turning distribution into a structural advantage.

![Chart (5)-4](https://dune.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fcdn.sanity.io%2Fimages%2Ffox336rh%2Fproduction%2F512aa6f0c9f8c9d3dc850e7496da6c95aa919365-1120x659.jpg&w=3840&q=75)

Nothing in this newsletter constitutes financial advice.

**Always do your own research.**

Dune Digest is all about cutting through the noise and surfacing the most relevant onchain trends. If you have insights, dashboards, or data-driven stories that belong in the Digest, **drop your suggestions** [here](https://djfc5c04.eu1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/RL+113/djFC5c04/VVyMG26nJdSyW1GTSXB22-7YNW3Bmyl95CpL71N1vWRrn5nXHCW5BWr2F6lZ3nmW1QbyQ75-lVbsW8GSKky1tbYntW5nmjt71G_m8dW21Kz_Q7fS7MLW5vJ0md6Z-8n2W65zrWX6--fY5W4_QtD458155HDqzBtXMdCtW5jXMh42g2jTXW15R__T1__DP5W3SY91833_RdLW5NNNDv39R50GMDxnmjMZ8VVN2s5-CBSMjFMW75Mwxb7BMt_2W33xs7w2vlSGRW1b-Hwn7DZzgvW87WcZJ2HGGpBW1dhQxF5xtKvTW4lchsq9cCnykW4Zl6Jp1BRjtdW4xtxW78KBlttW1j2ftT4kZF_ZW6grZz08bj2m9W4ZCBXF3PJq8qVsjw2R4Rrpn4W64l7dH2mSC2tW7-LN4b1ql01PW5HDXWD39rqp2Vd0q_m9ltpDLW8Q8xHW3MTx2yW636Zr97cThrNW6ZG-9T2FFy83W5P64pn8jqG6-f4-cSM-04)
.

# Beyond Unique Addresses: Measuring User Value Across Blockchains - Blog | Dune

[All posts](https://dune.com/blog)

BeyondUniqueAddresses:MeasuringUserValueAcrossBlockchains
=========================================================

Tim Conard, Co-founder at Slice Analytics, explores innovative ways to measure user value beyond unique addresses across blockchains in this insightful #DuneCon2024 session.
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Guide•December 3, 2024•1 min read

![@Alsie L.](https://dune.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fcdn.sanity.io%2Fimages%2Ffox336rh%2Fproduction%2F2d4297f3e37d59932719698a65a11cfb77fe3194-673x673.jpg&w=96&q=75)

[Alsie L.](https://www.linkedin.com/in/alsieliu/)
Content Marketing Manager at Dune

At **#DuneCon2024**, Tim Conard, Co-founder of Slice Analytics, unveiled innovative approaches to measuring user value on blockchains, addressing the flaws of active address metrics.

Conard explained how active addresses often misrepresent growth by equating one address to one user, distorting insights and leading to poor decisions. He introduced alternative metrics like address segmentation by transaction value and a quality scoring system that evaluates user behavior across multiple chains. Case studies, including Friend.tech and Base Network, demonstrated how these methods reveal meaningful trends while filtering noise.

Conard emphasized the need for analysts to adapt as blockchain ecosystems grow and AI introduces new activity patterns, urging the use of smarter models to deliver actionable insights. _“Improper metrics lead to improper decisions—let’s aim higher.”_

‍

# Dune Index: Tracking Real Blockchain Adoption - Blog | Dune

[All posts](https://dune.com/blog)

DuneIndex:TrackingRealBlockchainAdoption
========================================

What's really going on with the blockchain industry?
----------------------------------------------------

Research•January 31, 2025•4 min read

data

learn

![@Hannah Curtis](https://dune.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fcdn.sanity.io%2Fimages%2Ffox336rh%2Fproduction%2F48cec8c74f1b53bfed00ca9f55064be381c45d46-192x192.jpg&w=96&q=75)

[Hannah Curtis](https://www.linkedin.com/in/hannahcurtis/)
Director of Product at Dune

![Dune Index: Tracking Real Blockchain Adoption](https://dune.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fcdn.sanity.io%2Fimages%2Ffox336rh%2Fproduction%2F63b1e37a7f04e9c41d0aa2be12d9607047a18cf5-1200x675.webp&w=3840&q=75)

The [Dune Index](https://dune.com/metrics)
 is the only metric that accurately tracks real blockchain industry adoption. While many rely on metrics like **Price** and **Total Value Locked (TVL)** to approximate adoption, these fail to capture actual on-chain activity. Other methods attempt to track adoption using several disparate metrics, which are difficult to interpret collectively. Additionally, naive calculations—such as simple address counts and gross transaction volumes—often introduce noise, making them unreliable indicators of adoption.

How the Dune Index Solves These Issues
--------------------------------------

The **Dune Index** addresses these shortcomings by combining fundamental adoption metrics into a single, unified index. This enables the industry to track **real activity movements** and interpret price fluctuations within this context. Furthermore, the index spans multiple blockchains, providing insights into **blockchain adoption as a whole**. This cross-chain analysis allows for better comparisons and tracking of trends as various blockchains grow and decline over time.

Key Insights from the Dune Index
--------------------------------

1.  **Adoption in the Latest Bull Run**  
    The latest bull run has driven adoption levels back to previous highs. The Dune Index hit a **weekly average high of 88 in mid-November 2024**, comparable to **87 in mid-November 2021** and **81 in May 2021**.
2.  **Contextualizing Asset Prices**  
    The index serves as a useful **sense check** for volatile asset prices. As prices rise, it helps determine whether adoption is increasing in tandem. It also provides historical comparisons to assess whether prices are justified by actual usage.  
    *   **Example: Solana (SOL)**  
        While SOL’s price is currently at the same level as in 2021, **adoption has far exceeded previous levels**. This suggests that Solana’s current valuation is more reflective of real-world activity than during its last boom, reinforcing positive community sentiment.
3.  **Example: Bitcoin (BTC)**  
    Bitcoin, on the other hand, is priced significantly **above previous peaks** while adoption remains **similar to past highs**. This likely reflects Bitcoin’s growing role as a **store of value** rather than a **medium of exchange**. However, since blockchain adoption and price movements are correlated, tracking adoption trends could offer useful insights.
4.  **Understanding Blockchain Growth and Market Share**  
    With an increasing number of blockchains, the **Dune Index** provides essential context for comparing their size and growth. By evaluating each chain’s contribution to overall adoption, we gain a clearer picture of their impact.  
    

**Top Blockchains by Adoption** ‍

\- The **leading chains** on the index are **Solana, Tron, Ethereum, and Bitcoin**.

![__wf_reserved_inherit](https://dune.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fcdn.sanity.io%2Fimages%2Ffox336rh%2Fproduction%2F8711aae201a0f657264cf4ba6f2201118f1f18aa-2046x646.png&w=3840&q=75)

**\- Mid-tier contributors** include **BNB Chain, Base, Polygon, and Arbitrum**, each representing **1%–5%** of the total index.

![__wf_reserved_inherit](https://dune.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fcdn.sanity.io%2Fimages%2Ffox336rh%2Fproduction%2F50f67651a2e6b002fbae84d7a66700f56d1e5b3a-2036x572.png&w=3840&q=75)

**\- Emerging and growing blockchains** include **OP Mainnet, Avalanche-c, Ronin,** and **Mantle** which are currently on an upward trajectory.

> “
> 
> “The Dune Index is one of the most important indices we have been monitoring.Taking a holistic approach to measure real usage and economic significance of a blockchain ecosystem, it provides an objective, normalized comparison across leading blockchains. Being fully verifiable on-chain, it will allow Ronin’s ascendance in the overall blockchain landscape to be seen transparently.” Bailey Tan, Head of Ronin Ecosystem.

Methodology: How the Dune Index Works
-------------------------------------

### **1\. Fees:** View more details [here](https://docs.dune.com/data-catalog/dune-index/gas-fees)
.

### 2\. Transfers: Tracking Real On-Chain Movement

Many transactions involve multiple transfers and participants due to complex financial maneuvers. A party may send and receive funds multiple times within a transaction, making **gross transfer values misleading**. Instead, we calculate **net value transferred**, ensuring a more accurate picture of real economic activity.

*   **Solana-Specific Adjustments**  
    Unlike EVM chains, where complex maneuvers occur within a single transaction, Solana users often spread actions across multiple transactions. Since **Solana transactions are cheap and have a data size limit**, we **calculate net transfers per day** rather than per transaction to avoid overestimating activity.  
    
*   **UTXO Blockchains (Bitcoin, Litecoin, etc.)**  
    UTXO-based chains include “change” outputs, where unspent funds are sent back to the sender. Our method naturally **nets out change** from the calculation, reducing inflation of transfer values. However, detecting change addresses is not always possible, meaning our UTXO transfer values may be slightly overcounted. Despite this, our approach eliminates **80% of gross transfer value**, providing a more precise measure of real adoption.  
    
*   **Non-Fungible Tokens (NFTs)**  
    We do not net out NFT transfers as they represent distinct, non-fungible assets.  
    
*   **Identifying Unique Parties**  
    A **party** is not defined solely by a single address, as individuals and organizations often control multiple addresses. Our **Owner Labels data** helps group addresses under the same entity, primarily for larger organizations. For individuals, addresses are typically treated separately.  
    
*   **Transaction Counting Criteria**  
    We count **each transaction where at least $1 is transferred**, ensuring that microtransactions and irrelevant activity do not skew the index. Since transaction structures vary by blockchain, we weight them accordingly:  
      
    *   **Fees and Transfers** each make up **45%** of the index.  
          
        
    *   **Transactions contribute 10%** since their significance differs across chains.  
          
        
    *   **Solana’s Transaction Behavior**  
        On Solana, users often execute multiple transactions for actions that would be consolidated into a **single transaction on EVM chains**. This makes Solana transaction counts more comparable to Ethereum transfer counts. While transactions are an essential component of on-chain activity, we weight them lower because they represent varying types of interactions.  
        

The **Dune Index** provides an unparalleled view into real blockchain adoption, cutting through noise and misleading metrics. By analyzing fees, transfers, and transactions in a nuanced manner, it delivers **a clearer picture of on-chain activity**, helping investors and industry participants make informed decisions.

# Dune Digest 025 - Blog | Dune

[All posts](https://dune.com/blog)

DuneDigest025
=============

US Macro data Onchain, Resolv Buybacks, Boundless x Kaito, Aave Horizon, Privacy Cash
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

News•September 1, 2025•3 min read

![@Filippo Armani](https://dune.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fcdn.sanity.io%2Fimages%2Ffox336rh%2Fproduction%2Ff9dd54cabfaa63ae0dda792b5072e44d5b9b9971-800x800.jpg&w=96&q=75)

[Filippo Armani](https://www.linkedin.com/in/filarm/)
Data Content Creator at Dune

![Dune Digest 025](https://dune.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fcdn.sanity.io%2Fimages%2Ffox336rh%2Fproduction%2F4b419d555131f7f29b2da61e113f0de9350c1e3f-1200x675.webp&w=3840&q=75)

[US Macroeconomic Data Goes Onchain](https://djfc5c04.eu1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/RL+113/djFC5c04/MWkTV4m_Bm2V5bQ_n8Jpkt7W9fbdmV5BSKYRN58csQ43qn9qW7Y8-PT6lZ3mjVSF1FH5qhPzcW5vf61w2T817PW7ZjjBL2d8yTYW53BP_J6kQnBrW120FTr7dHcfVW2dMPRl8rDpVPW278gsp4r4CBMW8pT4qR456d0TW4YHfP54kyTQZW2_d-Lm7YhlR9W2YZ13M5YkP43W6Gzfqy3FRdBkW4h26R65dTDDHVLbMGm44KV4kW8hfk4P1j6ZHJW8m89H91_-P2RV_k-yJ4w20R-W60bJD33Qcp8ZW1dl6Xf1jVDvXN24LzjG_5b6KN2M2zKYZ6LzlW4J0yf26GJWBXW5v4rl_7MjX2fW2x257Z5K2dd7W34Dmbg2LyClxW6sPTmk3dn_dkf9bSFzR04)

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

In a landmark step, the U.S. Department of Commerce is now publishing official macroeconomic data from the Bureau of Economic Analysis directly onchain, working with both [Chainlink Data Feeds](https://djfc5c04.eu1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/RL+113/djFC5c04/MWkTV4m_Bm2V5bQ_n8Jpkt7W9fbdmV5BSKYRN58csNC5nXHCW50kH_H6lZ3phW6W3hlJ6lzwQfN8DpK-XQK6t6W1-XMwX2mRvM-W1XJl6q7v2n6hW3rhXmM4wT4k7W7qq4Yk9bbxxgW7vRhsk3FWQTKW8Z0t2c4_m_clN20v0GH1d9Z1W6vZVvd27ZdKYW3N33lL7xx-JkW75hkgs3N7l6nW6rWsyj9jtP-9N86rtndxflR8W96zPcq37HvTVW82VDRH2_lNyZN3kQhrpVRhyLW8dbSk03tWjsxW1CSQgl1bNjdkN40sRyMFhJ_3W94xgVj7LqdvNW6J8tZk1BLKGtVLXr6F4mD3Y-W9cVq277f1D9tW8TNLYp4Mq8ZZN7Hk8HvdZJZ8W2FqGb02BcsfRW6CdZHT4j3FD1W4Z4PnZ5SBcL9W4mWGnp4MhCt-W1NLmfc8RrZkrV2cjmK31sS0Tf7cnxZz04)
 and [Pyth Network](https://djfc5c04.eu1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/RL+113/djFC5c04/MWkTV4m_Bm2V5bQ_n8Jpkt7W9fbdmV5BSKYRN58csPv5nXHCW6N1X8z6lZ3pDW6G1Jw35c4PN3W4N93Kw7_cT8dW9fdsjN5bwkpRW4PkZjV4QF4DjW3mjr-48h-4xdW55c_GZ8y92r0W207qZN5HfdKLV_2vbz6HKlwdW6d1dF54Ljv8_VLZ_8m3g5BJ0W8zrv_c3k_BdrW45dc-w73-vSKW8cGT323KfZ_kN1rKrggQyv7LW3lPZhL6Z0JWBW4xPktJ69dmfRW7-nzx721_1GdW6gdzYr3Vc0MXW2BtBdm4vmbY1W7G1j1q4StmrHW6vzsp07mZ9kyN2RS7m2ZxKWTV6C9c11BxZgMVMw3MH7lP9BmVYV3lf3svdLsW8lRMf-2RJZYFN4qSZfb7dj9nW8C1njd15Kw_FV1QbTf5svf9NW1yfl0s1fy1fLW4Hzlbv1LhgTjW3QgZ-J2n_hP0W2q7d0P4yhzybW1PTFyd7LZ8rJW4ff8lD9b1kf_W90jFZz7R_44vW380Jy97psYnSW3mgJ4Y6ldQXwf3WwmZP04)
 to distribute and verify the feeds. Key indicators such as **GDP**, the **PCE inflation index**, and **Final Sales to Private Domestic Purchasers** are updated monthly or quarterly and **made available across ten blockchains**. This historic initiative signals not only the programmability of macroeconomics—enabling new use cases like **inflation-linked assets**, **prediction markets**, and **advanced DeFi risk models** —but also strengthens the shift in the U.S. government’s stance toward crypto, as public institutions increasingly treat decentralized networks as legitimate channels for data distribution. As always, _if it’s onchain it’s on Dune_, and Entropy has already published the first queries pulling this data live.

![Query results](https://dune.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fcdn.sanity.io%2Fimages%2Ffox336rh%2Fproduction%2Feefb2087a91ec5a8c9f87d9ca182a5a1e57cfb98-1120x628.jpg&w=3840&q=75)

[Resolv Launches Token Buybacks](https://djfc5c04.eu1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/RL+113/djFC5c04/MWkTV4m_Bm2V5bQ_n8Jpkt7W9fbdmV5BSKYRN58csQn3qn9qW8wLKSR6lZ3mQW8PzRPv4vBLDSVjtfZW6F6slYW17wjxs1qM4FkMnRNn06_ljSN8gTkshZKBD-W7MrtfW5bW8L-W15qJjl7DvtPnW7H9H3s1wYsvmW4Z8w894kCwTGW8vFsCl2M-ZJbMqj1dqQG5-nW1mQTYp5Nxly1VDtNpY6xQybcW38VvDl31tWqsW37hk338PxH8VW3yHR227JmYqnW8S2RJZ4rYcD4W56t38b7SyvskW3BjskF3bvXb6VhQmb_570w89W5Zrw1F1p2s0DVVyZKN3KZWWCW1BVzxP4tPb9KW5-rCJm74306jW6yyZvD8KYzsNMNmMG9Kj-hFW6N-ytJ4ZTXbRW90Xm_v6JNkJKf51rjN204)

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Resolv, the protocol behind USR, has [launched](https://djfc5c04.eu1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/RL+113/djFC5c04/MWkTV4m_Bm2V5bQ_n8Jpkt7W9fbdmV5BSKYRN58csQH3qn9qW95jsWP6lZ3kqN48wVtcNZ7JBW6GQDFd5KY3NnW3l2L8P3Fhz3GW5CmT6f2tSn3TW1p75pb3kQMx_W8rZVfJ4sKlRTW2jF1dl20gyxbW56RSdG4xS3pkMCv89h8slchW2MMVbY3ghMNXW1f_sBq2c0CBTW8mnt3m7m-SLLW4cNlSX3d71PKW6ZYf9j1vzq_KW3k3RfS6CPBbwW5FQtZp4bysvxW2Hf5sr3FDMChW1CF-fl4myg5rW2t2r3X8SCJMJW95ny645LdMx1W1XdxTP8FctGMW1r0Pff6pY6T7W1c012w1Zq0gJW82FJnj6NBgvZW1l3cWs55Tz5GW4LLb8J1H5jmtW2YnmBn6lwc6lW82GQrr2_9PzbW8pQrvN64C_mvW1CdMNH1xdwhPd6G-gn04)
 a weekly buyback program that uses protocol revenues to acquire $RESOLV on the open market and remove it from circulation. Revenue is primarily generated from Core Protocol Fees, set at 10% of returns from the collateral pool, which has already produced over $22M in user yields since launch. Since enabling the **fee switch in late July**, Resolv has generated over **$437K in revenue** (run rate >$7M ARR) and **executed its first buyback of ~1.05M RESOLV ($170K)**. By tying protocol usage directly to token value through recurring buybacks, **Resolv is creating a transparent and scalable mechanism for long-term alignment** and protocol maturity.

![Resolv Revenue](https://dune.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fcdn.sanity.io%2Fimages%2Ffox336rh%2Fproduction%2Fa0b0356ed2b9ecd426a435babd8a6fe08ac085b9-1120x639.jpg&w=3840&q=75)

[Boundless & Kaito Mobilize $36M for ZKC Launch](https://djfc5c04.eu1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/RL+113/djFC5c04/MWkTV4m_Bm2V5bQ_n8Jpkt7W9fbdmV5BSKYRN58csQn3qn9qW8wLKSR6lZ3pjN2pWFBsN_-0LW3lmSyW6fy_QBW5nVj1g7bd0TSVgkpgy97Gt1QW93jr6f1tX2Z9W1wzqZq5jx7NGW5_pqxK9kr_0pW3wH9G4102mKmW4rVBPn1wR39PW18ZQh61T6rXwMvfmp8PDwMCW1MFYrv2FL6h7W78mG236_7gW9W6rphYK7DTstTMK6Mc_Swr1lW2pqBDF33190DW8d_G731NMM_BW5yF1003dQYP0W16MvB44YGKvKVK1_xg7MDkJCW35vZjc44W-g-W4G23TY1kcjWHW1w3XSk1cJ_3bW6GbfbT8Q638mW4402Kz1-bhLVW13YdJ080y7lWW61pPbP2H8XP2N31z23Qkp_QNd2l1NK04)

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Boundless, the universal protocol bringing verifiable compute to every blockchain, **launched its Mainnet Beta on July 15** and recently introduced ZK Coin (ZKC), its native token that powers proving collateral, governance, and the new Proof of Verifiable Work model. To broaden distribution, **Boundless partnered with Kaito to allocate 0.25% of supply** to creators between August 25–30, **drawing in 14K participants** pledging **$36M USDC** at an average of ~$2.5K each, including over $13M from a single address. This mix of retail engagement and institutional-sized backing underscores strong conviction in Boundless’ design, positioning ZKC as the backbone for zero-knowledge proving across chains.

![Pledge Trends](https://dune.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fcdn.sanity.io%2Fimages%2Ffox336rh%2Fproduction%2F6bb2ce8e8dc6f855f267a073003f5c91635dbd87-1120x603.jpg&w=3840&q=75)

[Aave's Horizon Unlocks DeFi Composability for RWAs](https://djfc5c04.eu1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/RL+113/djFC5c04/MWkTV4m_Bm2V5bQ_n8Jpkt7W9fbdmV5BSKYRN58csQ43qn9qW7Y8-PT6lZ3pDW7pvYcG4cHqTbW7QfKbW2_hCT1W6Q2Rbj233kTGW23rfFs1yQ3j0N336S73P71ymW7yVl5n5zccjKW9414sY89PP1KN7jGHxYnxFXMW8WhdqB12jMlHV7j17_3nxY3HN6-MgKc1ndq5W1CtmWS2Sg0QFW3y-Dlc52cHMpW5yPrjv5BKVVMW2KkpTg1YfkKVW4gHysk8T1NBgW8hTpfG9bktVSW93SqcB4rCMDCW8xR2mn3knDm6W9klHMp6FbbYDW61_GRH4VKrJ-W6bRykP2H-YWFW8Jv8HH3bb7mRMmfvLRflL3_W15S4w43LVrRFW6qHX9h3_vgNSf8_sdqx04)

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Aave Labs has [launched](https://djfc5c04.eu1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/RL+113/djFC5c04/MWkTV4m_Bm2V5bQ_n8Jpkt7W9fbdmV5BSKYRN58csQ43qn9qW7Y8-PT6lZ3p6W3_l6f14_MQX5W1j5YVg95CpPyW8L-J2J3mq_gWT7PGC1hJc3fW9cFHLP3dRnSMW3QcdF46jg3bgW3f2_4M7SX4RYW9gSnh08qfFCvW4CpG182WL5DjW2Vm34G3fV0YnW7ZMwxj62lJgzW2stzg76Vhd_XW6TB05B7bC5RGW50M_Zf97kHGvW5c8KXK8yNkN6W6gWdZB3Yl1w9MnBscPDtt-vW1XDT9K2D8CZrW6VfZkQ8SnrKBW7W1Pg_3Wfy5FW5TX9GP2Vgvr3W3jP9Rb6rMbrgW72Tvrh5hD_0-Vh4d7H2LQ06xW3MxPnJ4hsGx6W7Zdx2p4RJ2LRdvPcDT04)
 Horizon, a new lending market on Ethereum where **qualified institutions can borrow stablecoins against tokenized real-world assets (RWAs)**. Horizon is already live with a **$50M+ market size**, of which **$7M is borrowed**. **RLUSD leads with $26M supplied**, **followed by Superstate's USCC** ($11M), **USDC** ($9M), **alongside tokenized Treasuries and CLO fund from Superstate and Centrifuge**. Lenders can supply RLUSD, USDC, and GHO, while institutions can post **RWA collateral** such as USTB, USCC, JRTSY, and JAAA. Built on Aave v3.3, Horizon is designed for compliance while unlocking new yield profiles for stablecoin lenders and liquidity for institutional borrowers. Still early but scaling quickly, _Horizon is significant because it brings true RWA composability with DeFi, turning tokenized assets from passive exposure into productive, yield-bearing building blocks of onchain finance._

![Volume (native value) (1)](https://dune.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fcdn.sanity.io%2Fimages%2Ffox336rh%2Fproduction%2F4a1c8a939ddce484b3cb7ef9d8fdf29ecbca17b3-1120x580.jpg&w=3840&q=75)

[Privacy Cash Brings Private Transfers to Solana](https://djfc5c04.eu1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/RL+113/djFC5c04/MWkTV4m_Bm2V5bQ_n8Jpkt7W9fbdmV5BSKYRN58csQ43qn9qW7Y8-PT6lZ3pvN2-7RSCHdW5GW5_QK8b6khsrVW6P3jMx7NwkdXW8m-3zR9ffkbVW8D61yR1NQyQrW7m0kD14J9MxQW2qckMG7NKzH2N9lhBDsBLN9dW6tpLyH68hkZWW7CHnvB2Zhd2jW93Y3-h6yC23KW22rHKj8z1YbFW1D9FZX70gLDjW7zxG1l75nCpkW51rZ-F6GV0g0W70hYz27bb8tVW8Rw8_m85L5RqW5d-PSQ8ZtbNfW8cbq5f7XGDNRW2ckk4g3SyjSJW6VClc22HSQkSW70xr1T15-F0VW8Yqf4m6KbwWRW4DGh4j7Q3k6bW820sCd4MtP1WW93vrm95JgPt6f62xv8M04)

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Launched on August 27, Privacy Cash is a new protocol on Solana that lets users transfer funds without linking past addresses or transaction history. In just its first day live, it processed **over 17.5K SOL in volume**, with more than **10K SOL privately transferred**, **20 SOL in fees**, **1,308 transactions**, and **416 unique users**. These numbers point to a large user base eager to transact privately. Backed by Alliance DAO, the protocol evolves Tornado Cash’s ideals of privacy through zero-knowledge proofs, advancing them with onchain intelligence APIs like Cipherowl AI to enable compliant, bad-actor-blocking transfers that avoid the regulatory pitfalls which ensnared its predecessor. The launch also comes as the **Solana Policy Institute pledged $500K** toward the legal defense of **Tornado Cash co-founders Roman Storm and Alexey Pertsev**, underscoring the community’s ongoing fight for privacy tech in the face of regulatory scrutiny.

![Chart (6)-2](https://dune.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fcdn.sanity.io%2Fimages%2Ffox336rh%2Fproduction%2Fd032e0cb7d0602017a2569cc3b7cbb89fd152834-1120x657.jpg&w=3840&q=75)

Nothing in this newsletter constitutes financial advice.

**Always do your own research.**

Dune Digest is all about cutting through the noise and surfacing the most relevant onchain trends. If you have insights, dashboards, or data-driven stories that belong in the Digest, **drop your suggestions** [here](https://djfc5c04.eu1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/RL+113/djFC5c04/MWkTV4m_Bm2V5bQ_n8Jpkt7W9fbdmV5BSKYRN58csNW5nXHCW5BWr2F6lZ3pgW2--Rwh11c-K1W3b4fN61mQ7pkVLmxgM8MVb0ZW4PQVW25f8nckW2yKjcF7sxhp7MmvLlNfNdNRVZFRLb9368y_W3d8W2p1p1CcZW69wz0h8gVFS2W8GN2QS4BW-JsN2gg9Z53HXs4N45Qp1KknPS8W6WC-Vv7sC1bZW2vPXYX6kLnQcW8zwFB34Z2nnzW1VbFBc4tGHg-W2VJYJl2g2dBhN8mJ7Zd9Sy5sW1Q3Xyj6lD8yBW3mgSD-8YDNwPW9fh1yK8K0w1gW83Ml1H7NNhLMW1lhMp17yBkjFW855nqG6hPqmfW6NXXy94R4PwbVK0NpJ3TV25LW2-SN1H4lLlJJW7Tp8kp9hkJ6YW5rWjgM55JT03W6T8LBY8lBr5FW5kfXhs35g5SrW29bQXp85SXmCW5dR0Gl2XMCp_W1TxQkq87V2Ypf5XCgSv04)
.

_The data must flow._

# Introducing Sim: Dune beyond analytics - Blog | Dune

[All posts](https://dune.com/blog)

IntroducingSim:Dunebeyondanalytics
==================================

Powering the next generation of onchain apps
--------------------------------------------

News•May 20, 2025•2 min read

dapps

blockchain-infrastructure

wallets

simapi

![@Mats Olsen](https://dune.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fcdn.sanity.io%2Fimages%2Ffox336rh%2Fproduction%2Ff6fc3d29e0b012fb86082c9258f2420dba6974c1-800x800.jpg&w=96&q=75)

[Mats Olsen](https://www.linkedin.com/in/mewwts/)
 Co-founder & CTO at Dune

![Introducing Sim: Dune beyond analytics](https://dune.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fcdn.sanity.io%2Fimages%2Ffox336rh%2Fproduction%2Fe606c0a12adb46e8bc11fba3fe62feaff4597fa4-1200x675.png&w=3840&q=75)

Crypto moves at the speed of data.
----------------------------------

In 2018, Dune was born from a simple truth: **blockchain data was trapped in silos, accessible only to few with technical expertise.** We asked, what if anyone could explore, query, and share crypto’s story? So we built [dune.com](https://dune.com/)
 — a home for curious minds to transform raw blockchain data into dashboards, stories, and answers.

Why dashboards?
---------------

Because crypto needed a **lingua franca**. Dashboards became the universal language for analysts, founders, and traders to collaborate. They turned fragmented data into shared insights: tracking a protocol’s growth, dissecting a hack, or predicting the next trend. Millions of users flocked to Dune, not just to find answers, but to ask questions they didn’t yet know how to voice.

**But as our community grew, so did their ambitions.**But as our community grew, so did their ambitions._But as our community grew, so did their ambitions._

Data teams began stitching Dune’s SQL API into their workflows, powering trading algorithms, risk models, and investor reports. They trusted us because Dune was built for scale: complex queries, massive datasets, battle-tested reliability. Yet, a refrain echoed: “This data is gold, but we need it faster. **Realtime faster**.”

The irony wasn’t lost on us. Crypto never sleeps. DeFi positions liquidate in seconds. NFTs mint in blocks. Memecoins rocket in milliseconds. Analytical engines, no matter how powerful, aren’t built for this. Teams were forced to choose: depth or speed.

**We refuse to make them choose.**We refuse to make them choose._We refuse to make them choose._

Sim isn’t a pivot—it’s an evolution.
------------------------------------

When thousands of your users whisper the same problem, you shout the solution. In November 2024, _we announced the beta release of our developer platform, codenamed Echo._ The response was thunderous. Data engineers replaced clunky workarounds with elegant API calls. Product teams integrated live blockchain state into apps. Developers now had a highway, not a hiking trail, to build on.

Today, **Echo becomes Sim** —a tribute to [sim.io](https://sim.dune.com/)
, the realtime engine from smlXL, whose [acquisition supercharged our vision](https://dune.com/blog/dune-acquires-smlxl-to-strengthen-real-time-blockchain-data-capabilities)
. Sim isn’t just a tool; it’s a paradigm shift. Expect more big news in the coming months.

![__wf_reserved_inherit](https://dune.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fcdn.sanity.io%2Fimages%2Ffox336rh%2Fproduction%2Fa783f924694f2b6785e0ca47bb4e72e39d853bd2-2654x614.png&w=3840&q=75)

Making crypto data accessible
-----------------------------

Dune’s mission is to make crypto data accessible. We’ve done a heck of a job on that front for data teams, curious individuals, and innovators by building [dune.com](http://dune.com/)
, the most widely used data platform in crypto. But accessibility isn’t just for analysts—it’s for builders at scale. Today, we’re advancing our mission by also empowering developers, enterprises, and institutions with world-class infrastructure.

From fast-moving startups to Fortune 500 companies, from DeFi pioneers to TradFi institutions and government organizations, teams trust Dune because our data doesn’t just inform—it transforms. We’re excited to partner with the engineering counterparts of the thousands of data teams who reach for Dune for analytics. This time, to build the next generation of apps in crypto.

Please welcome Sim to the Dune family of products. We’re here to build.

_Get started on_ [sim.dune.com](https://sim.dune.com/)
 today.

The realtime data must flow.
