# Polygon Ecosystem 2024 - Blog | Dune

[All posts](https://dune.com/blog)

PolygonEcosystem2024
====================

Year-End report - 2024 was a defining year for Polygon, cementing its position as a leading blockchain ecosystem. This report, created in collaboration with Dune, dives into the numbers that tell the story—growing user adoption, expanding use cases, and the breakout success of apps like Polymarket and Courtyard.
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Research•February 20, 2025•1 min read

[Polygonpolygon](https://dune.com/blockchains/polygon)

![@Alsie L.](https://dune.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fcdn.sanity.io%2Fimages%2Ffox336rh%2Fproduction%2F2d4297f3e37d59932719698a65a11cfb77fe3194-673x673.jpg&w=96&q=75)

[Alsie L.](https://www.linkedin.com/in/alsieliu/)
Content Marketing Manager at Dune

![Polygon Ecosystem 2024](https://dune.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fcdn.sanity.io%2Fimages%2Ffox336rh%2Fproduction%2Fe19c2dbd1551ea032fa74d86db4938cba5ad04d5-1200x675.webp&w=3840&q=75)

Year-End report - 2024 was a defining year for Polygon, cementing its position as a leading blockchain ecosystem. This report, created in collaboration with Dune, dives into the numbers that tell the story—growing user adoption, expanding use cases, and the breakout success of apps like Polymarket and Courtyard. From surging activity to new innovations, the data paints a clear picture: **Polygon is scaling faster than ever**. Join us in celebrating the milestones that shaped the ecosystem this year. 🚀

# Optimism is now on Dune! - Blog | Dune

[All posts](https://dune.com/blog)

OptimismisnowonDune!
====================

Ethereum is scaling, and so are the datasets on Dune! Optimism Ethereum’s roll-up data is finally available, allowing anyone to build rich insights into OΞ’s growing ecosystem of dapps.
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

News•September 3, 2021•1 min read

[Optimismoptimism](https://dune.com/blockchains/optimism)

![@Alsie L.](https://dune.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fcdn.sanity.io%2Fimages%2Ffox336rh%2Fproduction%2F2d4297f3e37d59932719698a65a11cfb77fe3194-673x673.jpg&w=96&q=75)

[Alsie L.](https://www.linkedin.com/in/alsieliu/)
Content Marketing Manager at Dune

![Optimism is now on Dune!](https://dune.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fcdn.sanity.io%2Fimages%2Ffox336rh%2Fproduction%2F9f43c747c8393950c9737a6bcfe307c3343df96b-1108x650.webp&w=3840&q=75)

Ethereum is scaling, and so is the number of datasets on Dune! We are happy to announce that Optimism Ethereum’s roll-up data is finally available on Dune, allowing anyone to build rich insights into OΞ’s growing ecosystem of dapps.

Following Optimism’s soft-launch approach, an early version of our integration was also soft-launched on Dune a few weeks ago. Early results from Dune’s community of wizards showcasing Optimism’s ecosystem growth on different fronts such as DeFi, NFTs and more can be found [here](https://dune.xyz/Marcov/Optimism-Ethereum)
.

A testament to that growth is the fact that the [total number of transactions](https://dune.xyz/embeds/82481/164319/0e19c32c-12https:/dune.xyz/embeds/82491/164334/26893332-edac-4a97-98ba-afb0f2cf4460)
 processed on a weekly basis has 20x over the last two months. As well as the total number of addresses interacting with the OVM which went from around 800 at the end of June to more that 35.000 this week.

![ width=](https://dune.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fcdn.sanity.io%2Fimages%2Ffox336rh%2Fproduction%2F6a7ae21f5aff749fb0ab1dda18c145b55ca24461-1430x721.png&w=3840&q=75)

These are numbers that speak for themselves and we are thrilled to be making it easy for anyone anywhere to surface insights like these. You’ll find OΞ data by selecting the ​​source dropdown in the query editor window (top-left) making it easy to analyse Ethereum, Optimistic Ethereum, and many more with Dune.

The data must flow and you can expect both more data and other exciting features soon!

PS. We are hiring engineers

# Dune Agent - Blog | Dune

[All posts](https://dune.com/blog)

DuneAgent
=========

Why We Built an MCP-Powered Data Discovery Chatbot for Dune's Data Catalog
--------------------------------------------------------------------------

News•June 3, 2025•2 min read

ai

beta

![@Meghan Heintz](https://dune.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fcdn.sanity.io%2Fimages%2Ffox336rh%2Fproduction%2F94b7eef84317e8abb7626fd61d19f44a244f043a-500x500.jpg&w=96&q=75)

[Meghan Heintz](https://www.linkedin.com/in/meghan-heintz-994baa2b/)
Staff Software Engineer, Machine Learning and AI

![Dune Agent](https://dune.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fcdn.sanity.io%2Fimages%2Ffox336rh%2Fproduction%2Feb8b7addee729e7912c4a652610710a86b9d1926-1200x675.webp&w=3840&q=75)

The Problem: Data Discovery at Scale
------------------------------------

Dune hosts millions of tables across dozens of blockchains. We are constantly adding new chains, decoding new protocols, and community members are contributing new Spells (curated datasets). Even as the former lead of the Spellbook project, I struggled to keep track of what new analytical capabilities were being unlocked.

This isn't just my problem—it's everyone's problem. Analysts waste hours searching for the right tables, understanding schema changes, and figuring out which Spells might accelerate their analysis. The friction between "I want to analyze X" and actually querying the data is too high.

Our Solution: MCP + Intelligent Search
--------------------------------------

We built a data discovery chatbot powered by Anthropic's Model Context Protocol (MCP) that fundamentally changes how users explore Dune's data catalog. Here's why MCP was the key:

**Traditional approach:** LLMs with static context windows struggle with dynamic, massive datasets. They hallucinate table names, miss recent additions, and can't effectively search millions of entries.

**MCP approach:** Instead of stuffing everything into context, MCP lets our chatbot dynamically query Dune's existing search infrastructure. It's like giving the LLM a live connection to our database catalog rather than a outdated snapshot.

The technical implementation:

*   Built MCP servers that wrap Dune's internal search APIs
*   Created specialized tools for searching raw tables, decoded events/calls, and Spells
*   Implemented smart filtering by blockchain, schema, and contract address
*   Added SQL retrieval for Spells to expose transformation logic
*   **Analysts** discover relevant Spells they didn't know existed, cutting query development time
*   **Protocol teams** instantly find all tables related to their contracts across every chain
*   **Data engineers** understand dependencies between raw and curated datasets without diving into GitHub
*   Search relevance and speed
*   Explanation clarity for complex data relationships
*   Missing features that would accelerate your workflow

This is version 0.1. Help us build the data discovery experience that on-chain analysts deserve.

_Check out it at_ [dune.com/agent](https://dune.com/agent)

Give us your feedback at [dune.com/feedback](https://dune.com/feedback/en?hideMenu=true)

# Dune now integrates with Binance Smart Chain! - Blog | Dune

[All posts](https://dune.com/blog)

DunenowintegrateswithBinanceSmartChain!
=======================================

Binance Smart Chain has experienced massive growth over the past year thanks to fast, affordable transactions and a great user experience.
------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

News•October 22, 2021•2 min read

[BNBBNB](https://dune.com/blockchains/binance-smart-chain)

![@Alsie L.](https://dune.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fcdn.sanity.io%2Fimages%2Ffox336rh%2Fproduction%2F2d4297f3e37d59932719698a65a11cfb77fe3194-673x673.jpg&w=96&q=75)

[Alsie L.](https://www.linkedin.com/in/alsieliu/)
Content Marketing Manager at Dune

![Dune now integrates with Binance Smart Chain!](https://dune.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fcdn.sanity.io%2Fimages%2Ffox336rh%2Fproduction%2Fc1c999e61dbf26e7607a3024c5fee244c3c20e8d-1400x787.webp&w=3840&q=75)

Binance Smart Chain has experienced massive growth over the past year thanks to fast, affordable transactions and a great user experience.

BSC is now a crucial part of the crypto and DeFi ecosystem. As you know, it’s our mission to make crypto data accessible for everyone and help everyone to become an analyst of the new financial system being built before our eyes.

So - we’re thrilled to announce...... BSC data is now LIVE on Dune!

Anyone can now extract rich insights from BSC, exploring the exciting ecosystem of dapps, wallets and transactions. Anyone can build beautiful dashboards that can be shared, enjoyed and forked across the community.

We are very excited about:

*   Dune wizards diving in and bringing the same razor sharp analysis to BSC that they previously have to Ethereum, Polygon, xDAI and Optimism
*   Shining a light into one of the most important chains and helping the wider community to understand what’s happening on BSC on a deeper level
*   A new generation of analysts building their SQL and data visualization skills in a multi-chain environment

Ready to get started?

Just [head to the Query Editor](https://dune.xyz/queries)
 and select **Binance Smart Chain from the dropdown** in the top left.

Don’t know SQL or how to do data analysis? Don’t worry. We’re working on resources to teach you step-by-step.

In the meantime, can check out our [tutorial docs](https://docs.dune.xyz/about/tutorials)
, this [YouTube tutorial series](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=S-cctFmR828&list=PLK3b5d4iK10ext4v-GBySekaA8-GP8quD)
, and come [hang out with us on Discord](https://discord.com/invite/ErrzwBz)
!

We’re so excited to see what you’ll build. You can expect more data, integrations and features soon.

In the meantime, the data must flow!

# Stellar is now LIVE on Dune! - Blog | Dune

[All posts](https://dune.com/blog)

StellarisnowLIVEonDune!
=======================

We’re excited to announce that Stellar, the open-source blockchain network designed for cross-border payments and asset transfers, is now fully integrated into Dune!
---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

News•October 14, 2024•1 min read

[Stellarstellar](https://dune.com/blockchains/stellar)

cross-border-payments

defi-tokenization

dune-api

dune-catalyst

![@Alsie L.](https://dune.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fcdn.sanity.io%2Fimages%2Ffox336rh%2Fproduction%2F2d4297f3e37d59932719698a65a11cfb77fe3194-673x673.jpg&w=96&q=75)

[Alsie L.](https://www.linkedin.com/in/alsieliu/)
Content Marketing Manager at Dune

![Stellar is now LIVE on Dune!](https://dune.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fcdn.sanity.io%2Fimages%2Ffox336rh%2Fproduction%2Fc0b5d7fef4aea94f016cd66e79bba5ec984c7a31-1400x787.webp&w=3840&q=75)

This integration gives Dune users access to powerful analytics tools for exploring the rich ecosystem of Stellar data, helping developers, analysts, and blockchain enthusiasts unlock new insights.

Why Stellar?
------------

[Stellar](https://stellar.org/)
 is widely known for its focus on providing efficient and affordable cross-border payments. The network uses **Lumens (XLM)**, its native cryptocurrency, to facilitate low-cost transfers and bridge different currencies. Stellar’s **anchor system** also makes it easy for users to tokenize and exchange assets like dollars, euros, and cryptocurrencies. Its design ensures financial institutions and individuals alike can transfer assets seamlessly across borders without traditional intermediaries, making it a popular choice for **remittances** and **products and services that enhance access to the global financial system**.

"With the integration of Stellarinto Dune, we’re offering the community a chance to explore onchain data that are crucial for understanding the dynamics of global payments and asset tokenization. Communities can now analyze key metrics, including transaction volumes, token transfers, and smart contract interactions, helping them refine use cases in areas like remittances and DeFi." — Fredrik Haga, Co-Founder & CEO of Dune.

What Does This Mean for You?
----------------------------

With Stellar now live on Dune, you can access comprehensive data on its blockchain network. This includes insights into:

*   Transaction volumes and network health
*   Activity of Stellar-based tokens and assets
*   Key metrics related to remittances and asset transfers
*   [Get started with Stellar on Dune](https://docs.dune.com/data-catalog/stellar/overview)
    
*   [How to create Dune Dashboards](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=XlE5a83W_xo&ab_channel=Dune)
    
*   [Use Dune API](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=bobGOetmAa4&list=PLK3b5d4iK10ext4v-GBySekaA8-GP8quD&index=10&ab_channel=Dune)
    

The Data Must Flow!

# Dune Partners With Chainstory to Step up Onchain Data Communications - Blog | Dune

[All posts](https://dune.com/blog)

DunePartnersWithChainstorytoStepupOnchainDataCommunications
===========================================================

At Dune, we believe data tells a story.
---------------------------------------

News•October 24, 2024•2 min read

![@Alsie L.](https://dune.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fcdn.sanity.io%2Fimages%2Ffox336rh%2Fproduction%2F2d4297f3e37d59932719698a65a11cfb77fe3194-673x673.jpg&w=96&q=75)

[Alsie L.](https://www.linkedin.com/in/alsieliu/)
Content Marketing Manager at Dune

![Dune Partners With Chainstory to Step up Onchain Data Communications](https://dune.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fcdn.sanity.io%2Fimages%2Ffox336rh%2Fproduction%2F37ea2fe37caf4440824df08364f528ccb1537755-2400x1350.png&w=3840&q=75)

We’re excited to announce our **strategic partnership** with [Chainstory](https://www.chainstory.co/)
, a leading crypto PR and communications firm. We’re always looking for new ways to enhance how the world interacts with onchain data. This partnership is set to combine Dune’s **unmatched analytics** with Chainstory’s expertise in **media and PR**, bringing onchain insights into the spotlight.

Bridging the Gap Between Onchain Data and Storytelling
------------------------------------------------------

At Dune, we believe data tells a story. With Chainstory’s support, we’ll ensure those stories are heard. From **dashboards to onchain insights**, this partnership will help turn **verifiable blockchain data into narratives** that drive industry conversations.

> “
> 
> _“We’re proud to partner with a platform as dynamic as Dune. Our experience in PR and content marketing aligns perfectly with Dune’s innovative analytics capabilities, allowing us to shape compelling stories that resonate with the community,” said Chainstory’s Co-CEO, Afik Rechler._

Supporting Dune’s Ecosystem Partners
------------------------------------

This collaboration also extends to our **ecosystem builders**, who will now have access to Chainstory’s PR expertise. Whether **amplifying onchain findings** from community Wizards or supporting ecosystem partners, Chainstory will help ensure that our **data-driven insights** resonate across the industry.

> “
> 
> “We’re excited to partner with Chainstory and leverage their deep knowledge of onchain communications,” said Alsie Liu, Content Marketing Manager at Dune. “This partnership enhances our ability to communicate effectively within the crypto ecosystem and offers our ecosystem partners comprehensive support from analytics to communications.”

Strengthening Dune’s Position as an onchain Powerhouse
------------------------------------------------------

This partnership reinforces our commitment to providing not only leading onchain analytics but also **making data accessible**. With Chainstory’s support, we aim to elevate Dune’s position as an **onchain powerhouse** within the blockchain ecosystem, helping both our users and partners share their data-driven stories with the world.

We’re excited about the opportunities ahead and look forward to what this partnership will unlock for Dune and our community of data wizards!

_For media inquiries, please contact_ [\[email protected\]](https://dune.com/cdn-cgi/l/email-protection#12737e617b775276677c773c717d7f)
_,_ [\[email protected\]](https://dune.com/cdn-cgi/l/email-protection#0e6f6867654e6d666f67607d7a617c77206d61)
_._

# Editor’s Pick on Dune - Blog | Dune

[All posts](https://dune.com/blog)

Editor’sPickonDune
==================

How to find the best and trusted content on Dune!
-------------------------------------------------

Guide•August 8, 2024•2 min read

![@Alsie L.](https://dune.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fcdn.sanity.io%2Fimages%2Ffox336rh%2Fproduction%2F2d4297f3e37d59932719698a65a11cfb77fe3194-673x673.jpg&w=96&q=75)

[Alsie L.](https://www.linkedin.com/in/alsieliu/)
Content Marketing Manager at Dune

![Editor’s Pick on Dune](https://dune.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fcdn.sanity.io%2Fimages%2Ffox336rh%2Fproduction%2F79daaec97f1e567d923fe3c96fb4eebbd54adc4b-720x405.png&w=3840&q=75)

We’ve recently released the “Editor’s Pick” badge to dashboards on Dune, where certain dashboards will get amplified by the Dune team for exemplary work. These dashboards will appear at the top of discovery and search on the Dune app. We’ve hand picked 100 dashboards to start with.

![ width=](https://dune.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fcdn.sanity.io%2Fimages%2Ffox336rh%2Fproduction%2F4b868e47ccd507e5fa1b73f3d3432ed280203da8-1109x664.png&w=3840&q=75)

The quality bar for becoming an “Editor’s Pick” is high, and something wizards should be proud of attaining. Note that it is possible to lose this badge if the dashboard consistently has misrepresented/miscalculated charts, or if it has not been kept up to date.

Below you can find our criteria for qualification:
--------------------------------------------------

‍**Comprehensive Dashboard:** For any given topic (protocol, blockchain, airdrop, token, etc.) the dashboard should have a strong mix of charts and tables that give both breadth and depth of context. So if you have volume and count charts, you should also have breakdowns by markets and user segments. Ideally you can break down clear labels as well of different entities or user personas, and showcase relevant metrics like retention and growth over time.

‍**Easy to Follow Charts:** All your visualizations should be well formatted (axes labels, number formatting, column naming). On top of that, you should add context with text objects throughout the dashboard. The more you explain the methodology and link to resources that help the viewer better understand the topic, the easier it will be to follow. You should NOT just dump 100 charts into a dashboard and think your work is done.

‍**Up to Date Information:** The crypto space moves quickly, so while your dashboard may be complete when released it will likely also fall out of date over time. This is more subjective, but oftentimes if you have not touched a dashboard in six months then it’s likely no longer super relevant to the topic. Try and stay on top of things by keeping in communication with the wider ecosystem - participate in forums, on twitter, in telegram groups with the projects in the topic you’re covering to constantly learn about changes/events.

Submitting Your Dashboards for Editor’s Consideration:
------------------------------------------------------

The best way to submit your work to be highlighted will be to share the dashboard publicly and tag @duneanalytics on Twitter or LinkedIn. Below is a great example of sharing work with a clear story and use case, making it easier for everyone to find it and understand it.

![__wf_reserved_inherit](https://dune.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fcdn.sanity.io%2Fimages%2Ffox336rh%2Fproduction%2F857cc0543dc7d50e0a8e4be842aa5bc1024bd801-1074x1116.png&w=3840&q=75)

[https://x.com/marcov\_91/status/1785633298711994549](https://x.com/marcov_91/status/1785633298711994549)

We’re excited at Dune to become more involved in the curation and improvement of dashboards, and look forward to awarding more dashboards with the “Editor’s Pick” badge!

# SQL API and Developer API - Blog | Dune

[All posts](https://dune.com/blog)

SQLAPIandDeveloperAPI
=====================

Unlock the full power of Dune with its flexible API — automate queries, integrate blockchain data, and streamline analytics using Python or TypeScript SDKs.
------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Guide•August 16, 2024•2 min read

![@Alsie L.](https://dune.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fcdn.sanity.io%2Fimages%2Ffox336rh%2Fproduction%2F2d4297f3e37d59932719698a65a11cfb77fe3194-673x673.jpg&w=96&q=75)

[Alsie L.](https://www.linkedin.com/in/alsieliu/)
Content Marketing Manager at Dune

The video provides an overview of Dune's API functionality, highlighting that every query on Dune can be used as an API endpoint. Here are the key points:

1.  **Query as API Endpoint**: Every query on Dune can be accessed via its query ID, allowing users to retrieve results in JSON or CSV format. However, private queries are only accessible by their creators.
2.  **Billing and Usage**: API usage costs are based on query execution and data points retrieved. The cost scales with the plan, offering more data points per credit as users upgrade. Users can monitor their usage and manage API keys through Dune's settings.
3.  **API Operations**: The API allows for CRUD (Create, Read, Update, Delete) operations on queries, including managing query settings and refreshing materialized views. Most users will utilize execution and results APIs to run queries and retrieve data.
4.  **SDKs and Parameters**: Dune provides Python and TypeScript SDKs to simplify API interaction. Users can pass query parameters using these SDKs, making it easier to integrate with Dune's API.
5.  **Preset Endpoints**: Dune offers preset API endpoints for common data retrieval tasks, such as contract deployments and market forecasts, reducing the need for custom query management.
6.  **Uploading Data**: Users can upload data directly to Dune via the API, bypassing the 200MB limit of manual uploads. This feature is useful for continuously inserting data programmatically.
7.  **Developer API**: Dune also provides a developer API for retrieving token balances and transactions in real-time, with minimal delay, which is separate from the main query API.

The video emphasizes the flexibility and power of Dune's API, allowing users to seamlessly integrate and automate data retrieval and management within their applications.

# DuneCon 2022 - Blog | Dune

[All posts](https://dune.com/blog)

DuneCon2022
===========

We’re hosting the first DuneCon! On September 15th - conveniently between DappCon & EthBerlin - hundreds of Wizards & team members will descend on Funkhaus in Berlin.
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Research•June 21, 2022•1 min read

![@Alsie L.](https://dune.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fcdn.sanity.io%2Fimages%2Ffox336rh%2Fproduction%2F2d4297f3e37d59932719698a65a11cfb77fe3194-673x673.jpg&w=96&q=75)

[Alsie L.](https://www.linkedin.com/in/alsieliu/)
Content Marketing Manager at Dune

![DuneCon 2022](https://dune.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fcdn.sanity.io%2Fimages%2Ffox336rh%2Fproduction%2F5f12b9f7674b2ca00c40b1257568fc11cd529456-734x361.png&w=3840&q=75)

We’ve made a lot of exciting announcements this year, like our series B raise, Dune Engine v2 - but this might be the most exciting yet……

We’ve met a lot of you at crypto events around the world over the past few years, but this time we want everybody in one place…..

**So we’re hosting the first DuneCon!**

On September 15th - conveniently between DappCon & EthBerlin - hundreds of Wizards & team members will descend on Funkhaus in Berlin.

Funkhaus is an amazing venue, a world-famous recording studio and creative space known for hosting Berlin Blockchain Week and many other events.

![ width=](https://dune.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fcdn.sanity.io%2Fimages%2Ffox336rh%2Fproduction%2F82eabef9ab6a76e208b9756aeea411aa036ff65b-2000x1500.jpg&w=3840&q=75)

We’ll have a series of activities throughout the day, from hackathons & talks to training sessions and fun events.

Then we’ll wrap things up by around 18:30 before heading over to an evening venue for more socializing and merriment into the night!

This is first and foremost a Wizard event. We want to say thank you and give everybody a great day while getting to know our community better. But DuneCon is also open to prospective Wizards, partners, and industry guests.

The day is going to be a lively combination of learning, networking, socializing, and celebrating - we're going to make it a day to remember.

We can’t wait to see you all in Berlin for the best on-chain data conference of 2022. So what are you waiting for? Spaces are limited - head over to [dunecon.com and apply to attend!](https://www.dunecon.com/)

# Learning DuneSQL and Our Engines - Blog | Dune

[All posts](https://dune.com/blog)

LearningDuneSQLandOurEngines
============================

Master Dune SQL with this guide covering query optimization, engine tiers, binary functions, and API integration—designed to level up your on-chain data analysis skills fast.
------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Guide•August 16, 2024•2 min read

![@Alsie L.](https://dune.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fcdn.sanity.io%2Fimages%2Ffox336rh%2Fproduction%2F2d4297f3e37d59932719698a65a11cfb77fe3194-673x673.jpg&w=96&q=75)

[Alsie L.](https://www.linkedin.com/in/alsieliu/)
Content Marketing Manager at Dune

The video provides an introduction to Dune SQL and the engines used on the Dune platform for running queries. Key points include:

1.  **Dune SQL Overview**: Dune SQL is a fork of Trino SQL, and users can refer to Dune's documentation or Trino's for detailed functions and operators. For beginners, it is recommended to take Kaggle’s SQL courses and practice with Dune's SQL and Ethereum guide.
2.  **Learning and Practicing SQL**: The video emphasizes the importance of hands-on learning, suggesting users practice basic SQL concepts through the provided guide, focusing on difficult topics like joins and window functions.
3.  **Working with Binary/Hex Functions**: Users dealing with Ethereum addresses (hexadecimal) should become familiar with functions for converting and handling binary data.
4.  **Calling APIs in SQL**: Dune SQL supports HTTP GET and POST functions, allowing users to pull external data (e.g., from DeFi Llama) directly into their queries.
5.  **Optimizing Queries**: The video discusses query optimization, especially when working with large datasets. Key tips include filtering by block time and block number, and understanding the use of partitions instead of indexes in Dune SQL.
6.  **Engine Tiers**: Dune offers three shared engines (Free, Medium, Large) for running queries. The Free tier allows up to 2-minute queries without costing credits, while the Medium and Large tiers offer faster execution but with a 30-minute timeout and credit usage.
7.  **Credits and Plans**: Users receive 2,500 free credits each month, with the option to upgrade for more. On the Free plan, only three queries can run simultaneously, whereas other plans allow unlimited concurrent queries.
8.  **Becoming a Better Analyst**: For users looking to advance their skills, the video suggests exploring Dune's roadmap and related resources to deepen their understanding of crypto concepts and improve as data analysts.

Overall, the video is aimed at helping users understand how to effectively use Dune SQL, optimize queries, and leverage the platform's engine tiers for their data analysis needs.

‍

# Leverage Onchain Data to Drive Growth - Blog | Dune

[All posts](https://dune.com/blog)

LeverageOnchainDatatoDriveGrowth
================================

Manuel Amaral, Founder at SeaLaunch, explores how on-chain data can drive growth and enable smarter decisions in Web3 at DuneCon 2024.
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Guide•December 3, 2024•1 min read

![@Alsie L.](https://dune.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fcdn.sanity.io%2Fimages%2Ffox336rh%2Fproduction%2F2d4297f3e37d59932719698a65a11cfb77fe3194-673x673.jpg&w=96&q=75)

[Alsie L.](https://www.linkedin.com/in/alsieliu/)
Content Marketing Manager at Dune

At **DuneCon 2024**, Manuel Amaral, Founder of SeaLaunch, delivered an insightful talk exploring how on-chain data can drive growth and enable smarter decision-making in Web3. Moving beyond technicalities, the session focused on leveraging blockchain data for actionable business strategies.

Key topics included:

*   Using on-chain data to move from narrative-driven to data-driven decision-making.
*   Unlocking insights from raw blockchain data and transforming it into business intelligence.
*   Real-world examples of on-chain data applications in growth, marketing, risk management, and incentives.
*   The shift in NFT market dynamics and adapting strategies for sustainable growth.
*   Filtering and qualifying on-chain data to address bot activity, inflated metrics, and retention.

This talk also featured examples of how protocols like Uniswap and Zora used on-chain insights to adapt and thrive, offering actionable takeaways for blockchain developers, growth teams, and decision-makers. Whether you’re building a Web3 product or optimizing an existing protocol, this session provided the tools to turn blockchain data into a competitive advantage.

👉 Watch now to learn how to transform raw data into growth strategies and subscribe for more content from DuneCon 2024! 🚀

‍

# Meet the team: Austin - Blog | Dune

[All posts](https://dune.com/blog)

Meettheteam:Austin
==================

Meet Austin, a designer at Dune, thrives in a maker-focused culture, creating magic through collaboration, innovation, and a passion for excellence.
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Team•August 5, 2024•1 min read

careers-at-dune

![@Alsie L.](https://dune.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fcdn.sanity.io%2Fimages%2Ffox336rh%2Fproduction%2F2d4297f3e37d59932719698a65a11cfb77fe3194-673x673.jpg&w=96&q=75)

[Alsie L.](https://www.linkedin.com/in/alsieliu/)
Content Marketing Manager at Dune

![Meet the team: Austin](https://dune.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fcdn.sanity.io%2Fimages%2Ffox336rh%2Fproduction%2F58ae6398e04b638e36e594f18c0b988ae1bd0b23-1200x675.webp&w=3840&q=75)

Role at Dune:‍
--------------

**‍** Dune is a maker’s dream. Meetings are scheduled during the US/EU overlap, allowing for blocks of time for spontaneous syncs and deep design work. Our strong remote culture is reinforced by offsites, events, and coworking.

Memorable Dune Moment:
----------------------

Before officially joining, I was invited to the Athens off-site. Our team - Claudia, Belen, & Richard - won the “just ship it” category of the hackathon. We shipped a query loading bar, later improved through customer feedback. I believe the best way to develop relationships and confidence in one another is to solve problems together.

Favorite Dune Value:
--------------------

Create Magic. We pride in our work and strive for excellence. We don’t settle for uninspired efforts, but go the extra mile to make something magical.

Describing Dune in Three Words:
-------------------------------

Magic - Data - Wizards

# Navigation on the App - Blog | Dune

[All posts](https://dune.com/blog)

NavigationontheApp
==================

Learn how to navigate and manage dashboards, queries, teams, and advanced search features on Dune to streamline your data analysis workflow and uncover key blockchain insights faster.
---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Guide•August 16, 2024•1 min read

![@Alsie L.](https://dune.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fcdn.sanity.io%2Fimages%2Ffox336rh%2Fproduction%2F2d4297f3e37d59932719698a65a11cfb77fe3194-673x673.jpg&w=96&q=75)

[Alsie L.](https://www.linkedin.com/in/alsieliu/)
Content Marketing Manager at Dune

The video provides an overview of navigating and managing content on the Dune platform. It covers several key features:

1.  **Navigation Overview**: The video explains the main navigation bar on Dune's homepage, allowing users to create content, access their library, discover dashboards, search, and manage account settings, including switching between personal and team accounts.
2.  **Discovery Page**: This page showcases trending dashboards and queries, allowing users to filter by topics or view specific content, such as the wizard leaderboard.
3.  **Library Management**: Users can organize their queries and dashboards into folders, manage schedules, and handle data uploads. The video emphasizes using the correct search bar within the library for specific content.
4.  **Advanced Search**: Dune offers advanced search features, enabling users to filter content by title, tags, author, and date, which is particularly useful for finding up-to-date information.
5.  **Code Search**: Users can search for specific SQL queries by filtering for code, making it easier to find and learn from relevant examples.
6.  **Teams and User Management**: The platform allows the creation and management of team accounts with different roles (viewers, editors, admins). Users can monitor their subscription, usage, and manage their individual account settings, including passwords and emails.

Overall, the video aims to help users efficiently navigate and utilize Dune's features for managing and discovering data-driven content.

‍

# Flashbots MEV data is live on Dune! - Blog | Dune

[All posts](https://dune.com/blog)

FlashbotsMEVdataisliveonDune!
=============================

We partnered with Flashbots to make MEV data accessible to the web3 community. Flashbots is the first third-party dataset we’ve released on Dune.
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

News•April 25, 2022•2 min read

![@Alsie L.](https://dune.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fcdn.sanity.io%2Fimages%2Ffox336rh%2Fproduction%2F2d4297f3e37d59932719698a65a11cfb77fe3194-673x673.jpg&w=96&q=75)

[Alsie L.](https://www.linkedin.com/in/alsieliu/)
Content Marketing Manager at Dune

![Flashbots MEV data is live on Dune!](https://dune.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fcdn.sanity.io%2Fimages%2Ffox336rh%2Fproduction%2Fa30290faf5aecd239b76320c6f0eaca4b9462e51-1280x720.png&w=3840&q=75)

It has been a big few months for Dune. We’ve been building like crazy, and now we have an exciting announcement to make.

**Flashbots data is now live on Dune!**

We partnered with Flashbots to make MEV data accessible to the web3 community. Flashbots is the _first third-party dataset_ we’ve released on Dune.

MEV is to crypto what high frequency trading is to legacy finance. It’s a measure of the profit that a miner or validator can make through their power to arbitrarily include, exclude, or reorder transactions in the blocks they produce. You can read more about it in [this piece by Dragonfly](https://medium.com/dragonfly-research/we-live-in-a-mempool-backrunning-the-mev-crisis-a4ea0b493b05)
.

MEV in its various forms can harm Ethereum users, which is where Flashbots comes in. Flashbots is a vital R&D organization with the goal of mitigating the huge risks posed by Miner Extractable Value (MEV) to smart-contract blockchains.

They’ve built several excellent tools to quantify MEV and work towards eliminating the information asymmetry and poor incentives in the space. You can read more about how Flashbots works [here](https://docs.flashbots.net/Flashbots-auction/miners/faq/)
.

In traditional finance, comparable data is tightly controlled and protected, but no data stays buried for long in crypto. One of our software engineers who worked on the project, Dias Alymbekov, commented that:

_“Similar data in traditional finance is gated. Flashbots make a step forward by democratizing access to this information and create equal opportunities for everybody. It's exciting to collaborate and make this data accessible to the crypto community”_

We’re launching Flashbots data on our new data engine, which we previously used to launch Solana data. It’s going to be a game changer for Dune and crypto data as a whole.

Now anybody can run queries on Flashbots' entire historical database of arbitrages, liquidations, and sandwiches on Ethereum!

This is going to open up a wide range of new possibilities and opportunities for Dune Wizards. Enjoy. The data must flow……

# Discovering Insights with Ease - Blog | Dune

[All posts](https://dune.com/blog)

DiscoveringInsightswithEase
===========================

Introducing the New Discover Experience on Dune
-----------------------------------------------

News•March 18, 2024•2 min read

![@Alsie L.](https://dune.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fcdn.sanity.io%2Fimages%2Ffox336rh%2Fproduction%2F2d4297f3e37d59932719698a65a11cfb77fe3194-673x673.jpg&w=96&q=75)

[Alsie L.](https://www.linkedin.com/in/alsieliu/)
Content Marketing Manager at Dune

![Discovering Insights with Ease](https://dune.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fcdn.sanity.io%2Fimages%2Ffox336rh%2Fproduction%2Fd670884cb8680c601cff3d92b73e2712a13d2f34-1200x675.png&w=3840&q=75)

We're excited to announce a significant update to Dune's Discover experience, rolling out a suite of enhancements designed to make your data exploration journey smoother, more intuitive, and more personalized than ever before. This update reflects our commitment to continuously improving user experience and providing powerful tools for data analysis and discovery.

A Fresh Look with the New UI
----------------------------

Our Discover page has undergone a comprehensive makeover, boasting a new, sleek design that not only looks good but makes navigation a breeze. With more options to filter and sort through Dune's extensive content library, finding the insights you need has never been easier.

![__wf_reserved_inherit](https://dune.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fcdn.sanity.io%2Fimages%2Ffox336rh%2Fproduction%2F5d927a978f353d23c51552edf393a490c7376935-1120x474.webp&w=3840&q=75)

‍

Favorites, Reimagined
---------------------

We understand the importance of quick access to the content you love. That's why we've revamped the Favorites section, making it more accessible and informative. Now, you can easily find updates from your favorite creators and gain new insights about the tags you follow, all in one place.

![__wf_reserved_inherit](https://dune.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fcdn.sanity.io%2Fimages%2Ffox336rh%2Fproduction%2Fdb33484200cd04f4da2da7f1f9ca7d5e825ead04-1120x474.webp&w=3840&q=75)

‍

Never Lose Track with Recently Viewed
-------------------------------------

It's easy to lose track of interesting analyses amidst the wealth of content on Dune. Our new Recently Viewed feature solves this problem by allowing you to quickly revisit your content consumption history, ensuring that valuable insights are never more than a few clicks away.

![__wf_reserved_inherit](https://dune.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fcdn.sanity.io%2Fimages%2Ffox336rh%2Fproduction%2F9e58c62001431ab7db12eab193c0fa972e86e3de-1120x474.webp&w=3840&q=75)

‍

Stay Updated with Your Team
---------------------------

For users collaborating through Dune Teams, we've introduced a new section dedicated to team updates. This feature allows you to quickly see what your colleagues are working on and dive directly into their latest discoveries, fostering better collaboration and knowledge sharing.

![__wf_reserved_inherit](https://dune.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fcdn.sanity.io%2Fimages%2Ffox336rh%2Fproduction%2Fdbfa3af55cf7f6e1218a7079e91466e29b0a34af-1120x474.webp&w=3840&q=75)

‍

Exploring Tags Just Got Better
------------------------------

The way you explore tags on Dune has been completely overhauled. With new lists for popular, trending, and your most-favored tags, alongside time-based filters, you can now explore short-term buzz and long-term trends with unparalleled ease.

![__wf_reserved_inherit](https://dune.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fcdn.sanity.io%2Fimages%2Ffox336rh%2Fproduction%2F1f04a987708d7cc49edbc9494d66378e6ef10f8f-1120x474.webp&w=3840&q=75)

‍

Spotlight on Creators
---------------------

Our creators are at the heart of Dune's community. The updated Discover experience introduces a more dynamic way to explore creators, with flexible leaderboards that highlight the top wizards or teams over various periods. Find out who your most-favored wizards are and discover new talents.

![__wf_reserved_inherit](https://dune.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fcdn.sanity.io%2Fimages%2Ffox336rh%2Fproduction%2Fdd5b01f3435b6757940134cfb4855a671cb6333f-1120x474.webp&w=3840&q=75)

‍

Featured Projects Take Center Stage
-----------------------------------

Discover the exceptional work of teams that have customized their profiles through our Featured Projects list. This section highlights the innovation and creativity within the Dune community, offering you a deeper understanding of the teams behind the data.

![__wf_reserved_inherit](https://dune.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fcdn.sanity.io%2Fimages%2Ffox336rh%2Fproduction%2Fd174b86ad4217173952dc70fe547bb7a78d6f7e4-1120x474.webp&w=3840&q=75)

‍

Embark on Your Discovery
------------------------

Our new Discover experience is now live, and we can't wait for you to explore these updates. Head over to [dune.com](http://dune.com/)
 and start uncovering more useful content and insights from our vast content library.

‍

We're eager to hear your thoughts on these enhancements. Your feedback is crucial in helping us further refine and improve your experience on Dune. [Share your thoughts with us](https://dune.com/feedback)
 and help us shape the future of data discovery.

‍

depin

# Lens Chain is Now LIVE on Dune! - Blog | Dune

[All posts](https://dune.com/blog)

LensChainisNowLIVEonDune!
=========================

Unlock Decentralized SocialFi Insights with Full Onchain Transparency
---------------------------------------------------------------------

News•April 4, 2025•1 min read

layer-1-layer-2

deso

![@Alsie L.](https://dune.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fcdn.sanity.io%2Fimages%2Ffox336rh%2Fproduction%2F2d4297f3e37d59932719698a65a11cfb77fe3194-673x673.jpg&w=96&q=75)

[Alsie L.](https://www.linkedin.com/in/alsieliu/)
Content Marketing Manager at Dune

![Lens Chain is Now LIVE on Dune!](https://dune.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fcdn.sanity.io%2Fimages%2Ffox336rh%2Fproduction%2Ff2c5eb3880cce8f295c2428a20fae9edfd94988e-1400x787.png&w=3840&q=75)

What is Lens Chain?
-------------------

[Lens Chain](https://lens.xyz/)
 is a **modular, Ethereum-secured Layer 2** purpose-built for SocialFi, combining scalable infrastructure, decentralized storage, and composable social primitives. Designed to empower creators and developers, it offers:

1.  **Modular Social Primitives**: Plug-and-play building blocks like **Groups**, **Feeds**, **Graphs**, and **Usernames**, customizable via onchain Rules to create unique monetization models.
2.  **Grove Storage**: A free, onchain-permissioned storage, ensuring user ownership and enterprise-grade performance. Compatible with EVM chains Ethereum Mainnet, Base, Abstract, Sophon, ZKsync and Lens Chain.
3.  **Seamless UX**: Account abstraction, USD gas fees ($GHO), and frictionless onboarding via email/phone.
4.  **Ethereum Security**: Backed by zkSync’s ZK Stack and Avail’s data availability layer for horizontal scalability.
5.  **Profile Dynamics**:  
    *   Track **migrated profiles** and **social connections**
    *   Analyze Follow NFTs, Collects, and creator monetization patterns
6.  **Application Engagement**:  
    *   Compare retention rates and app-specific activity
7.  If you believe there's a blockchain that deserves to be part of our platform, we invite you to submit your proposals through our [Data Request list](https://dune.com/feedback/?b=6595c480143e3c7207d23019)
     here. Or, use [Dune Catalyst](https://dune.com/product/dune-catalyst)
     to integrate your blockchain and make it discoverable on Dune!
8.  [Get started with Lens Chain](https://docs.dune.com/data-catalog/overview)
      
    ‍[How to create Dune Dashboards](https://docs.dune.com/data-catalog/evm/apechain/overview)
    [‍Use Dune API](https://docs.dune.com/api-reference/overview/introduction)
     Use Dune API  
    Use Dune API

The data must flow!

# Introducing Dune SQL - Blog | Dune

[All posts](https://dune.com/blog)

IntroducingDuneSQL
==================

DuneSQL is our new engine for querying Dune’s V2 data in a faster, more powerful and user-friendly way.
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

News•March 8, 2023•3 min read

![@Mats Olsen](https://dune.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fcdn.sanity.io%2Fimages%2Ffox336rh%2Fproduction%2Ff6fc3d29e0b012fb86082c9258f2420dba6974c1-800x800.jpg&w=96&q=75)

[Mats Olsen](https://www.linkedin.com/in/mewwts/)
 Co-founder & CTO at Dune

![Introducing Dune SQL](https://dune.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fcdn.sanity.io%2Fimages%2Ffox336rh%2Fproduction%2F18f0dcc618124945d94df5729c25076161bd3840-3600x2025.webp&w=3840&q=75)

TLDR:

*   We are investing heavily in DuneSQL to make the fastest, most powerful and convenient crypto data querying experience on the planet.
*   DuneSQL will eventually be the only query engine on Dune.
*   We have shipped a tool to help Wizards migrate their queries to DuneSQL. We’re committed to helping make the transition to DuneSQL as smooth as possible for Wizards.
*   We acknowledge that we have not communicated enough and well enough to the community about the new query engine. We are sorry about that and promise to do better from now on.
*   Using other [queries as views](https://dune.com/docs/reference/dune-v2/query-engine/#query-queries-as-views-in-dune-sql)
    
*   Querying byte arrays directly using 0x-encoding: \`WHERE from=0xd8dA6BF26964aF9D7eEd9e03E53415D37aA96045\` (notice the lack of quoting or lowercasing)
*   Full wei-level precision calculations via UINT256 and INT256 data types.
*   ~30% speedup over the alpha launch configuration through better data types.
*   Using other queries as _materialized_ views to unlock incredible speedups and new use cases
*   Enabling the wizard community to contribute user-defined functions to Dune SQL.
*   Query your own data sources directly from Dune.
*   Upload data to Dune SQL
*   Ability to select performance level for your query
*   Dune V1 is in the middle of being phased out as Postgres is not a suitable system for the scale and complexity of our data and pipelines
*   Support for everything besides Ethereum on V1 has been deprecated already and only supports editing queries. Many of these datasets _are so big_ that our v1 data platform is struggling to fully support them.
*   We’re working with teams to make sure that they can use V2, and we’re very happy to have a dialogue with you.
*   Spark SQL will be around for another 3-5 months. There’s no _immediate_ action needed from your side if you are using Dune Engine V2 (Spark SQL), but we highly recommend not creating further queries on it.
*   There will be prompts for you to migrate to Dune SQL. Again, Dune SQL has the same data, minus some spells that we are actively working to make available as soon as possible.
*   Dune SQL is now the default experience. We are devoting _a lot_ of resources to improve it.
*   Start using Dune SQL! If it’s not possible for you to use Dune SQL, reach out to a Dune team member to tell us why
*   You _can_ still use Spark SQL for 3-5 months, but Dune SQL is the preferred query engine and eventually you will have to use it.
*   Spark SQL on dune.com is not ANSI compliant, which in effect means that it implicitly converts a lot of types for you. When using Dune SQL you may have to explicitly cast types for them to be comparable.
*   Spark SQL and Trino SQL (which is what Dune SQL is built on) supports a lot of the same functionality, but their functions and keywords are a little bit different. E.g. \`array\_contains()\` in Spark is just \`contains()\` in Trino.
*   In our experience, the changes required to migrate an existing Spark query to Trino SQL should be relatively straightforward. And because Trino is generally faster for many of Dune’s queries, it should be faster to iterate.
*   Some types are different on Dune SQL than on Spark SQL. See [here](https://dune.com/docs/reference/dune-v2/dunesql-changes/)
     ‍
*   For the time being, Spellbook will continue running on Spark SQL. Our Spellbook CI/CD pipeline will validate all new spells or changes are compatible with Dune SQL
*   We expect to migrate Spellbook to run Dune SQL in the next 3 months.

**‍** ‍

Join the SQL revolution
-----------------------

As you come across issues, or areas of improvement, shoot us an email at [\[email protected\]](https://dune.com/cdn-cgi/l/email-protection#caaebfa4afb9bba6e7acafafaea8aba9a18aaebfa4afe4a9a5a7)
 and we will gladly take a look.

‍

# Introducing Owner Labels: What They Are and Why They Matter - Blog | Dune

[All posts](https://dune.com/blog)

IntroducingOwnerLabels:WhatTheyAreandWhyTheyMatter
==================================================

Owner Labels enrich blockchain data with critical contextual information about the entities operating within both centralized and decentralized spaces.
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

News•May 16, 2024•3 min read

blockchain-infrastructure

data

scaling-architecture

![@Alsie L.](https://dune.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fcdn.sanity.io%2Fimages%2Ffox336rh%2Fproduction%2F2d4297f3e37d59932719698a65a11cfb77fe3194-673x673.jpg&w=96&q=75)

[Alsie L.](https://www.linkedin.com/in/alsieliu/)
Content Marketing Manager at Dune

![Introducing Owner Labels: What They Are and Why They Matter](https://dune.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fcdn.sanity.io%2Fimages%2Ffox336rh%2Fproduction%2F9e063c63ec190654813e33e02567a188b6e9c868-1200x675.png&w=3840&q=75)

Have you ever wondered which institutions are behind blockchain transactions? Are you seeking deeper insights into the blockchain data you analyze? Understanding the "who" behind the "what" in blockchain data can vastly enhance its value.

Introducing [Owner Labels](https://docs.dune.com/data-catalog/spellbook/labels/overview)
! This new dataset will transform how our community interacts with blockchain data by providing unprecedented clarity about the entities behind blockchain activities.

What are Owner Labels?
----------------------

[Owner Labels](https://docs.dune.com/data-catalog/spellbook/labels/overview)
 enrich blockchain data with critical contextual information about the entities operating within both centralized and decentralized spaces. This dataset includes details such as the owner's category, headquarter country, and essential online presences like websites and GitHub URLs. Importantly, this feature focuses only on companies and organizations, ensuring the privacy of individual cryptocurrency holders remains protected.

![__wf_reserved_inherit](https://dune.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fcdn.sanity.io%2Fimages%2Ffox336rh%2Fproduction%2Ff180c9226d929f3c381201799fb4cf3f5970eabe-1200x542.png&w=3840&q=75)

What labels are identified

Why Owner Labels?
-----------------

Blockchain data is often cryptic, with its value limited without knowing the "who" behind the "what." Our new labels demystify the entities behind blockchain operations, enabling users to perform more precise and insightful analyses. These labels are crucial for:

*   Competitive Analysis: Understand market dynamics by seeing how your inflows and outflows compare to competitors.
*   Market Analysis: Identify which categories are trending and who the major players are within these categories.
*   Business Analysis: Gauge your business growth and understand your customer base better.
*   Brought together 15 industry experts to brainstorm and refine this project.
*   Referenced standards groups like the [Open Labels Initiative](https://github.com/openlabelsinitiative/OLI)
     to ensure broad compatibility and acceptance.
*   Defined a robust set of categories and established automated quality checks to maintain the integrity of the dataset.

> “
> 
> “I'm excited about the launch of the Owner Labels data! Having a unified framework to categorize addresses not only eliminates the redundancy of individual efforts, which often lead to discrepancies and incomplete information but also streamlines the process of adding new addresses and labels, making it simpler and more collaborative for the entire community.” – Sergi Juanati, Head of Analytics at [Steakhouse Financial](https://www.steakhouse.financial/)
> .

Dune is uniquely positioned to offer comprehensive Owner Labels across the Web3 ecosystem, leveraging our exclusive industry working group, transparent audit processes, automated quality checks, and advanced AI, all underpinned by a commitment to openness and collaborative industry standards.**‍**

What to expect now?
-------------------

Today, we are launching owner labels as a public beta, and our labels already cover over 50% of the on-chain monetary value for ETH, and over 25% coverage across all assets. We expect to reach 50% coverage across all assets soon, and we'll continue to expand our dataset post-launch. We invite passionate professionals to contribute and refine our offerings as we grow. Right now, you can check out:

![ width=](https://dune.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fcdn.sanity.io%2Fimages%2Ffox336rh%2Fproduction%2F040683c6e229ae411caee548dd5783edad5073fb-1600x341.png&w=3840&q=75)

[Labels.owner\_details](https://dune.com/dune/owner-analysis)

This table is a directory of the owners we have labeled along with information such as their category, headquarter country, website, github url, and project documentation pages.

![ width=](https://dune.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fcdn.sanity.io%2Fimages%2Ffox336rh%2Fproduction%2F5bc6213e4ffcf90e494e06bb8ffbf5382c7d6636-1600x354.png&w=3840&q=75)

[Labels.owner\_addresses](https://dune.com/dune/owner-analysis)

This table contains the addresses belonging to the owners across blockchains.

![ width=](https://dune.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fcdn.sanity.io%2Fimages%2Ffox336rh%2Fproduction%2F1d868a9e89d1f4933f7400e4d7dea709ad830175-1600x439.png&w=3840&q=75)

[labels.transfer\_summary](https://dune.com/dune/owner-analysis)

This table joins labeled addresses with token transfers data to summarize the overall token volumes.

![ width=](https://dune.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fcdn.sanity.io%2Fimages%2Ffox336rh%2Fproduction%2Fc1b39cf7624433d89753fbe8a095335ee7418ae5-1600x440.png&w=3840&q=75)

[labels.transfer\_summary\_daily](https://dune.com/dune/owner-analysis)

This table joins labeled addresses with daily token transfers data to summarize the overall token volumes over time.

![ width=](https://dune.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fcdn.sanity.io%2Fimages%2Ffox336rh%2Fproduction%2Fe9ef854235c2966f8c1f3a8e20c91ab70ee49f2b-1600x441.png&w=3840&q=75)

labels.counterparty\_activity\_daily

This table summarizes the flow of token transfers from an owner to/and from their counterparties.

‍How to Get Involved
--------------------

Interested in contributing to the Owner Labels dataset? We’re looking for passionate industry professionals to join our invite-only group of experts. See something missing? Share it with us, and our team will review.

Get in touch [\[email protected\]](https://dune.com/cdn-cgi/l/email-protection#264a4744434a5566425348430845494b)

# Introducing the Dune Index - Blog | Dune

[All posts](https://dune.com/blog)

IntroducingtheDuneIndex
=======================

A Real Measure of Blockchain and Cryptocurrency Adoption
--------------------------------------------------------

News•November 11, 2024•3 min read

data

![@Alsie L.](https://dune.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fcdn.sanity.io%2Fimages%2Ffox336rh%2Fproduction%2F2d4297f3e37d59932719698a65a11cfb77fe3194-673x673.jpg&w=96&q=75)

[Alsie L.](https://www.linkedin.com/in/alsieliu/)
Content Marketing Manager at Dune

![Introducing the Dune Index](https://dune.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fcdn.sanity.io%2Fimages%2Ffox336rh%2Fproduction%2F8178dfaf797ee426d03532af96977b5e5652bbdb-1200x675.png&w=3840&q=75)

What is the Dune Index?
-----------------------

In the rapidly evolving world of blockchain and cryptocurrency, gauging real adoption is crucial to understanding the industry’s impact. While we often see metrics like price, active addresses, and total value locked, these don’t give the full picture of how blockchain technology is being truly utilized by people. That’s why we created the [Dune Index](https://docs.dune.com/data-catalog/dune-index/introduction)
 – a **comprehensive, activity-driven** metric designed to measure meaningful adoption in the blockchain space.

The Dune Index brings together key metrics in a unique way, giving developers, investors, and observers an accessible, accurate way to see real traction within the blockchain industry. Instead of capturing momentary market activity, the Dune Index highlights trends that reflect **genuine user engagement,** helping us all understand where blockchain adoption stands and where it’s headed.

![__wf_reserved_inherit](https://dune.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fcdn.sanity.io%2Fimages%2Ffox336rh%2Fproduction%2Fc7af263d051ba4e89a04a6dcb499fb46f23719b0-2550x1280.png&w=3840&q=75)

Adoption is More than Active Addresses, TVL, or Price
-----------------------------------------------------

While it’s common to track price, active addresses, and total value locked (TVL), these metrics don’t tell us the whole story:

1.  **Price**: Price often reflects market sentiment rather than adoption. True adoption drives utility, not speculation.
2.  **Active Addresses**: Many users hold multiple addresses or create temporary addresses for specific purposes. Counting addresses can overstate user count, while the Dune Index focuses on real, consolidated activity.
3.  **Total Value Locked (TVL)**: While TVL suggests capital flow, it doesn’t necessarily reflect active, productive use. A few high-value deposits can inflate TVL, masking the real utility derived from the assets.
4.  [Transaction Count](https://docs.dune.com/data-catalog/dune-index/net-transfers)
     \- Every transaction is a piece of blockchain activity.
5.  [Value Transferred](https://docs.dune.com/data-catalog/dune-index/transactions)
     - Beyond the transaction itself, the value moved reflects blockchain's utility.
6.  [Fees Paid](https://docs.dune.com/data-catalog/dune-index/gas-fees)
     - Blockspace isn’t free, and the fees paid tell us about the demand for network resources.
7.  **Closer to Previous Highs in Real Terms**: Today’s adoption levels are approaching highs seen in prior market peaks. However, unlike past speculative booms, today’s values reflect more **genuine, utility-driven** activity.
8.  **Filtering Out Noise**: During previous highs, unfiltered activity included much higher instances of **net-zero** transfers, showing the difference between speculative and utility-driven adoption.
9.  **Encouraging Trends with Room to Grow**: Though transaction counts and net values have grown, today’s lower gas fees mean users get **more value for less cost.** As blockchains scale, there’s greater potential for adoption to grow on the foundation of utility rather than speculation.

![ width=](https://dune.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fcdn.sanity.io%2Fimages%2Ffox336rh%2Fproduction%2F9eb598e6af4e9a3b71c111a075147d4000f37040-1600x915.png&w=3840&q=75)

![ width=](https://dune.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fcdn.sanity.io%2Fimages%2Ffox336rh%2Fproduction%2F5f5943e0099405fb908e4f178dd07b2c4d91b7c3-1600x757.png&w=3840&q=75)

![ width=](https://dune.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fcdn.sanity.io%2Fimages%2Ffox336rh%2Fproduction%2F4a52b8d5e78f22d3a83ed7ecc4140ae99bb5aa0b-1600x753.png&w=3840&q=75)

With the Dune Index, we get an unprecedented view into how each chain contributes to overall adoption. We see that while adoption during previous booms was occurring largely on the Bitcoin and Ethereum blockchains, there is a more diverse mix of platforms on which the community is operating today.

![__wf_reserved_inherit](https://dune.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fcdn.sanity.io%2Fimages%2Ffox336rh%2Fproduction%2F4bf02123777521f4010fab38bb9e12194ab51934-2038x990.png&w=3840&q=75)

![__wf_reserved_inherit](https://dune.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fcdn.sanity.io%2Fimages%2Ffox336rh%2Fproduction%2Fa4679933bba7d087dd13599ec580c8364ea56f15-2024x982.png&w=3840&q=75)

The Bottom Line
---------------

The Dune Index is not just another metric – it’s a refined, comprehensive adoption indicator that distills meaningful activity from the broader blockchain landscape. This index goes beyond price or general activity metrics, delivering insight into the industry's real growth and value creation.

We encourage you to explore the Dune Index and stay tuned as we continue tracking adoption. Watch how real blockchain adoption grows, backed by robust data and powerful analytics, and see where this technology is truly making an impact.

For daily insights, check out [the Dune Index on our platform](https://dune.com/metrics)
 and stay updated on how blockchain adoption evolves.

# Plasma is now live on Dune! - Blog | Dune

[All posts](https://dune.com/blog)

PlasmaisnowliveonDune!
======================

Explore transactions, stablecoin flows, and global payments infrastructure — Plasma’s mainnet activity is now fully accessible on Dune.
---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

News•September 25, 2025•1 min read

[Plasmaplasma](https://dune.com/blockchains/plasma)

![@Alsie L.](https://dune.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fcdn.sanity.io%2Fimages%2Ffox336rh%2Fproduction%2F2d4297f3e37d59932719698a65a11cfb77fe3194-673x673.jpg&w=96&q=75)

[Alsie L.](https://www.linkedin.com/in/alsieliu/)
Content Marketing Manager at Dune

![Plasma is now live on Dune!](https://dune.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fcdn.sanity.io%2Fimages%2Ffox336rh%2Fproduction%2F58c2885ed90d10cfb8dc5c901bc2979b3df8dcbb-1400x787.webp&w=3840&q=75)

We’re excited to share that **Plasma is now officially live on Dune** from day one of mainnet. Starting today, every piece of onchain activity from Plasma — stablecoin transfers, payment rail usage, confidential transactions, gas token flows, and more — is queryable, visualizable, and exportable through Dune’s platform.

What is Plasma?
---------------

Plasma is a **Layer 1 blockchain purpose-built for stablecoin payments**, designed to provide the infrastructure and applications needed for a new global financial system. With **$2B+ stablecoin TVL at launch**, Plasma is positioned as the native chain for stablecoin activity, offering both the base-layer technology and vertically integrated product stack to put digital dollars into the hands of everyone, everywhere.

Plasma’s chain-level features include:

*   **Gasless USDT transfers**  
    
*   **Custom gas tokens**  
    
*   **Confidential, compliant transactions**  
    
*   **PlasmaBFT**, a high-throughput consensus layer tailored for stablecoin flows
*   **Stablecoin Transfers** — Track USDT transactions across the network, from retail payments to institutional flows.  
    
*   **Active Wallets & Adoption** — Monitor the number of users engaging with Plasma’s payment rails and how adoption grows over time.  
    
*   **TVL and Liquidity** — Track the $2.5B+ stablecoin base and how liquidity is distributed across applications.
*   [Get started with Plasma data](https://docs.dune.com/data-catalog/evm/plasma/overview)
    
*   [How to create Dune Dashboards](https://docs.dune.com/home)
    
*   [Use Sim API](https://sim.dune.com/)
     for developers

The data must flow! 🚀
